authors_text: Ekta U. Samani,Feng Tao,Harshavardhan R. Dasari,Sihao Ding,Ashis G. Banerjee
title: F2BEV: Bird's Eye View Generation from Surround-View Fisheye Camera Images for Automated Driving
title_zh: F2BEV：利用环视鱼眼相机图像生成鸟瞰图，用于自动驾驶
comment: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2023
comments: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2023
abstract: Bird's Eye View (BEV) representations are tremendously useful for perception-related automated driving tasks. However, generating BEVs from surround-view fisheye camera images is challenging due to the strong distortions introduced by such wide-angle lenses. We take the first step in addressing this challenge and introduce a baseline, F2BEV, to generate discretized BEV height maps and BEV semantic segmentation maps from fisheye images. F2BEV consists of a distortion-aware spatial cross attention module for querying and consolidating spatial information from fisheye image features in a transformer-style architecture followed by a task-specific head. We evaluate single-task and multi-task variants of F2BEV on our synthetic FB-SSEM dataset, all of which generate better BEV height and segmentation maps (in terms of the IoU) than a state-of-the-art BEV generation method operating on undistorted fisheye images. We also demonstrate discretized height map generation from real-world fisheye images using F2BEV. Our dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/volvo-cars/FB-SSEM-dataset
summary: Bird's Eye View (BEV) representations are tremendously useful for perception-related automated driving tasks. However, generating BEVs from surround-view fisheye camera images is challenging due to the strong distortions introduced by such wide-angle lenses. We take the first step in addressing this challenge and introduce a baseline, F2BEV, to generate discretized BEV height maps and BEV semantic segmentation maps from fisheye images. F2BEV consists of a distortion-aware spatial cross attention module for querying and consolidating spatial information from fisheye image features in a transformer-style architecture followed by a task-specific head. We evaluate single-task and multi-task variants of F2BEV on our synthetic FB-SSEM dataset, all of which generate better BEV height and segmentation maps (in terms of the IoU) than a state-of-the-art BEV generation method operating on undistorted fisheye images. We also demonstrate discretized height map generation from real-world fisheye images using F2BEV. Our dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/volvo-cars/FB-SSEM-dataset
abstract_zh: 鸟瞰图 (BEV) 表示对于与感知相关的自动驾驶任务非常有用。然而，由于此类广角镜头会产生强烈的畸变，因此从环视鱼眼相机图像生成 BEV 具有挑战性。我们迈出了应对这一挑战的第一步，并引入了基线 F2BEV，从鱼眼图像生成离散的 BEV 高度图和 BEV 语义分割图。 F2BEV 由一个失真感知空间交叉注意模块组成，用于在变压器式架构中查询和整合来自鱼眼图像特征的空间信息，后跟一个特定于任务的头。我们在合成 FB-SSEM 数据集上评估 F2BEV 的单任务和多任务变体，所有这些变体都比在未失真鱼眼图像上运行的最先进的 BEV 生成方法生成更好的 BEV 高度和分割图（就 IoU 而言）。我们还演示了使用 F2BEV 从现实世界的鱼眼图像生成离散高度图。我们的数据集可在 https://github.com/volvo-cars/FB-SSEM-dataset 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为F2BEV的方法，用于从环绕视图鱼眼相机图像生成鸟瞰图（BEV）表示，以支持自动驾驶中的感知任务。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼相机因具有宽视角而广泛用于自动驾驶，但其图像存在严重的畸变，使得从鱼眼图像生成BEV变得具有挑战性。
AI.method: F2BEV方法包括一个感知畸变的空间交叉注意力模块，用于在类似Transformer的架构中查询和整合鱼眼图像特征，随后是一个任务特定的头部，用于生成BEV高度图和语义分割图。
AI.result: F2BEV在合成数据集FB-SSEM上表现优于现有最先进的BEV生成方法，并且能够在真实世界鱼眼图像上生成离散的高度图。
AI.conclusion: F2BEV为从鱼眼图像生成BEV提供了一个有效的基线方法，并展示了其在实际应用中的潜力。

authors_text: Xiaolong Tang,Shuo Ye,Yufeng Shi,Tianheng Hu,Qinmu Peng,Xinge You
title: Filter Pruning based on Information Capacity and Independence
title_zh: 基于信息容量和独立性的过滤器剪枝
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (IEEE TNNLS).The code will be available at https://github.com/txl-hub/ICI
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (IEEE TNNLS).The code will be available at https://github.com/txl-hub/ICI
abstract: Filter pruning has gained widespread adoption for the purpose of compressing and speeding up convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, existing approaches are still far from practical applications due to biased filter selection and heavy computation cost. This paper introduces a new filter pruning method that selects filters in an interpretable, multi-perspective, and lightweight manner. Specifically, we evaluate the contributions of filters from both individual and overall perspectives. For the amount of information contained in each filter, a new metric called information capacity is proposed. Inspired by the information theory, we utilize the interpretable entropy to measure the information capacity, and develop a feature-guided approximation process. For correlations among filters, another metric called information independence is designed. Since the aforementioned metrics are evaluated in a simple but effective way, we can identify and prune the least important filters with less computation cost. We conduct comprehensive experiments on benchmark datasets employing various widely-used CNN architectures to evaluate the performance of our method. For instance, on ILSVRC-2012, our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods by reducing FLOPs by 77.4% and parameters by 69.3% for ResNet-50 with only a minor decrease in accuracy of 2.64%.
summary: Filter pruning has gained widespread adoption for the purpose of compressing and speeding up convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, existing approaches are still far from practical applications due to biased filter selection and heavy computation cost. This paper introduces a new filter pruning method that selects filters in an interpretable, multi-perspective, and lightweight manner. Specifically, we evaluate the contributions of filters from both individual and overall perspectives. For the amount of information contained in each filter, a new metric called information capacity is proposed. Inspired by the information theory, we utilize the interpretable entropy to measure the information capacity, and develop a feature-guided approximation process. For correlations among filters, another metric called information independence is designed. Since the aforementioned metrics are evaluated in a simple but effective way, we can identify and prune the least important filters with less computation cost. We conduct comprehensive experiments on benchmark datasets employing various widely-used CNN architectures to evaluate the performance of our method. For instance, on ILSVRC-2012, our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods by reducing FLOPs by 77.4% and parameters by 69.3% for ResNet-50 with only a minor decrease in accuracy of 2.64%.
abstract_zh: 为了压缩和加速卷积神经网络 (CNN)，过滤器剪枝已得到广泛采用。然而，由于滤波器选择有偏差和计算成本高昂，现有方法距离实际应用还很远。本文介绍了一种新的过滤器剪枝方法，该方法以可解释的、多视角的、轻量级的方式选择过滤器。具体来说，我们从个人和整体角度评估过滤器的贡献。对于每个过滤器中包含的信息量，提出了一种称为信息容量的新度量。受信息论的启发，我们利用可解释熵来衡量信息容量，并开发了特征引导的近似过程。对于过滤器之间的相关性，设计了另一个称为信息独立性的度量。由于上述指标是以简单但有效的方式评估的，因此我们可以以较少的计算成本识别和修剪最不重要的过滤器。我们使用各种广泛使用的 CNN 架构对基准数据集进行全面的实验，以评估我们方法的性能。例如，在 ILSVRC-2012 上，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，ResNet-50 的 FLOP 减少了 77.4%，参数减少了 69.3%，而准确率仅略有下降 2.64%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息容量和独立性的滤波器剪枝方法，用于压缩和加速卷积神经网络。
AI.motivation: 现有的滤波器剪枝方法存在滤波器选择偏差和计算成本高的问题，因此需要一种更高效、可解释的剪枝方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的滤波器剪枝方法，从个体和整体两个角度评估滤波器的贡献。引入信息容量指标，基于信息理论中的熵来衡量信息容量，并开发了特征引导的近似过程。此外，还设计了信息独立性指标来衡量滤波器之间的相关性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上进行实验，结果表明，该方法在ILSVRC-2012数据集上，对ResNet-50模型的FLOPs减少了77.4%，参数减少了69.3%，仅导致准确率下降2.64%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在滤波器剪枝方面表现出色，具有较高的效率和可解释性，适用于实际应用。

authors_text: Emily Kuang,Ehsan Jahangirzadeh Soure,Mingming Fan,Jian Zhao,Kristen Shinohara
title: Collaboration with Conversational AI Assistants for UX Evaluation: Questions and How to Ask them (Voice vs. Text)
title_zh: 与对话式人工智能助手协作进行用户体验评估：问题以及如何提问（语音与文本）
comment: Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
comments: Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
abstract: AI is promising in assisting UX evaluators with analyzing usability tests, but its judgments are typically presented as non-interactive visualizations. Evaluators may have questions about test recordings, but have no way of asking them. Interactive conversational assistants provide a Q&A dynamic that may improve analysis efficiency and evaluator autonomy. To understand the full range of analysis-related questions, we conducted a Wizard-of-Oz design probe study with 20 participants who interacted with simulated AI assistants via text or voice. We found that participants asked for five categories of information: user actions, user mental model, help from the AI assistant, product and task information, and user demographics. Those who used the text assistant asked more questions, but the question lengths were similar. The text assistant was perceived as significantly more efficient, but both were rated equally in satisfaction and trust. We also provide design considerations for future conversational AI assistants for UX evaluation.
summary: AI is promising in assisting UX evaluators with analyzing usability tests, but its judgments are typically presented as non-interactive visualizations. Interactive conversational assistants provide a Q&A dynamic that may improve analysis efficiency and evaluator autonomy. To understand the full range of analysis-related questions, we conducted a Wizard-of-Oz design probe study with 20 participants who interacted with simulated AI assistants via text or voice. We found that participants asked for five categories of information: user actions, user mental model, help from the AI assistant, product and task information, and user demographics. Those who used the text assistant asked more questions, but the question lengths were similar. The text assistant was perceived as significantly more efficient, but both were rated equally in satisfaction and trust. We also provide design considerations for future conversational AI assistants for UX evaluation.
abstract_zh: 人工智能有望帮助用户体验评估者分析可用性测试，但其判断通常以非交互式可视化形式呈现。评估人员可能对测试录音有疑问，但无法提出。交互式对话助理提供动态问答，可以提高分析效率和评估者的自主权。为了全面了解与分析相关的问题，我们对 20 名参与者进行了绿野仙踪设计探索研究，他们通过文本或语音与模拟 AI 助手进行交互。我们发现参与者要求五类信息：用户操作、用户心理模型、人工智能助手的帮助、产品和任务信息以及用户人口统计数据。使用文本助手的人提出了更多问题，但问题长度相似。文本助理被认为效率明显更高，但两者在满意度和信任度方面的评价相同。我们还为未来用于用户体验评估的对话式人工智能助手提供设计考虑。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了使用对话式AI助手（语音与文本）辅助用户体验评估的可行性，分析了用户在评估过程中提出的问题类型及交互方式差异。
AI.motivation: 传统AI在用户体验评估中提供静态可视化结果，无法满足评估者动态提问需求，需通过交互式AI助手提升分析效率与自主性。
AI.method: 采用Wizard-of-Oz实验设计，招募20名参与者分别通过文本和语音与模拟AI助手交互，记录其提问行为及反馈。
AI.result: 参与者提出五类问题，文本组提问数量更多但长度相近，文本助手效率感知更高，但语音与文本在满意度和信任度上无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 未来设计对话式AI助手需考虑问题分类支持、交互效率优化及多模态体验平衡，以提升UX评估的实用性与用户接受度。

search_text: Collaboration with Conversational AI Assistants for UX Evaluation: Questions and How to Ask them (Voice vs. Text) 与对话式人工智能助手协作进行用户体验评估：问题以及如何提问（语音与文本） AI is promising in assisting UX evaluators with analyzing usability tests, but its judgments are typically presented as non-interactive visualizations. Evaluators may have questions about test recordings, but have no way of asking them. Interactive conversational assistants provide a Q&A dynamic that may improve analysis efficiency and evaluator autonomy. To understand the full range of analysis-related questions, we conducted a Wizard-of-Oz design probe study with 20 participants who interacted with simulated AI assistants via text or voice. We found that participants asked for five categories of information: user actions, user mental model, help from the AI assistant, product and task information, and user demographics. Those who used the text assistant asked more questions, but the question lengths were similar. The text assistant was perceived as significantly more efficient, but both were rated equally in satisfaction and trust. We also provide design considerations for future conversational AI assistants for UX evaluation. 人工智能有望帮助用户体验评估者分析可用性测试，但其判断通常以非交互式可视化形式呈现。评估人员可能对测试录音有疑问，但无法提出。交互式对话助理提供动态问答，可以提高分析效率和评估者的自主权。为了全面了解与分析相关的问题，我们对 20 名参与者进行了绿野仙踪设计探索研究，他们通过文本或语音与模拟 AI 助手进行交互。我们发现参与者要求五类信息：用户操作、用户心理模型、人工智能助手的帮助、产品和任务信息以及用户人口统计数据。使用文本助手的人提出了更多问题，但问题长度相似。文本助理被认为效率明显更高，但两者在满意度和信任度方面的评价相同。我们还为未来用于用户体验评估的对话式人工智能助手提供设计考虑。 该论文探讨了使用对话式AI助手（语音与文本）辅助用户体验评估的可行性，分析了用户在评估过程中提出的问题类型及交互方式差异。 Emily Kuang,Ehsan Jahangirzadeh Soure,Mingming Fan,Jian Zhao,Kristen Shinohara cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yongpeng Jiang,Yongyi Jia,Xiang Li
title: Contact-Aware Non-prehensile Robotic Manipulation for Object Retrieval in Cluttered Environments
title_zh: 用于在杂乱环境中检索物体的接触感知非抓取机器人操作
comment: submitted to 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: submitted to 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Non-prehensile manipulation methods usually use a simple end effector, e.g., a single rod, to manipulate the object. Compared to the grasping method, such an end effector is compact and flexible, and hence it can perform tasks in a constrained workspace; As a trade-off, it has relatively few degrees of freedom (DoFs), resulting in an under-actuation problem with complex constraints for planning and control. This paper proposes a new non-prehensile manipulation method for the task of object retrieval in cluttered environments, using a rod-like pusher. Specifically, a candidate trajectory in a cluttered environment is first generated with an improved Rapidly-Exploring Random Tree (RRT) planner; Then, a Model Predictive Control (MPC) scheme is applied to stabilize the slider's poses through necessary contact with obstacles. Different from existing methods, the proposed approach is with the contact-aware feature, which enables the synthesized effect of active removal of obstacles, avoidance behavior, and switching contact face for improved dexterity. Hence both the feasibility and efficiency of the task are greatly promoted. The performance of the proposed method is validated in a planar object retrieval task, where the target object, surrounded by many fixed or movable obstacles, is manipulated and isolated. Both simulation and experimental results are presented.
summary: Non-prehensile manipulation methods usually use a simple end effector, e.g., a single rod, to manipulate the object. Compared to the grasping method, such an end effector is compact and flexible, and hence it can perform tasks in a constrained workspace; As a trade-off, it has relatively few degrees of freedom (DoFs), resulting in an under-actuation problem with complex constraints for planning and control. This paper proposes a new non-prehensile manipulation method for the task of object retrieval in cluttered environments, using a rod-like pusher. Specifically, a candidate trajectory in a cluttered environment is first generated with an improved Rapidly-Exploring Random Tree (RRT) planner; Then, a Model Predictive Control (MPC) scheme is applied to stabilize the slider's poses through necessary contact with obstacles. Different from existing methods, the proposed approach is with the contact-aware feature, which enables the synthesized effect of active removal of obstacles, avoidance behavior, and switching contact face for improved dexterity. Hence both the feasibility and efficiency of the task are greatly promoted. The performance of the proposed method is validated in a planar object retrieval task, where the target object, surrounded by many fixed or movable obstacles, is manipulated and isolated. Both simulation and experimental results are presented.
abstract_zh: 非抓握操纵方法通常使用简单的末端执行器（例如单杆）来操纵物体。与抓取方法相比，这种末端执行器紧凑且灵活，因此可以在有限的工作空间中执行任务；作为权衡，它的自由度 (DoF) 相对较少，从而导致欠驱动问题，并对规划和控制产生复杂的约束。本文提出了一种新的非抓取操纵方法，用于杂乱环境中的物体检索任务，使用杆状推动器。具体来说，首先使用改进的快速探索随机树（RRT）规划器生成杂乱环境中的候选轨迹；然后，应用模型预测控制（MPC）方案通过与障碍物的必要接触来稳定滑块的姿势。与现有方法不同，该方法具有接触感知功能，可以实现主动清除障碍物、回避行为和切换接触面以提高灵活性的综合效果。从而大大提高了任务的可行性和效率。该方法的性能在平面对象检索任务中得到验证，其中被许多固定或可移动障碍物包围的目标对象被操纵和隔离。给出了模拟和实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种接触感知的非抓取式机器人操作方法，用于在杂乱环境中检索目标物体。
AI.motivation: 非抓取式操作方法因末端执行器自由度有限，导致在复杂约束下的规划与控制存在不足，需提升在杂乱环境中避障与操作的灵活性。
AI.method: 改进RRT算法生成候选轨迹，并结合模型预测控制（MPC）通过障碍物接触稳定滑块姿态，实现主动避障与接触面切换。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实验验证，该方法在平面物体检索任务中有效隔离目标物体，提升任务可行性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 接触感知特性增强了机器人在杂乱环境中的操作灵巧性，为非抓取式操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kazuma Kobayashi,Lin Gu,Ryuichiro Hataya,Takaaki Mizuno,Mototaka Miyake,Hirokazu Watanabe,Masamichi Takahashi,Yasuyuki Takamizawa,Yukihiro Yoshida,Satoshi Nakamura,Nobuji Kouno,Amina Bolatkan,Yusuke Kurose,Tatsuya Harada,Ryuji Hamamoto
title: Sketch-based Medical Image Retrieval
title_zh: 基于草图的医学图像检索
abstract: The amount of medical images stored in hospitals is increasing faster than ever; however, utilizing the accumulated medical images has been limited. This is because existing content-based medical image retrieval (CBMIR) systems usually require example images to construct query vectors; nevertheless, example images cannot always be prepared. Besides, there can be images with rare characteristics that make it difficult to find similar example images, which we call isolated samples. Here, we introduce a novel sketch-based medical image retrieval (SBMIR) system that enables users to find images of interest without example images. The key idea lies in feature decomposition of medical images, whereby the entire feature of a medical image can be decomposed into and reconstructed from normal and abnormal features. By extending this idea, our SBMIR system provides an easy-to-use two-step graphical user interface: users first select a template image to specify a normal feature and then draw a semantic sketch of the disease on the template image to represent an abnormal feature. Subsequently, it integrates the two kinds of input to construct a query vector and retrieves reference images with the closest reference vectors. Using two datasets, ten healthcare professionals with various clinical backgrounds participated in the user test for evaluation. As a result, our SBMIR system enabled users to overcome previous challenges, including image retrieval based on fine-grained image characteristics, image retrieval without example images, and image retrieval for isolated samples. Our SBMIR system achieves flexible medical image retrieval on demand, thereby expanding the utility of medical image databases.
summary: The amount of medical images stored in hospitals is increasing faster than ever; however, utilizing the accumulated medical images has been limited. This is because existing content-based medical image retrieval (CBMIR) systems usually require example images to construct query vectors; nevertheless, example images cannot always be prepared. Besides, there can be images with rare characteristics that make it difficult to find similar example images, which we call isolated samples. Here, we introduce a novel sketch-based medical image retrieval (SBMIR) system that enables users to find images of interest without example images. The key idea lies in feature decomposition of medical images, whereby the entire feature of a medical image can be decomposed into and reconstructed from normal and abnormal features. By extending this idea, our SBMIR system provides an easy-to-use two-step graphical user interface: users first select a template image to specify a normal feature and then draw a semantic sketch of the disease on the template image to represent an abnormal feature. Subsequently, it integrates the two kinds of input to construct a query vector and retrieves reference images with the closest reference vectors. Using two datasets, ten healthcare professionals with various clinical backgrounds participated in the user test for evaluation. As a result, our SBMIR system enabled users to overcome previous challenges, including image retrieval based on fine-grained image characteristics, image retrieval without example images, and image retrieval for isolated samples. Our SBMIR system achieves flexible medical image retrieval on demand, thereby expanding the utility of medical image databases.
abstract_zh: 医院存储的医学图像数量比以往任何时候都增长得更快；然而，积累的医学图像的利用受到限制。这是因为现有的基于内容的医学图像检索（CBMIR）系统通常需要示例图像来构建查询向量；然而，并不总是能够准备好示例图像。此外，可能存在具有稀有特征的图像，使得很难找到相似的示例图像，我们将其称为孤立样本。在这里，我们介绍了一种新颖的基于草图的医学图像检索（SBMIR）系统，该系统使用户能够在没有示例图像的情况下找到感兴趣的图像。关键思想在于医学图像的特征分解，从而可以将医学图像的整个特征分解为正常特征和异常特征并从中重建。通过扩展这个想法，我们的SBMIR系统提供了一个易于使用的两步图形用户界面：用户首先选择模板图像来指定正常特征，然后在模板图像上绘制疾病的语义草图来表示异常特征。随后，它集成两种输入以构造查询向量并检索具有最接近参考向量的参考图像。使用两个数据集，十名具有不同临床背景的医疗保健专业人员参与了用户测试进行评估。因此，我们的 SBMIR 系统使用户能够克服之前的挑战，包括基于细粒度图像特征的图像检索、无示例图像的图像检索以及孤立样本的图像检索。我们的SBMIR系统实现了灵活的医学图像按需检索，从而扩展了医学图像数据库的效用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于草图的医学图像检索系统（SBMIR），允许用户在没有示例图像的情况下通过绘制疾病草图进行图像检索。
AI.motivation: 现有基于内容的医学图像检索系统依赖示例图像构建查询向量，但示例图像难以获取且无法处理罕见病例（孤立样本），限制了医学图像数据库的利用。
AI.method: 通过医学图像的特征分解，将正常特征与异常特征分离。用户首先选择模板图像指定正常特征，再在模板上绘制疾病草图表示异常特征，系统整合两种输入生成查询向量进行检索。
AI.result: 用户测试显示，该系统有效解决了细粒度特征检索、无示例图像检索及孤立样本检索的难题，提升了医学图像检索的灵活性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: SBMIR系统通过草图输入扩展了医学图像数据库的应用场景，为临床提供了更高效的图像检索解决方案。

search_text: Sketch-based Medical Image Retrieval 基于草图的医学图像检索 The amount of medical images stored in hospitals is increasing faster than ever; however, utilizing the accumulated medical images has been limited. This is because existing content-based medical image retrieval (CBMIR) systems usually require example images to construct query vectors; nevertheless, example images cannot always be prepared. Besides, there can be images with rare characteristics that make it difficult to find similar example images, which we call isolated samples. Here, we introduce a novel sketch-based medical image retrieval (SBMIR) system that enables users to find images of interest without example images. The key idea lies in feature decomposition of medical images, whereby the entire feature of a medical image can be decomposed into and reconstructed from normal and abnormal features. By extending this idea, our SBMIR system provides an easy-to-use two-step graphical user interface: users first select a template image to specify a normal feature and then draw a semantic sketch of the disease on the template image to represent an abnormal feature. Subsequently, it integrates the two kinds of input to construct a query vector and retrieves reference images with the closest reference vectors. Using two datasets, ten healthcare professionals with various clinical backgrounds participated in the user test for evaluation. As a result, our SBMIR system enabled users to overcome previous challenges, including image retrieval based on fine-grained image characteristics, image retrieval without example images, and image retrieval for isolated samples. Our SBMIR system achieves flexible medical image retrieval on demand, thereby expanding the utility of medical image databases. 医院存储的医学图像数量比以往任何时候都增长得更快；然而，积累的医学图像的利用受到限制。这是因为现有的基于内容的医学图像检索（CBMIR）系统通常需要示例图像来构建查询向量；然而，并不总是能够准备好示例图像。此外，可能存在具有稀有特征的图像，使得很难找到相似的示例图像，我们将其称为孤立样本。在这里，我们介绍了一种新颖的基于草图的医学图像检索（SBMIR）系统，该系统使用户能够在没有示例图像的情况下找到感兴趣的图像。关键思想在于医学图像的特征分解，从而可以将医学图像的整个特征分解为正常特征和异常特征并从中重建。通过扩展这个想法，我们的SBMIR系统提供了一个易于使用的两步图形用户界面：用户首先选择模板图像来指定正常特征，然后在模板图像上绘制疾病的语义草图来表示异常特征。随后，它集成两种输入以构造查询向量并检索具有最接近参考向量的参考图像。使用两个数据集，十名具有不同临床背景的医疗保健专业人员参与了用户测试进行评估。因此，我们的 SBMIR 系统使用户能够克服之前的挑战，包括基于细粒度图像特征的图像检索、无示例图像的图像检索以及孤立样本的图像检索。我们的SBMIR系统实现了灵活的医学图像按需检索，从而扩展了医学图像数据库的效用。 本文提出了一种基于草图的医学图像检索系统（SBMIR），允许用户在没有示例图像的情况下通过绘制疾病草图进行图像检索。 Kazuma Kobayashi,Lin Gu,Ryuichiro Hataya,Takaaki Mizuno,Mototaka Miyake,Hirokazu Watanabe,Masamichi Takahashi,Yasuyuki Takamizawa,Yukihiro Yoshida,Satoshi Nakamura,Nobuji Kouno,Amina Bolatkan,Yusuke Kurose,Tatsuya Harada,Ryuji Hamamoto cs.CV

authors_text: Qi Yang,Jesus G. Cruz-Garza,Saleh Kalantari
title: MindSculpt: Using a Brain-Computer Interface to Enable Designers to Create Diverse Geometries by Thinking
title_zh: MindSculpt：利用脑机接口让设计师通过思考创造多样化的几何形状
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 41st Annual Conference of the Association for Computer Aided Design in Architecture (ACADIA 2021)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 41st Annual Conference of the Association for Computer Aided Design in Architecture (ACADIA 2021)
abstract: MindSculpt enables users to generate a wide range of hybrid geometries in Grasshopper in real time simply by thinking about those geometries. This design tool combines a brain-computer interface (BCI) with the parametric design platform Grasshopper, creating an intuitive design workflow that shortens the latency between ideation and implementation compared to traditional computer-aided design tools based on mouse-and-keyboard paradigms. The project arises from transdisciplinary research between neuroscience and architecture, with the goal of building a cyber-human collaborative tool that is capable of leveraging the complex and fluid nature of thinking in the design process. MindSculpt applies a supervised machine-learning approach, based on the support vector machine model (SVM), to identify patterns of brain waves that occur in EEG data when participants mentally rotate four different solid geometries. The researchers tested MindSculpt with participants who had no prior experience in design and found that the tool was enjoyable to use and could contribute to design ideation and artistic endeavors.
summary: MindSculpt enables users to generate a wide range of hybrid geometries in Grasshopper in real time simply by thinking about those geometries. This design tool combines a brain-computer interface (BCI) with the parametric design platform Grasshopper, creating an intuitive design workflow that shortens the latency between ideation and implementation compared to traditional computer-aided design tools based on mouse-and-keyboard paradigms. The project arises from transdisciplinary research between neuroscience and architecture, with the goal of building a cyber-human collaborative tool that is capable of leveraging the complex and fluid nature of thinking in the design process. MindSculpt applies a supervised machine-learning approach, based on the support vector machine model (SVM), to identify patterns of brain waves that occur in EEG data when participants mentally rotate four different solid geometries. The researchers tested MindSculpt with participants who had no prior experience in design and found that the tool was enjoyable to use and could contribute to design ideation and artistic endeavors.
abstract_zh: MindSculpt 使用户只需思考这些几何图形即可在 Grasshopper 中实时生成各种混合几何图形。该设计工具将脑机接口 (BCI) 与参数化设计平台 Grasshopper 相结合，创建直观的设计工作流程，与基于鼠标和键盘范例的传统计算机辅助设计工具相比，缩短了构思和实现之间的延迟。该项目源于神经科学和建筑学之间的跨学科研究，其目标是构建一个网络人类协作工具，能够在设计过程中利用思维的复杂性和流动性。 MindSculpt 应用基于支持向量机模型 (SVM) 的监督机器学习方法来识别当参与者在心里旋转四种不同的实体几何形状时脑电图数据中出现的脑电波模式。研究人员对没有设计经验的参与者测试了 MindSculpt，发现该工具使用起来很有趣，并且可以为设计构思和艺术创作做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 开发MindSculpt工具，结合脑机接口与Grasshopper平台，使设计师通过思维实时生成多样化几何结构。
AI.motivation: 传统设计工具存在构思与实现延迟，跨学科研究旨在利用思维复杂性提升设计流程效率。
AI.method: 采用支持向量机（SVM）监督学习模型，分析参与者脑电波数据，识别与几何体心理旋转相关的脑波模式。
AI.result: 测试表明工具易于使用，能有效辅助设计构思与艺术创作，且对无设计经验者友好。
AI.conclusion: 验证了BCI在设计领域的应用潜力，推动了人机协作设计流程的创新。

authors_text: Yingxiao Du,Jianxin Wu
title: No One Left Behind: Improving the Worst Categories in Long-Tailed Learning
title_zh: 没有人掉队：改善长尾学习中最差的类别
abstract: Unlike the case when using a balanced training dataset, the per-class recall (i.e., accuracy) of neural networks trained with an imbalanced dataset are known to vary a lot from category to category. The convention in long-tailed recognition is to manually split all categories into three subsets and report the average accuracy within each subset. We argue that under such an evaluation setting, some categories are inevitably sacrificed. On one hand, focusing on the average accuracy on a balanced test set incurs little penalty even if some worst performing categories have zero accuracy. On the other hand, classes in the "Few" subset do not necessarily perform worse than those in the "Many" or "Medium" subsets. We therefore advocate to focus more on improving the lowest recall among all categories and the harmonic mean of all recall values. Specifically, we propose a simple plug-in method that is applicable to a wide range of methods. By simply re-training the classifier of an existing pre-trained model with our proposed loss function and using an optional ensemble trick that combines the predictions of the two classifiers, we achieve a more uniform distribution of recall values across categories, which leads to a higher harmonic mean accuracy while the (arithmetic) average accuracy is still high. The effectiveness of our method is justified on widely used benchmark datasets.
summary: Unlike the case when using a balanced training dataset, the per-class recall (i.e., accuracy) of neural networks trained with an imbalanced dataset are known to vary a lot from category to category. The convention in long-tailed recognition is to manually split all categories into three subsets and report the average accuracy within each subset. We argue that under such an evaluation setting, some categories are inevitably sacrificed. On one hand, focusing on the average accuracy on a balanced test set incurs little penalty even if some worst performing categories have zero accuracy. On the other hand, classes in the "Few" subset do not necessarily perform worse than those in the "Many" or "Medium" subsets. We therefore advocate to focus more on improving the lowest recall among all categories and the harmonic mean of all recall values. Specifically, we propose a simple plug-in method that is applicable to a wide range of methods. By simply re-training the classifier of an existing pre-trained model with our proposed loss function and using an optional ensemble trick that combines the predictions of the two classifiers, we achieve a more uniform distribution of recall values across categories, which leads to a higher harmonic mean accuracy while the (arithmetic) average accuracy is still high. The effectiveness of our method is justified on widely used benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 与使用平衡训练数据集的情况不同，使用不平衡数据集训练的神经网络的每类召回率（即准确性）已知因类别而异。长尾识别的惯例是手动将所有类别分为三个子集，并报告每个子集中的平均准确度。我们认为，在这样的评估背景下，某些类别不可避免地被牺牲。一方面，即使某些表现最差的类别的准确率为零，关注平衡测试集的平均准确率也不会带来什么损失。另一方面，“少数”子集中的类不一定比“许多”或“中等”子集中的类表现更差。因此，我们主张更多地关注提高所有类别中的最低召回率以及所有召回值的调和平均值。具体来说，我们提出了一种适用于多种方法的简单插件方法。通过使用我们提出的损失函数简单地重新训练现有预训练模型的分类器，并使用结合两个分类器的预测的可选集成技巧，我们实现了跨类别的召回值的更均匀分布，这导致更高的调和平均精度，同时（算术）平均精度仍然很高。我们的方法的有效性在广泛使用的基准数据集上得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决长尾学习中类别性能差异大的问题，通过改进最差类别表现来提升整体模型效果。
AI.motivation: 传统长尾学习评估方法通过平均准确率掩盖了部分类别（如零准确率类别）的性能缺陷，且'Few'类别的表现未必劣于其他类别，需更关注最低召回率和调和平均。
AI.method: 提出一种通用插件方法，通过重新训练预训练模型的分类器（结合自定义损失函数）及可选的双分类器集成策略，实现类别召回率的均衡分布。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，召回率分布更均匀，调和平均准确率提升且保持较高算术平均准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过聚焦最差类别优化，在长尾学习任务中实现了更公平且高效的性能提升，具有广泛适用性。

motivation: 传统长尾学习评估方法通过平均准确率掩盖了部分类别（如零准确率类别）的性能缺陷，且'Few'类别的表现未必劣于其他类别，需更关注最低召回率和调和平均。
method: 提出一种通用插件方法，通过重新训练预训练模型的分类器（结合自定义损失函数）及可选的双分类器集成策略，实现类别召回率的均衡分布。
result: 在基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，召回率分布更均匀，调和平均准确率提升且保持较高算术平均准确率。
conclusion: 该方法通过聚焦最差类别优化，在长尾学习任务中实现了更公平且高效的性能提升，具有广泛适用性。
search_text: No One Left Behind: Improving the Worst Categories in Long-Tailed Learning 没有人掉队：改善长尾学习中最差的类别 Unlike the case when using a balanced training dataset, the per-class recall (i.e., accuracy) of neural networks trained with an imbalanced dataset are known to vary a lot from category to category. The convention in long-tailed recognition is to manually split all categories into three subsets and report the average accuracy within each subset. We argue that under such an evaluation setting, some categories are inevitably sacrificed. On one hand, focusing on the average accuracy on a balanced test set incurs little penalty even if some worst performing categories have zero accuracy. On the other hand, classes in the "Few" subset do not necessarily perform worse than those in the "Many" or "Medium" subsets. We therefore advocate to focus more on improving the lowest recall among all categories and the harmonic mean of all recall values. Specifically, we propose a simple plug-in method that is applicable to a wide range of methods. By simply re-training the classifier of an existing pre-trained model with our proposed loss function and using an optional ensemble trick that combines the predictions of the two classifiers, we achieve a more uniform distribution of recall values across categories, which leads to a higher harmonic mean accuracy while the (arithmetic) average accuracy is still high. The effectiveness of our method is justified on widely used benchmark datasets. 与使用平衡训练数据集的情况不同，使用不平衡数据集训练的神经网络的每类召回率（即准确性）已知因类别而异。长尾识别的惯例是手动将所有类别分为三个子集，并报告每个子集中的平均准确度。我们认为，在这样的评估背景下，某些类别不可避免地被牺牲。一方面，即使某些表现最差的类别的准确率为零，关注平衡测试集的平均准确率也不会带来什么损失。另一方面，“少数”子集中的类不一定比“许多”或“中等”子集中的类表现更差。因此，我们主张更多地关注提高所有类别中的最低召回率以及所有召回值的调和平均值。具体来说，我们提出了一种适用于多种方法的简单插件方法。通过使用我们提出的损失函数简单地重新训练现有预训练模型的分类器，并使用结合两个分类器的预测的可选集成技巧，我们实现了跨类别的召回值的更均匀分布，这导致更高的调和平均精度，同时（算术）平均精度仍然很高。我们的方法的有效性在广泛使用的基准数据集上得到了证明。 本文旨在解决长尾学习中类别性能差异大的问题，通过改进最差类别表现来提升整体模型效果。 Yingxiao Du,Jianxin Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Emily Kuang,Ruihuan Chen,Mingming Fan
title: Enhancing Older Adults' Gesture Typing Experience Using the T9 Keyboard on Small Touchscreen Devices
title_zh: 在小型触摸屏设备上使用 T9 键盘增强老年人的手势打字体验
comment: Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
comments: Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
abstract: Older adults increasingly adopt small-screen devices, but limited motor dexterity hinders their ability to type effectively. While a 9-key (T9) keyboard allocates larger space to each key, it is shared by multiple consecutive letters. Consequently, users must interrupt their gestures when typing consecutive letters, leading to inefficiencies and poor user experience. Thus, we proposed a novel keyboard that leverages the currently unused key 1 to duplicate letters from the previous key, allowing the entry of consecutive letters without interruptions. A user study with 12 older adults showed that it significantly outperformed the T9 with wiggle gesture in typing speed, KSPC, insertion errors, and deletes per word while achieving comparable performance as the conventional T9. Repeating the typing tasks with 12 young adults found that the advantages of the novel T9 were consistent or enhanced. We also provide error analysis and design considerations for improving gesture typing on T9 for older adults.
summary: Older adults increasingly adopt small-screen devices, but limited motor dexterity hinders their ability to type effectively. While a 9-key (T9) keyboard allocates larger space to each key, it is shared by multiple consecutive letters. Consequently, users must interrupt their gestures when typing consecutive letters, leading to inefficiencies and poor user experience. Thus, we proposed a novel keyboard that leverages the currently unused key 1 to duplicate letters from the previous key, allowing the entry of consecutive letters without interruptions. A user study with 12 older adults showed that it significantly outperformed the T9 with wiggle gesture in typing speed, KSPC, insertion errors, and deletes per word while achieving comparable performance as the conventional T9. Repeating the typing tasks with 12 young adults found that the advantages of the novel T9 were consistent or enhanced. We also provide error analysis and design considerations for improving gesture typing on T9 for older adults.
abstract_zh: 老年人越来越多地采用小屏幕设备，但有限的运动灵活性阻碍了他们有效打字的能力。虽然 9 键 (T9) 键盘为每个键分配了更大的空间，但它由多个连续字母共享。因此，用户在输入连续字母时必须中断手势，从而导致效率低下和用户体验不佳。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的键盘，它利用当前未使用的键 1 来复制前一个键的字母，从而允许不间断地输入连续字母。一项针对 12 名老年人的用户研究表明，它在打字速度、KSPC、插入错误和每个单词的删除方面显着优于带有摆动手势的 T9，同时实现了与传统 T9 相当的性能。对 12 名年轻人重复打字任务发现，新颖的 T9 的优势是一致的或增强的。我们还提供错误分析和设计注意事项，以改进老年人在 T9 上的手势打字。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的T9键盘设计，通过利用空闲按键实现连续字母输入，提升老年人在小型触摸屏设备上的手势输入体验。
AI.motivation: 老年人因运动协调性下降，在小屏设备上使用传统T9键盘时需频繁中断手势输入，导致效率低下且体验不佳。
AI.method: 设计新型T9键盘，通过复用按键1实现前序按键字母的重复输入，允许连续字母无中断输入，并进行用户实验验证。
AI.result: 12名老年用户测试显示，新键盘在输入速度、KSPC、插入错误和每词删除次数上显著优于传统T9，且与年轻人表现相当；错误分析提供了优化设计依据。
AI.conclusion: 该改进方案有效提升老年人手势输入效率与准确性，且对年轻人同样适用，为小屏设备输入法设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Rui Xu,Zhi Liu,Yong Luo,Han Hu,Li Shen,Bo Du,Kaiming Kuang,Jiancheng Yang
title: SGDA: Towards 3D Universal Pulmonary Nodule Detection via Slice Grouped Domain Attention
title_zh: SGDA：通过切片分组域注意力实现 3D 通用肺结节检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Computational Biology and Bioinformatics
comments: Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Computational Biology and Bioinformatics
abstract: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death worldwide. The best solution for lung cancer is to diagnose the pulmonary nodules in the early stage, which is usually accomplished with the aid of thoracic computed tomography (CT). As deep learning thrives, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been introduced into pulmonary nodule detection to help doctors in this labor-intensive task and demonstrated to be very effective. However, the current pulmonary nodule detection methods are usually domain-specific, and cannot satisfy the requirement of working in diverse real-world scenarios. To address this issue, we propose a slice grouped domain attention (SGDA) module to enhance the generalization capability of the pulmonary nodule detection networks. This attention module works in the axial, coronal, and sagittal directions. In each direction, we divide the input feature into groups, and for each group, we utilize a universal adapter bank to capture the feature subspaces of the domains spanned by all pulmonary nodule datasets. Then the bank outputs are combined from the perspective of domain to modulate the input group. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SGDA enables substantially better multi-domain pulmonary nodule detection performance compared with the state-of-the-art multi-domain learning methods.
summary: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death worldwide. The best solution for lung cancer is to diagnose the pulmonary nodules in the early stage, which is usually accomplished with the aid of thoracic computed tomography (CT). As deep learning thrives, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been introduced into pulmonary nodule detection to help doctors in this labor-intensive task and demonstrated to be very effective. However, the current pulmonary nodule detection methods are usually domain-specific, and cannot satisfy the requirement of working in diverse real-world scenarios. To address this issue, we propose a slice grouped domain attention (SGDA) module to enhance the generalization capability of the pulmonary nodule detection networks. This attention module works in the axial, coronal, and sagittal directions. In each direction, we divide the input feature into groups, and for each group, we utilize a universal adapter bank to capture the feature subspaces of the domains spanned by all pulmonary nodule datasets. Then the bank outputs are combined from the perspective of domain to modulate the input group. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SGDA enables substantially better multi-domain pulmonary nodule detection performance compared with the state-of-the-art multi-domain learning methods.
abstract_zh: 肺癌是全世界癌症死亡的主要原因。肺癌的最佳解决方案是早期诊断肺部结节，这通常是借助胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）来完成的。随着深度学习的蓬勃发展，卷积神经网络（CNN）已被引入肺结节检测中，以帮助医生完成这项劳动密集型任务，并被证明非常有效。然而，当前的肺结节检测方法通常是特定领域的，不能满足在不同的现实场景中工作的要求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了切片分组域注意（SGDA）模块来增强肺结节检测网络的泛化能力。该注意力模块在轴向、冠状和矢状方向上工作。在每个方向上，我们将输入特征分组，对于每个组，我们利用通用适配器库来捕获所有肺结节数据集跨越的域的特征子空间。然后从域的角度组合bank的输出来调制输入组。大量实验表明，与最先进的多域学习方法相比，SGDA 能够实现更好的多域肺结节检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SGDA的切片分组领域注意模块，旨在提升肺结节检测模型在不同领域间的泛化能力，实现三维通用肺结节检测。
AI.motivation: 当前肺结节检测方法通常局限于特定领域，难以适应真实世界中多样的临床场景，亟需提升模型的跨领域泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过在轴向、冠向和矢向三个方向对输入特征进行分组，利用通用适配器库捕捉所有肺结节数据集的领域特征子空间，并从领域视角融合输出以调制输入分组。
AI.result: 实验表明，SGDA在多领域肺结节检测任务中显著优于现有最先进方法，提升了跨领域场景下的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: SGDA模块通过多方向特征分组与领域自适应机制，有效增强了肺结节检测模型的通用性，为跨领域医学影像分析提供了新思路。

In each direction, we divide the input feature into groups, and for each group, we utilize a universal adapter bank to capture the feature subspaces of the domains spanned by all pulmonary nodule datasets. Then the bank outputs are combined from the perspective of domain to modulate the input group. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SGDA enables substantially better multi-domain pulmonary nodule detection performance compared with the state-of-the-art multi-domain learning methods. 肺癌是全世界癌症死亡的主要原因。肺癌的最佳解决方案是早期诊断肺部结节，这通常是借助胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）来完成的。随着深度学习的蓬勃发展，卷积神经网络（CNN）已被引入肺结节检测中，以帮助医生完成这项劳动密集型任务，并被证明非常有效。然而，当前的肺结节检测方法通常是特定领域的，不能满足在不同的现实场景中工作的要求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了切片分组域注意（SGDA）模块来增强肺结节检测网络的泛化能力。该注意力模块在轴向、冠状和矢状方向上工作。在每个方向上，我们将输入特征分组，对于每个组，我们利用通用适配器库来捕获所有肺结节数据集跨越的域的特征子空间。然后从域的角度组合bank的输出来调制输入组。大量实验表明，与最先进的多域学习方法相比，SGDA 能够实现更好的多域肺结节检测性能。 本文提出了一种名为SGDA的切片分组领域注意模块，旨在提升肺结节检测模型在不同领域间的泛化能力，实现三维通用肺结节检测。 Rui Xu,Zhi Liu,Yong Luo,Han Hu,Li Shen,Bo Du,Kaiming Kuang,Jiancheng Yang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiqiang Liu,Wenjian Yu
title: Computing Effective Resistances on Large Graphs Based on Approximate Inverse of Cholesky Factor
title_zh: 基于 Cholesky 因子近似逆计算大图上的有效电阻
comment: 7 pages, 1 figure, and 2 tables
comments: 7 pages, 1 figure, and 2 tables
abstract: Effective resistance, which originates from the field of circuits analysis, is an important graph distance in spectral graph theory. It has found numerous applications in various areas, such as graph data mining, spectral graph sparsification, circuits simulation, etc. However, computing effective resistances accurately can be intractable and we still lack efficient methods for estimating effective resistances on large graphs. In this work, we propose an efficient algorithm to compute effective resistances on general weighted graphs, based on a sparse approximate inverse technique. Compared with a recent competitor, the proposed algorithm shows several hundreds of speedups and also one to two orders of magnitude improvement in the accuracy of results. Incorporating the proposed algorithm with the graph sparsification based power grid (PG) reduction framework, we develop a fast PG reduction method, which achieves an average 6.4X speedup in the reduction time without loss of reduction accuracy. In the applications of power grid transient analysis and DC incremental analysis, the proposed method enables 1.7X and 2.5X speedup of overall time compared to using the PG reduction based on accurate effective resistances, without increase in the error of solution.
summary: Effective resistance, which originates from the field of circuits analysis, is an important graph distance in spectral graph theory. It has found numerous applications in various areas, such as graph data mining, spectral graph sparsification, circuits simulation, etc. However, computing effective resistances accurately can be intractable and we still lack efficient methods for estimating effective resistances on large graphs. In this work, we propose an efficient algorithm to compute effective resistances on general weighted graphs, based on a sparse approximate inverse technique. Compared with a recent competitor, the proposed algorithm shows several hundreds of speedups and also one to two orders of magnitude improvement in the accuracy of results. Incorporating the proposed algorithm with the graph sparsification based power grid (PG) reduction framework, we develop a fast PG reduction method, which achieves an average 6.4X speedup in the reduction time without loss of reduction accuracy. In the applications of power grid transient analysis and DC incremental analysis, the proposed method enables 1.7X and 2.5X speedup of overall time compared to using the PG reduction based on accurate effective resistances, without increase in the error of solution.
abstract_zh: 有效电阻起源于电路分析领域，是谱图论中的一个重要的图距离。它在各个领域都有大量应用，例如图数据挖掘、谱图稀疏化、电路仿真等。然而，准确计算有效电阻可能很困难，而且我们仍然缺乏在大图上估计有效电阻的有效方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于稀疏近似逆技术的有效算法来计算一般加权图上的有效电阻。与最近的竞争对手相比，所提出的算法显示出数百倍的加速，并且结果的准确性也提高了一到两个数量级。将所提出的算法与基于图稀疏化的电网（PG）缩减框架相结合，我们开发了一种快速PG缩减方法，在不损失缩减精度的情况下，在缩减时间上实现了平均6.4倍的加速。在电网暂态分析和直流增量分析的应用中，与使用基于精确有效电阻的PG缩减相比，所提出的方法可以使总体时间加速1.7倍和2.5倍，并且不会增加求解的误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏近似逆Cholesky因子的高效算法，用于计算大规模图的有效电阻。
AI.motivation: 有效电阻在图谱理论及电力系统分析中具有重要意义，但传统方法在大规模图上计算效率低且精度不足。
AI.method: 采用稀疏近似逆技术对Cholesky因子进行近似，结合图稀疏化框架实现电力系统快速降阶。
AI.result: 算法较现有方法提速数百倍且精度提升1-2个数量级，电力系统降阶时间平均缩短6.4倍，暂态分析和DC增量分析整体时间分别缩短1.7倍和2.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持精度的前提下显著提升了大规模图有效电阻计算效率，为电力系统分析提供了高效工具。

authors_text: Van-Thach Do,Quang-Cuong Pham
title: Geometry-Aware Coverage Path Planning for Depowdering on Complex 3D Surfaces
title_zh: 用于复杂 3D 表面除粉的几何感知覆盖路径规划
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures
abstract: This paper presents a new approach to obtaining nearly complete coverage paths (CP) with low overlapping on 3D general surfaces using mesh models. The CP is obtained by segmenting the mesh model into a given number of clusters using constrained centroidal Voronoi tessellation (CCVT) and finding the shortest path from cluster centroids using the geodesic metric efficiently. We introduce a new cost function to harmoniously achieve uniform areas of the obtained clusters and a restriction on the variation of triangle normals during the construction of CCVTs. The obtained clusters can be used to construct high-quality viewpoints (VP) for visual coverage tasks. Here, we utilize the planned VPs as cleaning configurations to perform residual powder removal in additive manufacturing using manipulator robots. The self-occlusion of VPs and ensuring collision-free robot configurations are addressed by integrating a proposed optimization-based strategy to find a set of candidate rays for each VP into the motion planning phase. CP planning benchmarks and physical experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. We show that our approach can compute the CPs and VPs of various mesh models with a massive number of triangles within a reasonable time.
summary: This paper presents a new approach to obtaining nearly complete coverage paths (CP) with low overlapping on 3D general surfaces using mesh models. The CP is obtained by segmenting the mesh model into a given number of clusters using constrained centroidal Voronoi tessellation (CCVT) and finding the shortest path from cluster centroids using the geodesic metric efficiently. We introduce a new cost function to harmoniously achieve uniform areas of the obtained clusters and a restriction on the variation of triangle normals during the construction of CCVTs. The obtained clusters can be used to construct high-quality viewpoints (VP) for visual coverage tasks. Here, we utilize the planned VPs as cleaning configurations to perform residual powder removal in additive manufacturing using manipulator robots. The self-occlusion of VPs and ensuring collision-free robot configurations are addressed by integrating a proposed optimization-based strategy to find a set of candidate rays for each VP into the motion planning phase. CP planning benchmarks and physical experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. We show that our approach can compute the CPs and VPs of various mesh models with a massive number of triangles within a reasonable time.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用网格模型在 3D 一般表面上获得几乎完全覆盖路径 (CP) 且重叠度较低的新方法。 CP 是通过使用约束质心 Voronoi 曲面细分 (CCVT) 将网格模型分割成给定数量的簇并使用测地线度量有效地找到距簇质心的最短路径来获得的。我们引入了一种新的成本函数，以和谐地实现所获得簇的均匀面积，并在 CCVT 的构造过程中限制三角形法线的变化。获得的聚类可用于构建视觉覆盖任务的高质量视点（VP）。在这里，我们利用计划的 VP 作为清洁配置，使用机械手机器人在增材制造中去除残留粉末。通过将提出的基于优化的策略集成到运动规划阶段，为每个 VP 找到一组候选射线，从而解决了 VP 的自遮挡和确保无碰撞的机器人配置问题。进行CP规划基准和物理实验来证明所提出方法的有效性。我们表明，我们的方法可以在合理的时间内计算具有大量三角形的各种网格模型的 CP 和 VP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网格模型的几何感知覆盖路径规划方法，用于复杂3D表面上的去粉操作。
AI.motivation: 在增材制造中，复杂3D表面的去粉过程需要高效且低重叠的覆盖路径，传统方法难以满足高精度和实时性需求。
AI.method: 通过约束质心Voronoi图分割网格模型为簇，结合测地线距离计算最短路径，并引入新成本函数优化簇均匀性与法向变化限制，最终生成高质量视点用于机器人去粉路径规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能在合理时间内处理大规模三角形网格模型，生成的路径和视点有效降低了重叠率并避免了自遮挡与碰撞。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为复杂3D表面的覆盖路径规划提供了高效解决方案，适用于增材制造中的自动化去粉任务。

authors_text: Golchehr Amirkhani,Anna Goodridge,Mojtaba Esfandiari,Henry Phalen,Justin H. Ma,Iulian Iordachita,Mehran Armand
title: Design and Fabrication of a Fiber Bragg Grating Shape Sensor for Shape Reconstruction of a Continuum Manipulator
title_zh: 用于连续机械臂形状重建的光纤布拉格光栅形状传感器的设计和制造
abstract: Continuum dexterous manipulators (CDMs) are suitable for performing tasks in a constrained environment due to their high dexterity and maneuverability. Despite the inherent advantages of CDMs in minimally invasive surgery, real-time control of CDMs' shape during non-constant curvature bending is still challenging. This study presents a novel approach for the design and fabrication of a large deflection fiber Bragg grating (FBG) shape sensor embedded within the lumens inside the walls of a CDM with a large instrument channel. The shape sensor consisted of two fibers, each with three FBG nodes. A shape-sensing model was introduced to reconstruct the centerline of the CDM based on FBG wavelengths. Different experiments, including shape sensor tests and CDM shape reconstruction tests, were conducted to assess the overall accuracy of the shape sensing. The FBG sensor evaluation results revealed the linear curvature-wavelength relationship with the large curvature detection of 0.045 mm at a 90 degrees bending angle and a sensitivity of up to 5.50 nm/mm in each bending direction. The CDM's shape reconstruction experiments in a free environment demonstrated the shape tracking accuracy of 0.216+-0.126 mm for positive/negative deflections. Also, the CDM shape reconstruction error for three cases of bending with obstacles were observed to be 0.436+-0.370 mm for the proximal case, 0.485+-0.418 mm for the middle case, and 0.312+-0.261 mm for the distal case. This study indicates the adequate performance of the FBG sensor and the effectiveness of the model for tracking the shape of the large-deflection CDM with nonconstant-curvature bending for minimally-invasive orthopaedic applications.
summary: Continuum dexterous manipulators (CDMs) are suitable for performing tasks in a constrained environment due to their high dexterity and maneuverability. Despite the inherent advantages of CDMs in minimally invasive surgery, real-time control of CDMs' shape during non-constant curvature bending is still challenging. This study presents a novel approach for the design and fabrication of a large deflection fiber Bragg grating (FBG) shape sensor embedded within the lumens inside the walls of a CDM with a large instrument channel. The shape sensor consisted of two fibers, each with three FBG nodes. A shape-sensing model was introduced to reconstruct the centerline of the CDM based on FBG wavelengths. Different experiments, including shape sensor tests and CDM shape reconstruction tests, were conducted to assess the overall accuracy of the shape sensing. The FBG sensor evaluation results revealed the linear curvature-wavelength relationship with the large curvature detection of 0.045 mm at a 90 degrees bending angle and a sensitivity of up to 5.50 nm/mm in each bending direction. The CDM's shape reconstruction experiments in a free environment demonstrated the shape tracking accuracy of 0.216+-0.126 mm for positive/negative deflections. Also, the CDM shape reconstruction error for three cases of bending with obstacles were observed to be 0.436+-0.370 mm for the proximal case, 0.485+-0.418 mm for the middle case, and 0.312+-0.261 mm for the distal case. This study indicates the adequate performance of the FBG sensor and the effectiveness of the model for tracking the shape of the large-deflection CDM with nonconstant-curvature bending for minimally-invasive orthopaedic applications.
abstract_zh: 连续灵巧机械臂（CDM）由于其高灵活性和可操作性，适合在受限环境中执行任务。尽管CDM在微创手术中具有固有的优势，但在非等曲率弯曲过程中实时控制CDM的形状仍然具有挑战性。这项研究提出了一种设计和制造大偏转光纤布拉格光栅 (FBG) 形状传感器的新颖方法，该传感器嵌入具有大型仪器通道的 CDM 壁内的管腔内。形状传感器由两条光纤组成，每条光纤具有三个 FBG 节点。引入形状传感模型来基于 FBG 波长重建 CDM 的中心线。进行了不同的实验，包括形状传感器测试和 CDM 形状重建测试，以评估形状传感的整体精度。 FBG 传感器评估结果揭示了线性曲率-波长关系，90 度弯曲角度下的大曲率检测为 0.045 mm，每个弯曲方向的灵敏度高达 5.50 nm/mm。 CDM在自由环境下的形状重建实验表明，正/负偏转的形状跟踪精度为0.216+-0.126 mm。此外，观察到三个有障碍物弯曲情况的 CDM 形状重建误差，近端案例为 0.436+-0.370 mm，中间案例为 0.485+-0.418 mm，远端案例为 0.312+-0.261 mm。这项研究表明 FBG 传感器具有足够的性能，以及该模型在微创骨科应用中跟踪具有非恒定曲率弯曲的大偏转 CDM 形状的有效性。

AI.tldr: 设计并制造一种光纤光栅形状传感器，用于连续体机械臂的大变形形状重构。
AI.motivation: 连续体灵巧机械臂（CDM）在微创手术中具有高灵活性，但实时控制其非恒定曲率弯曲时的形状仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 在CDM内部嵌入包含三个FBG节点的双光纤传感器，基于FBG波长变化建立形状感知模型进行中心线重构，并通过自由环境和障碍物场景实验验证精度。
AI.result: 传感器实现0.045 mm曲率检测精度和5.50 nm/mm灵敏度，自由空间形状跟踪误差为0.216±0.126 mm，障碍物场景误差范围为0.312±0.261 mm至0.485±0.418 mm。
AI.conclusion: FBG传感器及模型能有效实现大变形非恒定曲率CDM的形状追踪，适用于微创骨科手术场景。

Despite the inherent advantages of CDMs in minimally invasive surgery, real-time control of CDMs' shape during non-constant curvature bending is still challenging. authors_text: Rin Suyama,Yoshiki Miyauchi,Atsuo Maki
title: Ship trajectory planning method for reproducing human operation at ports
title_zh: 再现港口人工操作的船舶轨迹规划方法
comment: 16 pages, 12 figures, an accepted manuscript of a published paper on Ocean Engineering
comments: 16 pages, 12 figures, an accepted manuscript of a published paper on Ocean Engineering
abstract: Among ship maneuvers, berthing/unberthing maneuvers are one of the most challenging and stressful phases for captains. Concerning burden reduction on ship operators and preventing accidents, several researches have been conducted on trajectory planning to automate berthing/unberthing. However, few studies have aimed at assisting captains in berthing/unberthing. The trajectory to be presented to the captain should be a maneuver that reproduces human captain's control characteristics. The previously proposed methods cannot explicitly reflect the motion and navigation, which human captains pay particular attention to reduce the mental burden in the trajectory planning. Herein, mild constraints to the trajectory planning method are introduced. The constraints impose certain states (position, bow heading angle, ship speed, and yaw angular velocity), to be taken approximately at any given time. The introduction of this new constraint allows imposing careful trajectory planning (e.g., in-situ turns at zero speed or a pause for safety before going astern), as if performed by a human during berthing/unberthing. The algorithm proposed herein was used to optimize the berthing/unberthing trajectories for a large car ferry. The results show that this method can generate the quantitatively equivalent trajectory recorded in the actual berthing/unberthing maneuver performed by a human captain.
summary: Among ship maneuvers, berthing/unberthing maneuvers are one of the most challenging and stressful phases for captains. Concerning burden reduction on ship operators and preventing accidents, several researches have been conducted on trajectory planning to automate berthing/unberthing. However, few studies have aimed at assisting captains in berthing/unberthing. The trajectory to be presented to the captain should be a maneuver that reproduces human captain's control characteristics. The previously proposed methods cannot explicitly reflect the motion and navigation, which human captains pay particular attention to reduce the mental burden in the trajectory planning. Herein, mild constraints to the trajectory planning method are introduced. The constraints impose certain states (position, bow heading angle, ship speed, and yaw angular velocity), to be taken approximately at any given time. The introduction of this new constraint allows imposing careful trajectory planning (e.g., in-situ turns at zero speed or a pause for safety before going astern), as if performed by a human during berthing/unberthing. The algorithm proposed herein was used to optimize the berthing/unberthing trajectories for a large car ferry. The results show that this method can generate the quantitatively equivalent trajectory recorded in the actual berthing/unberthing maneuver performed by a human captain.
abstract_zh: 在船舶操纵中，靠泊/离泊操纵是船长最具挑战性和压力的阶段之一。考虑到减轻船舶运营商的负担和防止事故，已经对自动靠泊/离泊的轨迹规划进行了多项研究。然而，很少有研究旨在协助船长靠泊/离泊。呈现给机长的轨迹应该是再现人类机长控制特性的机动。先前提出的方法不能明确地反映运动和导航，人类机长特别注意这一点，以减少轨迹规划中的精神负担。这里，引入了对轨迹规划方法的温和约束。这些约束施加了在任何给定时间近似获取的某些状态（位置、船头航向角、船速和偏航角速度）。这一新约束的引入允许实施仔细的轨迹规划（例如，以零速度原地转弯或在倒车前为了安全而暂停），就像人类在靠泊/离泊期间执行的一样。本文提出的算法用于优化大型汽车渡轮的靠泊/离泊轨迹。结果表明，该方法能够生成船长实际靠离泊操作中记录的定量等效轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种船舶靠泊/离泊轨迹规划方法，旨在生成符合人类船长操作特征的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化轨迹规划方法未能体现人类船长在靠泊时关注的运动特性，导致操作负担未有效降低且事故风险仍存。
AI.method: 通过引入位置、船头角、船速和偏航角速度等状态约束，使轨迹规划能模拟人类操作特征（如零速原地转向、倒车前安全停顿等）。
AI.result: 该算法成功生成与实际人类船长操作轨迹量化等效的靠泊/离泊路径，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过约束条件有效复现人类操作特征，为船舶自动化操作提供了更符合人因工程的轨迹规划方案。

authors_text: Oguzhan Akcin,Po-han Li,Shubhankar Agarwal,Sandeep Chinchali
title: Data Games: A Game-Theoretic Approach to Swarm Robotic Data Collection
title_zh: 数据游戏：群体机器人数据收集的博弈论方法
comment: Accepted to CoRL 2022
comments: Accepted to CoRL 2022
abstract: Fleets of networked autonomous vehicles (AVs) collect terabytes of sensory data, which is often transmitted to central servers (the ''cloud'') for training machine learning (ML) models. Ideally, these fleets should upload all their data, especially from rare operating contexts, in order to train robust ML models. However, this is infeasible due to prohibitive network bandwidth and data labeling costs. Instead, we propose a cooperative data sampling strategy where geo-distributed AVs collaborate to collect a diverse ML training dataset in the cloud. Since the AVs have a shared objective but minimal information about each other's local data distribution and perception model, we can naturally cast cooperative data collection as an $N$-player mathematical game. We show that our cooperative sampling strategy uses minimal information to converge to a centralized oracle policy with complete information about all AVs. Moreover, we theoretically characterize the performance benefits of our game-theoretic strategy compared to greedy sampling. Finally, we experimentally demonstrate that our method outperforms standard benchmarks by up to $21.9\%$ on 4 perception datasets, including for autonomous driving in adverse weather conditions. Crucially, our experimental results on real-world datasets closely align with our theoretical guarantees.
summary: Fleets of networked autonomous vehicles (AVs) collect terabytes of sensory data, which is often transmitted to central servers (the ''cloud'') for training machine learning (ML) models. Ideally, these fleets should upload all their data, especially from rare operating contexts, in order to train robust ML models. However, this is infeasible due to prohibitive network bandwidth and data labeling costs. Instead, we propose a cooperative data sampling strategy where geo-distributed AVs collaborate to collect a diverse ML training dataset in the cloud. Since the AVs have a shared objective but minimal information about each other's local data distribution and perception model, we can naturally cast cooperative data collection as an $N$-player mathematical game. We show that our cooperative sampling strategy uses minimal information to converge to a centralized oracle policy with complete information about all AVs. Moreover, we theoretically characterize the performance benefits of our game-theoretic strategy compared to greedy sampling. Finally, we experimentally demonstrate that our method outperforms standard benchmarks by up to $21.9\%$ on 4 perception datasets, including for autonomous driving in adverse weather conditions. Crucially, our experimental results on real-world datasets closely align with our theoretical guarantees.
abstract_zh: 联网自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 车队收集数 TB 的传感数据，这些数据通常会传输到中央服务器（“云”）以训练机器学习 (ML) 模型。理想情况下，这些车队应该上传所有数据，尤其是来自罕见操作环境的数据，以便训练强大的机器学习模型。然而，由于网络带宽和数据标记成本过高，这是不可行的。相反，我们提出了一种协作数据采样策略，其中地理分布式 AV 协作在云中收集多样化的 ML 训练数据集。由于 AV 具有共享的目标，但有关彼此本地数据分布和感知模型的信息很少，因此我们自然可以将合作数据收集视为 $N$ 玩家的数学游戏。我们展示了我们的合作采样策略使用最少的信息来收敛到一个集中的预言机策略，其中包含有关所有 AV 的完整信息。此外，我们从理论上描述了我们的博弈论策略与贪婪采样相比的性能优势。最后，我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在 4 个感知数据集（包括恶劣天气条件下的自动驾驶数据集）上比标准基准高出高达 21.9\%$。至关重要的是，我们在现实世界数据集上的实验结果与我们的理论保证紧密一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论的合作数据采样策略，解决自动驾驶车辆因网络带宽和标注成本限制无法上传全部数据的问题，通过地理分布的车辆协作收集多样化训练数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因网络带宽限制和数据标注成本，无法上传自动驾驶车辆在罕见场景下的关键数据，导致机器学习模型鲁棒性不足，需设计高效的数据收集策略。
AI.method: 将合作数据收集建模为N玩家数学博弈，利用车辆间有限信息交互收敛至集中式最优策略，并通过理论分析对比贪婪采样方法的性能优势。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在4个感知数据集（含恶劣天气自动驾驶场景）上优于基准方法21.9%，且实际效果与理论分析高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 博弈论框架有效平衡了分布式车辆的数据收集效率与多样性，为云端训练鲁棒机器学习模型提供了可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: Data Games: A Game-Theoretic Approach to Swarm Robotic Data Collection 数据游戏：群体机器人数据收集的博弈论方法 Fleets of networked autonomous vehicles (AVs) collect terabytes of sensory data, which is often transmitted to central servers (the ''cloud'') for training machine learning (ML) models. Ideally, these fleets should upload all their data, especially from rare operating contexts, in order to train robust ML models. However, this is infeasible due to prohibitive network bandwidth and data labeling costs. Instead, we propose a cooperative data sampling strategy where geo-distributed AVs collaborate to collect a diverse ML training dataset in the cloud. Since the AVs have a shared objective but minimal information about each other's local data distribution and perception model, we can naturally cast cooperative data collection as an $N$-player mathematical game. We show that our cooperative sampling strategy uses minimal information to converge to a centralized oracle policy with complete information about all AVs. Moreover, we theoretically characterize the performance benefits of our game-theoretic strategy compared to greedy sampling. Finally, we experimentally demonstrate that our method outperforms standard benchmarks by up to $21.9\%$ on 4 perception datasets, including for autonomous driving in adverse weather conditions. Crucially, our experimental results on real-world datasets closely align with our theoretical guarantees. 联网自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 车队收集数 TB 的传感数据，这些数据通常会传输到中央服务器（“云”）以训练机器学习 (ML) 模型。理想情况下，这些车队应该上传所有数据，尤其是来自罕见操作环境的数据，以便训练强大的机器学习模型。然而，由于网络带宽和数据标记成本过高，这是不可行的。相反，我们提出了一种协作数据采样策略，其中地理分布式 AV 协作在云中收集多样化的 ML 训练数据集。由于 AV 具有共享的目标，但有关彼此本地数据分布和感知模型的信息很少，因此我们自然可以将合作数据收集视为 $N$ 玩家的数学游戏。我们展示了我们的合作采样策略使用最少的信息来收敛到一个集中的预言机策略，其中包含有关所有 AV 的完整信息。此外，我们从理论上描述了我们的博弈论策略与贪婪采样相比的性能优势。最后，我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在 4 个感知数据集（包括恶劣天气条件下的自动驾驶数据集）上比标准基准高出高达 21.9\%$。至关重要的是，我们在现实世界数据集上的实验结果与我们的理论保证紧密一致。 本文提出一种基于博弈论的合作数据采样策略，解决自动驾驶车辆因网络带宽和标注成本限制无法上传全部数据的问题，通过地理分布的车辆协作收集多样化训练数据。 Oguzhan Akcin,Po-han Li,Shubhankar Agarwal,Sandeep Chinchali cs.AI,cs.MA,cs.RO

authors_text: Jinjie Ni,Yukun Ma,Wen Wang,Qian Chen,Dianwen Ng,Han Lei,Trung Hieu Nguyen,Chong Zhang,Bin Ma,Erik Cambria
title: Adaptive Knowledge Distillation between Text and Speech Pre-trained Models
title_zh: 文本和语音预训练模型之间的自适应知识蒸馏
abstract: Learning on a massive amount of speech corpus leads to the recent success of many self-supervised speech models. With knowledge distillation, these models may also benefit from the knowledge encoded by language models that are pre-trained on rich sources of texts. The distillation process, however, is challenging due to the modal disparity between textual and speech embedding spaces. This paper studies metric-based distillation to align the embedding space of text and speech with only a small amount of data without modifying the model structure. Since the semantic and granularity gap between text and speech has been omitted in literature, which impairs the distillation, we propose the Prior-informed Adaptive knowledge Distillation (PAD) that adaptively leverages text/speech units of variable granularity and prior distributions to achieve better global and local alignments between text and speech pre-trained models. We evaluate on three spoken language understanding benchmarks to show that PAD is more effective in transferring linguistic knowledge than other metric-based distillation approaches.
summary: Learning on a massive amount of speech corpus leads to the recent success of many self-supervised speech models. With knowledge distillation, these models may also benefit from the knowledge encoded by language models that are pre-trained on rich sources of texts. The distillation process, however, is challenging due to the modal disparity between textual and speech embedding spaces. This paper studies metric-based distillation to align the embedding space of text and speech with only a small amount of data without modifying the model structure. Since the semantic and granularity gap between text and speech has been omitted in literature, which impairs the distillation, we propose the Prior-informed Adaptive knowledge Distillation (PAD) that adaptively leverages text/speech units of variable granularity and prior distributions to achieve better global and local alignments between text and speech pre-trained models. We evaluate on three spoken language understanding benchmarks to show that PAD is more effective in transferring linguistic knowledge than other metric-based distillation approaches.
abstract_zh: 对大量语音语料库的学习导致了许多自监督语音模型最近的成功。通过知识蒸馏，这些模型还可以受益于在丰富的文本源上预先训练的语言模型编码的知识。然而，由于文本和语音嵌入空间之间的模态差异，蒸馏过程具有挑战性。本文研究基于度量的蒸馏，在不修改模型结构的情况下仅用少量数据来对齐文本和语音的嵌入空间。由于文献中忽略了文本和语音之间的语义和粒度差距，这损害了蒸馏，因此我们提出了先验自适应知识蒸馏（PAD），它自适应地利用可变粒度和先验分布的文本/语音单元，以在文本和语音预训练模型之间实现更好的全局和局部对齐。我们对三个口语理解基准进行评估，结果表明 PAD 在传递语言知识方面比其他基于度量的蒸馏方法更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文研究文本与语音预训练模型间的自适应知识蒸馏方法，解决跨模态嵌入空间对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视文本与语音在语义和粒度上的差异，导致知识蒸馏效果受限，需提出更有效的跨模态对齐方案。
AI.method: 提出Prior-informed Adaptive Distillation（PAD）方法，通过自适应利用多粒度文本/语音单元及先验分布实现跨模态全局与局部对齐。
AI.result: 在三个口语语言理解基准测试中，PAD相较其他度量蒸馏方法展现出更优的跨模态知识迁移效果。
AI.conclusion: PAD通过建模跨模态语义粒度差异，为文本与语音预训练模型间的知识蒸馏提供了更有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Kaiyuan Hu,Yili Jin,Haowen Yang,Junhua Liu,Fangxin Wang
title: FSVVD: A Dataset of Full Scene Volumetric Video
title_zh: FSVVD：全场景立体视频数据集
comment: Accepted by MMSys'23 Open Dataset and Software Track. The dataset and additional tools can be accessed via https://cuhksz-inml.github.io/full_scene_volumetric_video_dataset/
comments: Accepted by MMSys'23 Open Dataset and Software Track. The dataset and additional tools can be accessed via https://cuhksz-inml.github.io/full_scene_volumetric_video_dataset/
abstract: Recent years have witnessed a rapid development of immersive multimedia which bridges the gap between the real world and virtual space. Volumetric videos, as an emerging representative 3D video paradigm that empowers extended reality, stand out to provide unprecedented immersive and interactive video watching experience. Despite the tremendous potential, the research towards 3D volumetric video is still in its infancy, relying on sufficient and complete datasets for further exploration. However, existing related volumetric video datasets mostly only include a single object, lacking details about the scene and the interaction between them. In this paper, we focus on the current most widely used data format, point cloud, and for the first time release a full-scene volumetric video dataset that includes multiple people and their daily activities interacting with the external environments. Comprehensive dataset description and analysis are conducted, with potential usage of this dataset. The dataset and additional tools can be accessed via the following website: https://cuhksz-inml.github.io/full_scene_volumetric_video_dataset/.
summary: Recent years have witnessed a rapid development of immersive multimedia which bridges the gap between the real world and virtual space. Volumetric videos, as an emerging representative 3D video paradigm that empowers extended reality, stand out to provide unprecedented immersive and interactive video watching experience. Despite the tremendous potential, the research towards 3D volumetric video is still in its infancy, relying on sufficient and complete datasets for further exploration. However, existing related volumetric video datasets mostly only include a single object, lacking details about the scene and the interaction between them. In this paper, we focus on the current most widely used data format, point cloud, and for the first time release a full-scene volumetric video dataset that includes multiple people and their daily activities interacting with the external environments. Comprehensive dataset description and analysis are conducted, with potential usage of this dataset. The dataset and additional tools can be accessed via the following website: https://cuhksz-inml.github.io/full_scene_volumetric_video_dataset/.
abstract_zh: 近年来，沉浸式多媒体技术迅速发展，弥合了现实世界与虚拟空间之间的差距。体积视频作为新兴的代表性3D视频范式，赋能扩展现实，脱颖而出，提供前所未有的沉浸式交互式视频观看体验。尽管潜力巨大，但对 3D 体积视频的研究仍处于起步阶段，需要依赖足够且完整的数据集进行进一步探索。然而，现有的相关体积视频数据集大多仅包含单个对象，缺乏有关场景及其之间交互的细节。在本文中，我们关注当前最广泛使用的数据格式——点云，并首次发布了包含多人及其与外部环境交互的日常活动的全场景体积视频数据集。进行了全面的数据集描述和分析，以及该数据集的潜在用途。数据集和其他工具可以通过以下网站访问：https://cuhksz-inml.github.io/full_scene_volumetric_video_dataset/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了一个包含多人及其日常活动与环境交互的全场景体素视频数据集FSVVD，以推动三维体素视频研究。
AI.motivation: 现有体素视频数据集多仅包含单一物体，缺乏场景细节及交互信息，难以支撑沉浸式多媒体技术的深入研究。
AI.method: 基于点云格式，首次构建包含多人动态及环境交互的全场景体素视频数据集，并提供数据描述、分析工具及使用指南。
AI.result: 成功构建了包含多主体交互行为的全场景体素视频数据集，填补了现有数据资源的空白，并通过官网公开获取。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为三维体素视频研究提供了关键资源，可促进沉浸式媒体技术发展，相关工具与数据已公开共享。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出并发布了一个包含多人及其日常活动与环境交互的全场景体素视频数据集FSVVD，以推动三维体素视频研究。
ai_content.motivation: 现有体素视频数据集多仅包含单一物体，缺乏场景细节及交互信息，难以支撑沉浸式多媒体技术的深入研究。
ai_content.method: 基于点云格式，首次构建包含多人动态及环境交互的全场景体素视频数据集，并提供数据描述、分析工具及使用指南。
ai_content.result: 成功构建了包含多主体交互行为的全场景体素视频数据集，填补了现有数据资源的空白，并通过官网公开获取。
ai_content.conclusion: 该数据集为三维体素视频研究提供了关键资源，可促进沉浸式媒体技术发展，相关工具与数据已公开共享。

search_text: FSVVD: A Dataset of Full Scene Volumetric Video FSVVD：全场景立体视频数据集 Recent years have witnessed a rapid development of immersive multimedia which bridges the gap between the real world and virtual space. Volumetric videos, as an emerging representative 3D video paradigm that empowers extended reality, stand out to provide unprecedented immersive and interactive video watching experience. Despite the tremendous potential, the research towards 3D volumetric video is still in its infancy, relying on sufficient and complete datasets for further exploration. However, existing related volumetric video datasets mostly only include a single object, lacking details about the scene and the interaction between them. In this paper, we focus on the current most widely used data format, point cloud, and for the first time release a full-scene volumetric video dataset that includes multiple people and their daily activities interacting with the external environments. Comprehensive dataset description and analysis are conducted, with potential usage of this dataset. The dataset and additional tools can be accessed via the following website: https://cuhksz-inml.github.io/full_scene_volumetric_video_dataset/. 近年来，沉浸式多媒体技术迅速发展，弥合了现实世界与虚拟空间之间的差距。体积视频作为新兴的代表性3D视频范式，赋能扩展现实，脱颖而出，提供前所未有的沉浸式交互式视频观看体验。尽管潜力巨大，但对 3D 体积视频的研究仍处于起步阶段，需要依赖足够且完整的数据集进行进一步探索。然而，现有的相关体积视频数据集大多仅包含单个对象，缺乏有关场景及其之间交互的细节。在本文中，我们关注当前最广泛使用的数据格式——点云，并首次发布了包含多人及其与外部环境交互的日常活动的全场景体积视频数据集。进行了全面的数据集描述和分析，以及该数据集的潜在用途。数据集和其他工具可以通过以下网站访问：https://cuhksz-inml.github.io/full_scene_volumetric_video_dataset/。 本文提出并发布了一个包含多人及其日常活动与环境交互的全场景体素视频数据集FSVVD，以推动三维体素视频研究。 Kaiyuan Hu,Yili Jin,Haowen Yang,Junhua Liu,Fangxin Wang cs.MM,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yuanjiang Cao,Lina Yao,Le Pan,Quan Z. Sheng,Xiaojun Chang
title: Guided Image-to-Image Translation by Discriminator-Generator Communication
title_zh: 通过鉴别器-生成器通信引导图像到图像的翻译
abstract: The goal of Image-to-image (I2I) translation is to transfer an image from a source domain to a target domain, which has recently drawn increasing attention. One major branch of this research is to formulate I2I translation based on Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). As a zero-sum game, GAN can be reformulated as a Partially-observed Markov Decision Process (POMDP) for generators, where generators cannot access full state information of their environments. This formulation illustrates the information insufficiency in the GAN training. To mitigate this problem, we propose to add a communication channel between discriminators and generators. We explore multiple architecture designs to integrate the communication mechanism into the I2I translation framework. To validate the performance of the proposed approach, we have conducted extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets. The experimental results confirm the superiority of our proposed method.
summary: The goal of Image-to-image (I2I) translation is to transfer an image from a source domain to a target domain, which has recently drawn increasing attention. One major branch of this research is to formulate I2I translation based on Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). As a zero-sum game, GAN can be reformulated as a Partially-observed Markov Decision Process (POMDP) for generators, where generators cannot access full state information of their environments. This formulation illustrates the information insufficiency in the GAN training. To mitigate this problem, we propose to add a communication channel between discriminators and generators. We explore multiple architecture designs to integrate the communication mechanism into the I2I translation framework. To validate the performance of the proposed approach, we have conducted extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets. The experimental results confirm the superiority of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像（I2I）翻译的目标是将图像从源域转移到目标域，最近引起了越来越多的关注。这项研究的一个主要分支是基于生成对抗网络（GAN）制定 I2I 翻译。作为一种零和游戏，GAN 可以重新表述为生成器的部分观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP)，其中生成器无法访问其环境的完整状态信息。这个公式说明了 GAN 训练中的信息不足。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议在鉴别器和生成器之间添加一个通信通道。我们探索多种架构设计，将通信机制集成到 I2I 翻译框架中。为了验证所提出方法的性能，我们对各种基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果证实了我们提出的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过判别器-生成器通信机制改进图像到图像翻译任务，解决生成对抗网络（GAN）训练中的信息不足问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN框架中生成器无法获取环境完整状态信息，导致训练效率低下和翻译质量不足，需通过增强判别器与生成器间的信息交互来优化模型性能。
AI.method: 在GAN框架中引入判别器与生成器间的通信通道，设计多种网络架构整合该机制，通过部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）建模训练过程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在翻译质量与生成多样性指标上优于现有主流I2I翻译模型。
AI.conclusion: 判别器-生成器通信机制有效缓解了GAN训练中的信息不对称问题，为图像翻译任务提供了更高效稳定的生成框架。

authors_text: Xin Li,Tao Ma,Yuenan Hou,Botian Shi,Yuchen Yang,Youquan Liu,Xingjiao Wu,Qin Chen,Yikang Li,Yu Qiao,Liang He
title: LoGoNet: Towards Accurate 3D Object Detection with Local-to-Global Cross-Modal Fusion
title_zh: LoGoNet：通过局部到全局跨模态融合实现准确的 3D 对象检测
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023
abstract: LiDAR-camera fusion methods have shown impressive performance in 3D object detection. Recent advanced multi-modal methods mainly perform global fusion, where image features and point cloud features are fused across the whole scene. Such practice lacks fine-grained region-level information, yielding suboptimal fusion performance. In this paper, we present the novel Local-to-Global fusion network (LoGoNet), which performs LiDAR-camera fusion at both local and global levels. Concretely, the Global Fusion (GoF) of LoGoNet is built upon previous literature, while we exclusively use point centroids to more precisely represent the position of voxel features, thus achieving better cross-modal alignment. As to the Local Fusion (LoF), we first divide each proposal into uniform grids and then project these grid centers to the images. The image features around the projected grid points are sampled to be fused with position-decorated point cloud features, maximally utilizing the rich contextual information around the proposals. The Feature Dynamic Aggregation (FDA) module is further proposed to achieve information interaction between these locally and globally fused features, thus producing more informative multi-modal features. Extensive experiments on both Waymo Open Dataset (WOD) and KITTI datasets show that LoGoNet outperforms all state-of-the-art 3D detection methods. Notably, LoGoNet ranks 1st on Waymo 3D object detection leaderboard and obtains 81.02 mAPH (L2) detection performance. It is noteworthy that, for the first time, the detection performance on three classes surpasses 80 APH (L2) simultaneously. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/sankin97/LoGoNet}.

Recent advanced multi-modal methods mainly perform global fusion, where image features and point cloud features are fused across the whole scene. Such practice lacks fine-grained region-level information, yielding suboptimal fusion performance. In this paper, we present the novel Local-to-Global fusion network (LoGoNet), which performs LiDAR-camera fusion at both local and global levels. Concretely, the Global Fusion (GoF) of LoGoNet is built upon previous literature, while we exclusively use point centroids to more precisely represent the position of voxel features, thus achieving better cross-modal alignment. As to the Local Fusion (LoF), we first divide each proposal into uniform grids and then project these grid centers to the images. The image features around the projected grid points are sampled to be fused with position-decorated point cloud features, maximally utilizing the rich contextual information around the proposals. The Feature Dynamic Aggregation (FDA) module is further proposed to achieve information interaction between these locally and globally fused features, thus producing more informative multi-modal features. Extensive experiments on both Waymo Open Dataset (WOD) and KITTI datasets show that LoGoNet outperforms all state-of-the-art 3D detection methods. Notably, LoGoNet ranks 1st on Waymo 3D object detection leaderboard and obtains 81.02 mAPH (L2) detection performance. It is noteworthy that, for the first time, the detection performance on three classes surpasses 80 APH (L2) simultaneously. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/sankin97/LoGoNet}.
abstract_zh: LiDAR-相机融合方法在 3D 物体检测中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。最近先进的多模态方法主要执行全局融合，其中图像特征和点云特征在整个场景中融合。这种做法缺乏细粒度的区域级信息，导致融合性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的局部到全局融合网络（LoGoNet），它在局部和全局层面上执行激光雷达相机融合。具体来说，LoGoNet 的全局融合（GoF）是建立在先前文献的基础上的，而我们专门使用点质心来更精确地表示体素特征的位置，从而实现更好的跨模态对齐。对于局部融合（LoF），我们首先将每个提案划分为统一的网格，然后将这些网格中心投影到图像上。对投影网格点周围的图像特征进行采样，以与位置修饰的点云特征融合，最大限度地利用提案周围丰富的上下文信息。进一步提出特征动态聚合（FDA）模块来实现这些局部和全局融合特征之间的信息交互，从而产生更多信息的多模态特征。在 Waymo 开放数据集 (WOD) 和 KITTI 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，LoGoNet 的性能优于所有最先进的 3D 检测方法。值得注意的是，LoGoNet 在 Waymo 3D 物体检测排行榜上排名第一，并获得 81.02 mAPH（L2）的检测性能。值得注意的是，三个类别的检测性能首次同时超过 80 APH（L2）。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/sankin97/LoGoNet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoGoNet，一种通过局部到全局的跨模态融合提升3D目标检测精度的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-相机融合方法仅依赖全局融合，缺乏细粒度区域信息，导致融合效果次优。
AI.method: LoGoNet结合全局融合（GoF）与局部融合（LoF），利用点云质心优化对齐，并通过网格划分与图像特征采样实现局部信息融合，再通过FDA模块整合多模态特征。
AI.result: 在Waymo和KITTI数据集上超越所有SOTA方法，Waymo榜单排名第一，mAPH（L2）达81.02，首次实现三个类别APH均超80。
AI.conclusion: LoGoNet通过局部-全局双级融合机制显著提升多模态特征交互，为3D目标检测树立新基准。
