Concretely, the Global Fusion (GoF) of LoGoNet is built upon previous literature, while we exclusively use point centroids to more precisely represent the position of voxel features, thus achieving better cross-modal alignment. As to the Local Fusion (LoF), we first divide each proposal into uniform grids and then project these grid centers to the images. The image features around the projected grid points are sampled to be fused with position-decorated point cloud features, maximally utilizing the rich contextual information around the proposals. The Feature Dynamic Aggregation (FDA) module is further proposed to achieve information interaction between these locally and globally fused features, thus producing more informative multi-modal features. Extensive experiments on both Waymo Open Dataset (WOD) and KITTI datasets show that LoGoNet outperforms all state-of-the-art 3D detection methods. Notably, LoGoNet ranks 1st on Waymo 3D object detection leaderboard and obtains 81.02 mAPH (L2) detection performance. It is noteworthy that, for the first time, the detection performance on three classes surpasses 80 APH (L2) simultaneously. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/sankin97/LoGoNet}. LiDAR-相机融合方法在 3D 物体检测中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。最近先进的多模态方法主要执行全局融合，其中图像特征和点云特征在整个场景中融合。这种做法缺乏细粒度的区域级信息，导致融合性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的局部到全局融合网络（LoGoNet），它在局部和全局层面上执行激光雷达相机融合。具体来说，LoGoNet 的全局融合（GoF）是建立在先前文献的基础上的，而我们专门使用点质心来更精确地表示体素特征的位置，从而实现更好的跨模态对齐。对于局部融合（LoF），我们首先将每个提案划分为统一的网格，然后将这些网格中心投影到图像上。对投影网格点周围的图像特征进行采样，以与位置修饰的点云特征融合，最大限度地利用提案周围丰富的上下文信息。进一步提出特征动态聚合（FDA）模块来实现这些局部和全局融合特征之间的信息交互，从而产生更多信息的多模态特征。在 Waymo 开放数据集 (WOD) 和 KITTI 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，LoGoNet 的性能优于所有最先进的 3D 检测方法。值得注意的是，LoGoNet 在 Waymo 3D 物体检测排行榜上排名第一，并获得 81.02 mAPH（L2）的检测性能。值得注意的是，三个类别的检测性能首次同时超过 80 APH（L2）。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/sankin97/LoGoNet} 获取。 本文提出LoGoNet，一种通过局部到全局的跨模态融合提升3D目标检测精度的方法。 Xin Li,Tao Ma,Yuenan Hou,Botian Shi,Yuchen Yang,Youquan Liu,Xingjiao Wu,Qin Chen,Yikang Li,Yu Qiao,Liang He cs.CV

authors_text: Ankit Shah,Shuyi Chen,Kejun Zhou,Yue Chen,Bhiksha Raj
title: Approach to Learning Generalized Audio Representation Through Batch Embedding Covariance Regularization and Constant-Q Transforms
title_zh: 通过批量嵌入协方差正则化和常 Q 变换学习广义音频表示的方法
comment: Technical report, 10 pages
comments: Technical report, 10 pages
abstract: General-purpose embedding is highly desirable for few-shot even zero-shot learning in many application scenarios, including audio tasks. In order to understand representations better, we conducted a thorough error analysis and visualization of HEAR 2021 submission results. Inspired by the analysis, this work experiments with different front-end audio preprocessing methods, including Constant-Q Transform (CQT) and Short-time Fourier transform (STFT), and proposes a Batch Embedding Covariance Regularization (BECR) term to uncover a more holistic simulation of the frequency information received by the human auditory system. We tested the models on the suite of HEAR 2021 tasks, which encompass a broad category of tasks. Preliminary results show (1) the proposed BECR can incur a more dispersed embedding on the test set, (2) BECR improves the PaSST model without extra computation complexity, and (3) STFT preprocessing outperforms CQT in all tasks we tested. Github:https://github.com/ankitshah009/general_audio_embedding_hear_2021
summary: General-purpose embedding is highly desirable for few-shot even zero-shot learning in many application scenarios, including audio tasks. In order to understand representations better, we conducted a thorough error analysis and visualization of HEAR 2021 submission results. Inspired by the analysis, this work experiments with different front-end audio preprocessing methods, including Constant-Q Transform (CQT) and Short-time Fourier transform (STFT), and proposes a Batch Embedding Covariance Regularization (BECR) term to uncover a more holistic simulation of the frequency information received by the human auditory system. We tested the models on the suite of HEAR 2021 tasks, which encompass a broad category of tasks. Preliminary results show (1) the proposed BECR can incur a more dispersed embedding on the test set, (2) BECR improves the PaSST model without extra computation complexity, and (3) STFT preprocessing outperforms CQT in all tasks we tested. Github:https://github.com/ankitshah009/general_audio_embedding_hear_2021
abstract_zh: 在许多应用场景（包括音频任务）中，通用嵌入对于少样本甚至零样本学习来说是非常理想的。为了更好地理解表述，我们对 HEAR 2021 提交结果进行了彻底的错误分析和可视化。受分析启发，这项工作尝试了不同的前端音频预处理方法，包括恒定 Q 变换 (CQT) 和短时傅立叶变换 (STFT)，并提出了批量嵌入协方差正则化 (BECR) 项，以揭示对人类听觉系统接收的频率信息的更全面的模拟。我们在 HEAR 2021 任务套件上测试了模型，其中涵盖了广泛的任务类别。初步结果表明（1）所提出的 BECR 可以在测试集上产生更分散的嵌入，（2）BECR 改进了 PaSST 模型，而没有额外的计算复杂性，（3）STFT 预处理在我们测试的所有任务中都优于 CQT。 Github：https://github.com/ankitshah009/general_audio_embedding_hear_2021

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过批量嵌入协方差正则化（BECR）和常数-Q变换（CQT）学习通用音频表示，以提升音频任务的零样本学习能力。
AI.motivation: 通用音频嵌入对零样本学习至关重要，但现有方法在频率信息建模和嵌入分散性上存在不足，需改进以更贴近人类听觉系统。
AI.method: 对比CQT和短时傅里叶变换（STFT）预处理方法，提出BECR正则化项，通过协方差约束增强嵌入分散性，并在HEAR 2021任务集验证效果。
AI.result: BECR提升PaSST模型性能且无额外计算开销；STFT在所有任务中优于CQT；BECR使测试集嵌入分布更分散。
AI.conclusion: BECR与STFT结合可有效提升通用音频表示，为零样本学习提供更鲁棒的特征建模方案。

authors_text: Siqi Fan,Zhe Wang,Xiaoliang Huo,Yan Wang,Jingjing Liu
title: Calibration-free BEV Representation for Infrastructure Perception
title_zh: 用于基础设施感知的免校准 BEV 表示
abstract: Effective BEV object detection on infrastructure can greatly improve traffic scenes understanding and vehicle-toinfrastructure (V2I) cooperative perception. However, cameras installed on infrastructure have various postures, and previous BEV detection methods rely on accurate calibration, which is difficult for practical applications due to inevitable natural factors (e.g., wind and snow). In this paper, we propose a Calibration-free BEV Representation (CBR) network, which achieves 3D detection based on BEV representation without calibration parameters and additional depth supervision. Specifically, we utilize two multi-layer perceptrons for decoupling the features from perspective view to front view and birdeye view under boxes-induced foreground supervision. Then, a cross-view feature fusion module matches features from orthogonal views according to similarity and conducts BEV feature enhancement with front view features. Experimental results on DAIR-V2X demonstrate that CBR achieves acceptable performance without any camera parameters and is naturally not affected by calibration noises. We hope CBR can serve as a baseline for future research addressing practical challenges of infrastructure perception.
summary: Effective BEV object detection on infrastructure can greatly improve traffic scenes understanding and vehicle-toinfrastructure (V2I) cooperative perception. However, cameras installed on infrastructure have various postures, and previous BEV detection methods rely on accurate calibration, which is difficult for practical applications due to inevitable natural factors (e.g., wind and snow). In this paper, we propose a Calibration-free BEV Representation (CBR) network, which achieves 3D detection based on BEV representation without calibration parameters and additional depth supervision. Specifically, we utilize two multi-layer perceptrons for decoupling the features from perspective view to front view and birdeye view under boxes-induced foreground supervision. Then, a cross-view feature fusion module matches features from orthogonal views according to similarity and conducts BEV feature enhancement with front view features. Experimental results on DAIR-V2X demonstrate that CBR achieves acceptable performance without any camera parameters and is naturally not affected by calibration noises. We hope CBR can serve as a baseline for future research addressing practical challenges of infrastructure perception.
abstract_zh: 对基础设施进行有效的 BEV 目标检测可以极大地提高交通场景理解和车辆到基础设施 (V2I) 的协作感知。然而，安装在基础设施上的摄像头具有各种姿态，并且以前的BEV检测方法依赖于精确校准，由于不可避免的自然因素（例如风和雪），这在实际应用中很困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种免校准 BEV 表示（CBR）网络，该网络无需校准参数和额外的深度监督即可实现基于 BEV 表示的 3D 检测。具体来说，我们利用两个多层感知器在盒子引起的前景监督下将透视图、前视图和鸟瞰图的特征解耦。然后，跨视图特征融合模块根据相似度匹配正交视图的特征，并利用前视图特征进行BEV特征增强。 DAIR-V2X 上的实验结果表明，CBR 在没有任何相机参数的情况下实现了可接受的性能，并且自然不受校准噪声的影响。我们希望 CBR 能够作为未来研究的基准，解决基础设施感知的实际挑战。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需校准的BEV表示方法用于基础设施感知
AI.motivation: 传统BEV检测依赖精确校准，但实际场景中摄像头易受自然因素影响导致校准失效
AI.method: 设计CBR网络，通过双MLP解耦视角特征并结合跨视图融合模块实现BEV特征增强
AI.result: 在DAIR-V2X数据集上验证了无需相机参数和深度监督的可行性，性能不受校准噪声影响
AI.conclusion: CBR为基础设施感知的实用化研究提供了无需校准的基准方案

authors_text: Kewei Cheng,Nesreen K. Ahmed,Yizhou Sun
title: Neural Compositional Rule Learning for Knowledge Graph Reasoning
title_zh: 用于知识图推理的神经组合规则学习
comment: ICLR 2023
comments: ICLR 2023
abstract: Learning logical rules is critical to improving reasoning in KGs. This is due to their ability to provide logical and interpretable explanations when used for predictions, as well as their ability to generalize to other tasks, domains, and data. While recent methods have been proposed to learn logical rules, the majority of these methods are either restricted by their computational complexity and can not handle the large search space of large-scale KGs, or show poor generalization when exposed to data outside the training set. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end neural model for learning compositional logical rules called NCRL. NCRL detects the best compositional structure of a rule body, and breaks it into small compositions in order to infer the rule head. By recurrently merging compositions in the rule body with a recurrent attention unit, NCRL finally predicts a single rule head. Experimental results show that NCRL learns high-quality rules, as well as being generalizable. Specifically, we show that NCRL is scalable, efficient, and yields state-of-the-art results for knowledge graph completion on large-scale KGs. Moreover, we test NCRL for systematic generalization by learning to reason on small-scale observed graphs and evaluating on larger unseen ones.
summary: Learning logical rules is critical to improving reasoning in KGs. This is due to their ability to provide logical and interpretable explanations when used for predictions, as well as their ability to generalize to other tasks, domains, and data. While recent methods have been proposed to learn logical rules, the majority of these methods are either restricted by their computational complexity and can not handle the large search space of large-scale KGs, or show poor generalization when exposed to data outside the training set. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end neural model for learning compositional logical rules called NCRL. NCRL detects the best compositional structure of a rule body, and breaks it into small compositions in order to infer the rule head. By recurrently merging compositions in the rule body with a recurrent attention unit, NCRL finally predicts a single rule head. Experimental results show that NCRL learns high-quality rules, as well as being generalizable. Specifically, we show that NCRL is scalable, efficient, and yields state-of-the-art results for knowledge graph completion on large-scale KGs. Moreover, we test NCRL for systematic generalization by learning to reason on small-scale observed graphs and evaluating on larger unseen ones.
abstract_zh: 学习逻辑规则对于提高知识图谱的推理能力至关重要。这是因为它们在用于预测时能够提供逻辑和可解释的解释，以及泛化到其他任务、领域和数据的能力。虽然最近提出了学习逻辑规则的方法，但这些方法大多数要么受到计算复杂性的限制，无法处理大规模知识图谱的大搜索空间，要么在暴露于训练集之外的数据时表现出较差的泛化性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于学习组合逻辑规则的端到端神经模型，称为 NCRL。 NCRL 检测规则主体的最佳组合结构，并将其分解为小组合以推断规则头。通过将规则体中的组合与循环注意单元反复合并，NCRL 最终预测出单个规则头。实验结果表明 NCRL 学习到了高质量的规则，并且具有可推广性。具体来说，我们表明 NCRL 具有可扩展性、高效性，并且可以在大规模 KG 上的知识图补全方面产生最先进的结果。此外，我们通过学习对小规模观察到的图进行推理并评估较大的未见图来测试 NCRL 的系统泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的神经模型NCRL，用于从知识图谱中学习组合逻辑规则，以提升推理能力和泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有逻辑规则学习方法在计算复杂度或泛化能力上存在不足，难以处理大规模知识图谱或应对训练集外的数据。
AI.method: 通过递归注意力单元分解规则体为小规模组合结构，逐步合并生成规则头，实现端到端的组合规则学习。
AI.result: NCRL在大规模知识图谱补全任务中达到最先进水平，且在系统性泛化测试中表现出色，兼具可扩展性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: NCRL通过组合结构分解与递归合并机制，有效解决了知识图谱推理中的可扩展性与泛化性矛盾。

search_text: Neural Compositional Rule Learning for Knowledge Graph Reasoning 用于知识图推理的神经组合规则学习 Learning logical rules is critical to improving reasoning in KGs. This is due to their ability to provide logical and interpretable explanations when used for predictions, as well as their ability to generalize to other tasks, domains, and data. While recent methods have been proposed to learn logical rules, the majority of these methods are either restricted by their computational complexity and can not handle the large search space of large-scale KGs, or show poor generalization when exposed to data outside the training set. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end neural model for learning compositional logical rules called NCRL. NCRL detects the best compositional structure of a rule body, and breaks it into small compositions in order to infer the rule head. By recurrently merging compositions in the rule body with a recurrent attention unit, NCRL finally predicts a single rule head. Experimental results show that NCRL learns high-quality rules, as well as being generalizable. Specifically, we show that NCRL is scalable, efficient, and yields state-of-the-art results for knowledge graph completion on large-scale KGs. Moreover, we test NCRL for systematic generalization by learning to reason on small-scale observed graphs and evaluating on larger unseen ones. 学习逻辑规则对于提高知识图谱的推理能力至关重要。这是因为它们在用于预测时能够提供逻辑和可解释的解释，以及泛化到其他任务、领域和数据的能力。虽然最近提出了学习逻辑规则的方法，但这些方法大多数要么受到计算复杂性的限制，无法处理大规模知识图谱的大搜索空间，要么在暴露于训练集之外的数据时表现出较差的泛化性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于学习组合逻辑规则的端到端神经模型，称为 NCRL。 NCRL 检测规则主体的最佳组合结构，并将其分解为小组合以推断规则头。通过将规则体中的组合与循环注意单元反复合并，NCRL 最终预测出单个规则头。实验结果表明 NCRL 学习到了高质量的规则，并且具有可推广性。具体来说，我们表明 NCRL 具有可扩展性、高效性，并且可以在大规模 KG 上的知识图补全方面产生最先进的结果。此外，我们通过学习对小规模观察到的图进行推理并评估较大的未见图来测试 NCRL 的系统泛化能力。 本文提出了一种端到端的神经模型NCRL，用于从知识图谱中学习组合逻辑规则，以提升推理能力和泛化性能。 Kewei Cheng,Nesreen K. Ahmed,Yizhou Sun cs.AI

authors_text: Peter Washington
title: A Perspective on Crowdsourcing and Human-in-the-Loop Workflows in Precision Health
title_zh: 精准医疗中的众包和人在环工作流程的视角
comment: ef:Journal of Medical Internet Research 26 (2024): e51138
comments: ef:Journal of Medical Internet Research 26 (2024): e51138
abstract: Modern machine learning approaches have led to performant diagnostic models for a variety of health conditions. Several machine learning approaches, such as decision trees and deep neural networks, can, in principle, approximate any function. However, this power can be considered to be both a gift and a curse, as the propensity toward overfitting is magnified when the input data are heterogeneous and high dimensional and the output class is highly nonlinear. This issue can especially plague diagnostic systems that predict behavioral and psychiatric conditions that are diagnosed with subjective criteria. An emerging solution to this issue is crowdsourcing, where crowd workers are paid to annotate complex behavioral features in return for monetary compensation or a gamified experience. These labels can then be used to derive a diagnosis, either directly or by using the labels as inputs to a diagnostic machine learning model. This viewpoint describes existing work in this emerging field and discusses ongoing challenges and opportunities with crowd-powered diagnostic systems, a nascent field of study. With the correct considerations, the addition of crowdsourcing to human-in-the-loop machine learning workflows for the prediction of complex and nuanced health conditions can accelerate screening, diagnostics, and ultimately access to care.
summary: Modern machine learning approaches have led to performant diagnostic models for a variety of health conditions. Several machine learning approaches, such as decision trees and deep neural networks, can, in principle, approximate any function. However, this power can be considered to be both a gift and a curse, as the propensity toward overfitting is magnified when the input data are heterogeneous and high dimensional and the output class is highly nonlinear. This issue can especially plague diagnostic systems that predict behavioral and psychiatric conditions that are diagnosed with subjective criteria. An emerging solution to this issue is crowdsourcing, where crowd workers are paid to annotate complex behavioral features in return for monetary compensation or a gamified experience. These labels can then be used to derive a diagnosis, either directly or by using the labels as inputs to a diagnostic machine learning model. This viewpoint describes existing work in this emerging field and discusses ongoing challenges and opportunities with crowd-powered diagnostic systems, a nascent field of study. With the correct considerations, the addition of crowdsourcing to human-in-the-loop machine learning workflows for the prediction of complex and nuanced health conditions can accelerate screening, diagnostics, and ultimately access to care.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习方法已经产生了针对各种健康状况的高性能诊断模型。原则上，决策树和深度神经网络等几种机器学习方法可以逼近任何函数。然而，这种能力既可以被认为是一种礼物，也是一种诅咒，因为当输入数据是异构的、高维的并且输出类是高度非线性的时，过度拟合的倾向会被放大。这个问题尤其会困扰预测用主观标准诊断的行为和精神疾病的诊断系统。这个问题的一个新兴解决方案是众包，众包工作者获得报酬来注释复杂的行为特征，以换取金钱补偿或游戏化体验。然后，可以直接使用这些标签或通过使用这些标签作为诊断机器学习模型的输入来得出诊断。这一观点描述了这一新兴领域的现有工作，并讨论了众包诊断系统（一个新兴的研究领域）持续面临的挑战和机遇。有了正确的考虑，将众包添加到人机循环机器学习工作流程中以预测复杂而细致的健康状况可以加速筛查、诊断并最终获得护理。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在精准医疗中结合众包与人机协作工作流程，以解决复杂健康状况诊断中的机器学习模型过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在处理异构高维数据及高度非线性输出时易出现过拟合，尤其在依赖主观标准诊断的行为和精神疾病领域存在显著挑战。
AI.method: 通过众包平台获取人类标注的复杂行为特征数据，将其直接用于诊断或作为机器学习模型的输入，结合人机协作优化诊断流程。
AI.result: 系统综述了众包驱动诊断系统的现有研究，分析了其面临的挑战（如数据质量控制）与潜在机遇（如提升诊断可扩展性）。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计的众包机制可增强人机协作诊断系统的准确性与效率，但需平衡数据质量、成本与伦理问题以实现医疗可及性提升。

authors_text: Chihaya Matsuhira,Marc A. Kastner,Takahiro Komamizu,Takatsugu Hirayama,Keisuke Doman,Yasutomo Kawanishi,Ichiro Ide
title: IPA-CLIP: Integrating Phonetic Priors into Vision and Language Pretraining
title_zh: IPA-CLIP：将语音先验整合到视觉和语言预训练中
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, 5 Tables
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, 5 Tables
abstract: Recently, large-scale Vision and Language (V\&L) pretraining has become the standard backbone of many multimedia systems. While it has shown remarkable performance even in unseen situations, it often performs in ways not intuitive to humans. Particularly, they usually do not consider the pronunciation of the input, which humans would utilize to understand language, especially when it comes to unknown words. Thus, this paper inserts phonetic prior into Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP), one of the V\&L pretrained models, to make it consider the pronunciation similarity among its pronunciation inputs. To achieve this, we first propose a phoneme embedding that utilizes the phoneme relationships provided by the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) chart as a phonetic prior. Next, by distilling the frozen CLIP text encoder, we train a pronunciation encoder employing the IPA-based embedding. The proposed model named IPA-CLIP comprises this pronunciation encoder and the original CLIP encoders (image and text). Quantitative evaluation reveals that the phoneme distribution on the embedding space represents phonetic relationships more accurately when using the proposed phoneme embedding. Furthermore, in some multimodal retrieval tasks, we confirm that the proposed pronunciation encoder enhances the performance of the text encoder and that the pronunciation encoder handles nonsense words in a more phonetic manner than the text encoder. Finally, qualitative evaluation verifies the correlation between the pronunciation encoder and human perception regarding pronunciation similarity.
summary: Recently, large-scale Vision and Language (V\&L) pretraining has become the standard backbone of many multimedia systems. While it has shown remarkable performance even in unseen situations, it often performs in ways not intuitive to humans. Particularly, they usually do not consider the pronunciation of the input, which humans would utilize to understand language, especially when it comes to unknown words. Thus, this paper inserts phonetic prior into Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP), one of the V\&L pretrained models, to make it consider the pronunciation similarity among its pronunciation inputs. To achieve this, we first propose a phoneme embedding that utilizes the phoneme relationships provided by the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) chart as a phonetic prior. Next, by distilling the frozen CLIP text encoder, we train a pronunciation encoder employing the IPA-based embedding. The proposed model named IPA-CLIP comprises this pronunciation encoder and the original CLIP encoders (image and text). Quantitative evaluation reveals that the phoneme distribution on the embedding space represents phonetic relationships more accurately when using the proposed phoneme embedding. Furthermore, in some multimodal retrieval tasks, we confirm that the proposed pronunciation encoder enhances the performance of the text encoder and that the pronunciation encoder handles nonsense words in a more phonetic manner than the text encoder. Finally, qualitative evaluation verifies the correlation between the pronunciation encoder and human perception regarding pronunciation similarity.
abstract_zh: 最近，大规模视觉和语言（V\&L）预训练已成为许多多媒体系统的标准支柱。虽然即使在看不见的情况下它也表现出了卓越的性能，但它的表现方式往往对人类来说并不直观。特别是，他们通常不考虑输入的发音，而人类会利用该发音来理解语言，尤其是在涉及未知单词时。因此，本文将语音先验插入到对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）（V\&L预训练模型之一）中，使其考虑发音输入之间的发音相似性。为了实现这一目标，我们首先提出一种音素嵌入，它利用国际音标（IPA）图表提供的音素关系作为语音先验。接下来，通过提炼冻结的 CLIP 文本编码器，我们使用基于 IPA 的嵌入来训练发音编码器。所提出的名为 IPA-CLIP 的模型包含该发音编码器和原始 CLIP 编码器（图像和文本）。定量评估表明，使用所提出的音素嵌入时，嵌入空间上的音素分布可以更准确地表示语音关系。此外，在一些多模态检索任务中，我们确认所提出的发音编码器增强了文本编码器的性能，并且发音编码器以比文本编码器更语音的方式处理无意义单词。最后，定性评估验证了发音编码器和人类对发音相似度的感知之间的相关性。

AI.tldr: 提出IPA-CLIP模型，通过整合语音学先验知识提升视觉与语言预训练模型在多模态任务中的表现，尤其是处理未知词汇时的发音相似性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉与语言预训练模型忽略发音信息，而人类理解语言时会利用发音，尤其在处理未知词时需考虑发音相似性。
AI.method: 设计基于国际音标（IPA）的音素嵌入作为语音先验，通过蒸馏冻结的CLIP文本编码器训练发音编码器，并与原CLIP编码器结合构建IPA-CLIP模型。
AI.result: 定量评估显示音素嵌入空间更准确表示语音关系；多模态检索任务中发音编码器提升文本编码器性能，且对无意义词处理更符合发音相似性；定性评估验证发音编码器与人类感知一致。
AI.conclusion: 整合语音学先验可提升模型对发音相关任务的性能，尤其在处理未知词汇时，发音编码器与人类感知发音相似性的能力一致。

search_text: IPA-CLIP: Integrating Phonetic Priors into Vision and Language Pretraining IPA-CLIP：将语音先验整合到视觉和语言预训练中 Recently, large-scale Vision and Language (V\&L) pretraining has become the standard backbone of many multimedia systems. While it has shown remarkable performance even in unseen situations, it often performs in ways not intuitive to humans. Particularly, they usually do not consider the pronunciation of the input, which humans would utilize to understand language, especially when it comes to unknown words. Thus, this paper inserts phonetic prior into Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP), one of the V\&L pretrained models, to make it consider the pronunciation similarity among its pronunciation inputs. To achieve this, we first propose a phoneme embedding that utilizes the phoneme relationships provided by the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) chart as a phonetic prior. Next, by distilling the frozen CLIP text encoder, we train a pronunciation encoder employing the IPA-based embedding. The proposed model named IPA-CLIP comprises this pronunciation encoder and the original CLIP encoders (image and text). Quantitative evaluation reveals that the phoneme distribution on the embedding space represents phonetic relationships more accurately when using the proposed phoneme embedding. Furthermore, in some multimodal retrieval tasks, we confirm that the proposed pronunciation encoder enhances the performance of the text encoder and that the pronunciation encoder handles nonsense words in a more phonetic manner than the text encoder. Finally, qualitative evaluation verifies the correlation between the pronunciation encoder and human perception regarding pronunciation similarity. 最近，大规模视觉和语言（V\&L）预训练已成为许多多媒体系统的标准支柱。虽然即使在看不见的情况下它也表现出了卓越的性能，但它的表现方式往往对人类来说并不直观。特别是，他们通常不考虑输入的发音，而人类会利用该发音来理解语言，尤其是在涉及未知单词时。因此，本文将语音先验插入到对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）（V\&L预训练模型之一）中，使其考虑发音输入之间的发音相似性。为了实现这一目标，我们首先提出一种音素嵌入，它利用国际音标（IPA）图表提供的音素关系作为语音先验。接下来，通过提炼冻结的 CLIP 文本编码器，我们使用基于 IPA 的嵌入来训练发音编码器。所提出的名为 IPA-CLIP 的模型包含该发音编码器和原始 CLIP 编码器（图像和文本）。定量评估表明，使用所提出的音素嵌入时，嵌入空间上的音素分布可以更准确地表示语音关系。此外，在一些多模态检索任务中，我们确认所提出的发音编码器增强了文本编码器的性能，并且发音编码器以比文本编码器更语音的方式处理无意义单词。最后，定性评估验证了发音编码器和人类对发音相似度的感知之间的相关性。 提出IPA-CLIP模型，通过整合语音学先验知识提升视觉与语言预训练模型在多模态任务中的表现，尤其是处理未知词汇时的发音相似性。 Chihaya Matsuhira,Marc A. Kastner,Takahiro Komamizu,Takatsugu Hirayama,Keisuke Doman,Yasutomo Kawanishi,Ichiro Ide cs.MM,cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Elisabetta Biasin,Erik Kamenjasevic,Kaspar Rosager Ludvigsen
title: Cybersecurity of AI medical devices: risks, legislation, and challenges
title_zh: 人工智能医疗设备的网络安全：风险、立法和挑战
abstract: Medical devices and artificial intelligence systems rapidly transform healthcare provisions. At the same time, due to their nature, AI in or as medical devices might get exposed to cyberattacks, leading to patient safety and security risks. This book chapter is divided into three parts. The first part starts by setting the scene where we explain the role of cybersecurity in healthcare. Then, we briefly define what we refer to when we talk about AI that is considered a medical device by itself or supports one. To illustrate the risks such medical devices pose, we provide three examples: the poisoning of datasets, social engineering, and data or source code extraction. In the second part, the paper provides an overview of the European Union's regulatory framework relevant for ensuring the cybersecurity of AI as or in medical devices (MDR, NIS Directive, Cybersecurity Act, GDPR, the AI Act proposal and the NIS 2 Directive proposal). Finally, the third part of the paper examines possible challenges stemming from the EU regulatory framework. In particular, we look toward the challenges deriving from the two legislative proposals and their interaction with the existing legislation concerning AI medical devices' cybersecurity. They are structured as answers to the following questions: (1) how will the AI Act interact with the MDR regarding the cybersecurity and safety requirements?; (2) how should we interpret incident notification requirements from the NIS 2 Directive proposal and MDR?; and (3) what are the consequences of the evolving term of critical infrastructures? [This is a draft chapter. The final version will be available in Research Handbook on Health, AI and the Law edited by Barry Solaiman & I. Glenn Cohen, forthcoming 2023, Edward Elgar Publishing Ltd]

abstract_zh: 医疗设备和人工智能系统迅速改变医疗保健服务。同时，由于其性质，医疗设备中的人工智能或作为医疗设备的人工智能可能会受到网络攻击，从而导致患者安全和安保风险。本书章节分为三个部分。第一部分首先设置场景，解释网络安全在医疗保健中的作用。然后，我们简要定义当我们谈论人工智能时，人工智能本身被视为一种医疗设备或支持医疗设备。为了说明此类医疗设备带来的风险，我们提供了三个例子：数据集中毒、社会工程以及数据或源代码提取。在第二部分中，本文概述了欧盟与确保医疗设备中的人工智能网络安全相关的监管框架（MDR、NIS 指令、网络安全法案、GDPR、人工智能法案提案和 NIS 2 指令提案）。最后，本文的第三部分探讨了欧盟监管框架可能带来的挑战。我们特别关注这两项立法提案及其与有关人工智能医疗设备网络安全的现有立法的相互作用所带来的挑战。它们的结构是对以下问题的回答：（1）《人工智能法案》将如何与 MDR 在网络安全和安全要求方面互动？ (2) 我们应该如何解释 NIS 2 指令提案和 MDR 中的事件通知要求？ (3) 关键基础设施的演变会产生什么后果？ [这是章节草稿。最终版本将在 Barry Solaiman 和 I. Glenn Cohen 编辑的《健康、人工智能和法律研究手册》中提供，即将于 2023 年出版，Edward Elgar Publishing Ltd]

AI.tldr: 分析AI医疗设备的网络安全风险、相关法规及挑战
AI.motivation: 探讨AI医疗设备的网络安全风险及其对患者安全的影响，并分析现有法规的应对措施
AI.method: 通过分三部分的结构：分析网络安全在医疗中的作用、概述欧盟法规、探讨法规框架的挑战
AI.result: 识别了数据污染等风险，概述了欧盟相关法规，并指出了法规间互动的挑战
AI.conclusion: 现有法规需协调以有效应对AI医疗设备的网络安全挑战

authors_text: Danilo Naiff,Shashwat Goel
title: Low impact agency: review and discussion
title_zh: 低影响机构：审查和讨论
comment: Work done as part of the SERIMATS 3.0 training program
comments: Work done as part of the SERIMATS 3.0 training program
abstract: Powerful artificial intelligence poses an existential threat if the AI decides to drastically change the world in pursuit of its goals. The hope of low-impact artificial intelligence is to incentivize AI to not do that just because this causes a large impact in the world. In this work, we first review the concept of low-impact agency and previous proposals to approach the problem, and then propose future research directions in the topic, with the goal to ensure low-impactedness is useful in making AI safe.
summary: Powerful artificial intelligence poses an existential threat if the AI decides to drastically change the world in pursuit of its goals. The hope of low-impact artificial intelligence is to incentivize AI to not do that just because this causes a large impact in the world. In this work, we first review the concept of low-impact agency and previous proposals to approach the problem, and then propose future research directions in the topic, with the goal to ensure low-impactedness is useful in making AI safe.
abstract_zh: 如果人工智能决定彻底改变世界以追求其目标，那么强大的人工智能就会构成生存威胁。低影响人工智能的希望是激励人工智能不要仅仅因为这对世界造成巨大影响就这样做。在这项工作中，我们首先回顾了低影响机构的概念和之前解决该问题的建议，然后提出了该主题的未来研究方向，目标是确保低影响力有助于确保人工智能的安全。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在回顾低影响代理的概念及现有解决方案，并提出未来研究方向，以确保低影响性在提升AI安全性中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 强大的AI可能因追求目标而引发存在性风险，因此需通过低影响代理机制限制其对世界的负面影响，从而提升AI安全性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述回顾低影响代理的现有理论与方法，并基于当前挑战提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 系统梳理了低影响代理的研究现状，并明确了未来需重点探索的方向，以增强AI安全性的保障机制。
AI.conclusion: 低影响代理是应对AI潜在风险的关键，未来研究需进一步完善其理论框架与实践路径，以实现安全可控的AI发展。

ai_content_json.result: 系统梳理了低影响代理的研究现状，并明确了未来需重点探索的方向，以增强AI安全性的保障机制。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 低影响代理是应对AI潜在风险的关键，未来研究需进一步完善其理论框架与实践路径，以实现安全可控的AI发展。

search_text: Low impact agency: review and discussion 低影响机构：审查和讨论 Powerful artificial intelligence poses an existential threat if the AI decides to drastically change the world in pursuit of its goals. The hope of low-impact artificial intelligence is to incentivize AI to not do that just because this causes a large impact in the world. In this work, we first review the concept of low-impact agency and previous proposals to approach the problem, and then propose future research directions in the topic, with the goal to ensure low-impactedness is useful in making AI safe. 如果人工智能决定彻底改变世界以追求其目标，那么强大的人工智能就会构成生存威胁。低影响人工智能的希望是激励人工智能不要仅仅因为这对世界造成巨大影响就这样做。在这项工作中，我们首先回顾了低影响机构的概念和之前解决该问题的建议，然后提出了该主题的未来研究方向，目标是确保低影响力有助于确保人工智能的安全。 本文旨在回顾低影响代理的概念及现有解决方案，并提出未来研究方向，以确保低影响性在提升AI安全性中的有效性。 Danilo Naiff,Shashwat Goel cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Shuhong Ye,Weikai Kong,Chenglin Yao,Jianfeng Ren,Xudong Jiang
title: Video Question Answering Using CLIP-Guided Visual-Text Attention
title_zh: 使用 CLIP 引导的视觉文本注意力进行视频问答
comment: Submitted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2023)
comments: Submitted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2023)
abstract: Cross-modal learning of video and text plays a key role in Video Question Answering (VideoQA). In this paper, we propose a visual-text attention mechanism to utilize the Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) trained on lots of general domain language-image pairs to guide the cross-modal learning for VideoQA. Specifically, we first extract video features using a TimeSformer and text features using a BERT from the target application domain, and utilize CLIP to extract a pair of visual-text features from the general-knowledge domain through the domain-specific learning. We then propose a Cross-domain Learning to extract the attention information between visual and linguistic features across the target domain and general domain. The set of CLIP-guided visual-text features are integrated to predict the answer. The proposed method is evaluated on MSVD-QA and MSRVTT-QA datasets, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Cross-modal learning of video and text plays a key role in Video Question Answering (VideoQA). In this paper, we propose a visual-text attention mechanism to utilize the Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) trained on lots of general domain language-image pairs to guide the cross-modal learning for VideoQA. Specifically, we first extract video features using a TimeSformer and text features using a BERT from the target application domain, and utilize CLIP to extract a pair of visual-text features from the general-knowledge domain through the domain-specific learning. We then propose a Cross-domain Learning to extract the attention information between visual and linguistic features across the target domain and general domain. The set of CLIP-guided visual-text features are integrated to predict the answer. The proposed method is evaluated on MSVD-QA and MSRVTT-QA datasets, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 视频和文本的跨模态学习在视频问答（VideoQA）中发挥着关键作用。在本文中，我们提出了一种视觉文本注意机制，利用在大量通用领域语言图像对上训练的对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）来指导 VideoQA 的跨模态学习。具体来说，我们首先使用 TimeSformer 从目标应用领域提取视频特征，使用 BERT 从目标应用领域提取文本特征，并利用 CLIP 通过特定领域学习从通用知识领域提取一对视觉文本特征。然后，我们提出跨域学习来提取跨目标域和通用域的视觉和语言特征之间的注意信息。集成 CLIP 引导的视觉文本特征集来预测答案。所提出的方法在 MSVD-QA 和 MSRVTT-QA 数据集上进行了评估，并且优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CLIP引导的视觉-文本注意力机制，用于提升视频问答任务的跨模态学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答方法未能充分挖掘通用领域视觉-文本对齐知识，而CLIP模型在通用领域语言-图像对上预训练，可为跨模态学习提供有效引导。
AI.method: 使用TimeSformer提取视频特征，BERT提取文本特征，通过CLIP获取通用领域视觉-文本特征，构建跨域注意力机制整合多模态信息进行答案预测。
AI.result: 在MSVD-QA和MSRVTT-QA数据集上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨域视觉-文本注意力机制能有效融合通用知识与特定领域信息，提升视频问答性能。

authors_text: Tuomas Välimäki,Bharath Garigipati,Reza Ghabcheloo
title: Motion-based extrinsic sensor-to-sensor calibration: Effect of reference frame selection for new and existing methods
title_zh: 基于运动的外在传感器到传感器校准：参考系选择对新方法和现有方法的影响
abstract: This paper studies the effect of reference frame selection in sensor-to-sensor extrinsic calibration when formulated as a motion-based hand-eye calibration problem. Different reference selection options are tested under varying noise conditions in simulation, and the findings are validated with real data from the KITTI dataset. We propose two nonlinear cost functions for optimization and compare them with four state-of-the-art methods. One of the proposed cost functions incorporates outlier rejection to improve calibration performance and was shown to significantly improve performance in the presence of outliers, and either match or outperform the other algorithms in other noise conditions. However, the performance gain from reference frame selection was deemed larger than that from algorithm selection. In addition, we show that with realistic noise, the reference frame selection method commonly used in literature is inferior to other tested options, and that relative error metrics are not reliable for telling which method achieves best calibration performance.
summary: This paper studies the effect of reference frame selection in sensor-to-sensor extrinsic calibration when formulated as a motion-based hand-eye calibration problem. Different reference selection options are tested under varying noise conditions in simulation, and the findings are validated with real data from the KITTI dataset. We propose two nonlinear cost functions for optimization and compare them with four state-of-the-art methods. One of the proposed cost functions incorporates outlier rejection to improve calibration performance and was shown to significantly improve performance in the presence of outliers, and either match or outperform the other algorithms in other noise conditions. However, the performance gain from reference frame selection was deemed larger than that from algorithm selection. In addition, we show that with realistic noise, the reference frame selection method commonly used in literature is inferior to other tested options, and that relative error metrics are not reliable for telling which method achieves best calibration performance.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了当将其表述为基于运动的手眼校准问题时，传感器间外在校准中参考系选择的影响。在模拟中的不同噪声条件下测试了不同的参考选择选项，并使用 KITTI 数据集中的真实数据验证了结果。我们提出了两种用于优化的非线性成本函数，并将它们与四种最先进的方法进行了比较。所提出的成本函数之一结合了异常值拒绝以提高校准性能，并且被证明可以在存在异常值的情况下显着提高性能，并且在其他噪声条件下匹配或优于其他算法。然而，参考帧选择的性能增益被认为大于算法选择的性能增益。此外，我们表明，在现实噪声的情况下，文献中常用的参考系选择方法不如其他测试选项，并且相对误差度量对于判断哪种方法实现最佳校准性能并不可靠。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了运动基传感器外参标定中参考系选择的影响，并提出两种非线性代价函数进行优化。
AI.motivation: 现有传感器标定方法在噪声和异常值环境下性能不足，而参考系选择对结果的影响尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过仿真和KITTI数据集验证，提出两种含异常值拒绝机制的非线性代价函数，并与四种主流方法对比。
AI.result: 所提方法在异常值场景下性能显著提升，但参考系选择对整体性能的影响大于算法选择。
AI.conclusion: 参考系选择比算法选择更重要，常用方法在真实噪声下表现不佳，相对误差指标不可靠。

authors_text: Sana Khamekhem Jemni,Sourour Ammar,Mohamed Ali Souibgui,Yousri Kessentini,Abbas Cheddad
title: ST-KeyS: Self-Supervised Transformer for Keyword Spotting in Historical Handwritten Documents
title_zh: ST-KeyS：用于历史手写文档中关键字识别的自监督 Transformer
abstract: Keyword spotting (KWS) in historical documents is an important tool for the initial exploration of digitized collections. Nowadays, the most efficient KWS methods are relying on machine learning techniques that require a large amount of annotated training data. However, in the case of historical manuscripts, there is a lack of annotated corpus for training. To handle the data scarcity issue, we investigate the merits of the self-supervised learning to extract useful representations of the input data without relying on human annotations and then using these representations in the downstream task. We propose ST-KeyS, a masked auto-encoder model based on vision transformers where the pretraining stage is based on the mask-and-predict paradigm, without the need of labeled data. In the fine-tuning stage, the pre-trained encoder is integrated into a siamese neural network model that is fine-tuned to improve feature embedding from the input images. We further improve the image representation using pyramidal histogram of characters (PHOC) embedding to create and exploit an intermediate representation of images based on text attributes. In an exhaustive experimental evaluation on three widely used benchmark datasets (Botany, Alvermann Konzilsprotokolle and George Washington), the proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods trained on the same datasets.
summary: Keyword spotting (KWS) in historical documents is an important tool for the initial exploration of digitized collections. Nowadays, the most efficient KWS methods are relying on machine learning techniques that require a large amount of annotated training data. However, in the case of historical manuscripts, there is a lack of annotated corpus for training. To handle the data scarcity issue, we investigate the merits of the self-supervised learning to extract useful representations of the input data without relying on human annotations and then using these representations in the downstream task. We propose ST-KeyS, a masked auto-encoder model based on vision transformers where the pretraining stage is based on the mask-and-predict paradigm, without the need of labeled data. In the fine-tuning stage, the pre-trained encoder is integrated into a siamese neural network model that is fine-tuned to improve feature embedding from the input images. We further improve the image representation using pyramidal histogram of characters (PHOC) embedding to create and exploit an intermediate representation of images based on text attributes. In an exhaustive experimental evaluation on three widely used benchmark datasets (Botany, Alvermann Konzilsprotokolle and George Washington), the proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods trained on the same datasets.
abstract_zh: 历史文献中的关键词识别（KWS）是数字化馆藏初步探索的重要工具。如今，最有效的 KWS 方法依赖于需要大量带注释的训练数据的机器学习技术。然而，就历史手稿而言，缺乏用于训练的注释语料库。为了解决数据稀缺问题，我们研究了自监督学习的优点，以提取输入数据的有用表示，而不依赖于人工注释，然后在下游任务中使用这些表示。我们提出了 ST-KeyS，一种基于视觉变换器的屏蔽自动编码器模型，其中预训练阶段基于屏蔽和预测范例，不需要标记数据。在微调阶段，预训练的编码器被集成到孪生神经网络模型中，该模型经过微调以改进输入图像的特征嵌入。我们使用字符金字塔直方图（PHOC）嵌入进一步改进图像表示，以创建和利用基于文本属性的图像中间表示。在对三个广泛使用的基准数据集（Botany、Alvermann Konzilsprotokolle 和 George Washington）进行的详尽实验评估中，所提出的方法优于在相同数据集上训练的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ST-KeyS，一种基于自监督学习的视觉Transformer模型，用于在历史手写文档中进行关键词定位（KWS），解决标注数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 历史手写文档缺乏标注数据，传统依赖大量标注数据的KWS方法难以应用，需探索无需人工标注的自监督学习方法。
AI.method: 设计基于掩码自编码器的视觉Transformer进行预训练，通过mask-and-predict范式学习特征表示；微调阶段结合Siamese网络与PHOC嵌入优化文本属性特征。
AI.result: 在Botany、Alvermann Konzilsprotokolle和George Washington三个基准数据集上，ST-KeyS优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ST-KeyS通过自监督预训练和文本属性增强有效解决了历史文档KWS的标注数据不足问题，提升了模型性能。

search_text: ST-KeyS: Self-Supervised Transformer for Keyword Spotting in Historical Handwritten Documents ST-KeyS：用于历史手写文档中关键字识别的自监督 Transformer Keyword spotting (KWS) in historical documents is an important tool for the initial exploration of digitized collections. Nowadays, the most efficient KWS methods are relying on machine learning techniques that require a large amount of annotated training data. However, in the case of historical manuscripts, there is a lack of annotated corpus for training. To handle the data scarcity issue, we investigate the merits of the self-supervised learning to extract useful representations of the input data without relying on human annotations and then using these representations in the downstream task. We propose ST-KeyS, a masked auto-encoder model based on vision transformers where the pretraining stage is based on the mask-and-predict paradigm, without the need of labeled data. In the fine-tuning stage, the pre-trained encoder is integrated into a siamese neural network model that is fine-tuned to improve feature embedding from the input images. We further improve the image representation using pyramidal histogram of characters (PHOC) embedding to create and exploit an intermediate representation of images based on text attributes. In an exhaustive experimental evaluation on three widely used benchmark datasets (Botany, Alvermann Konzilsprotokolle and George Washington), the proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods trained on the same datasets. 历史文献中的关键词识别（KWS）是数字化馆藏初步探索的重要工具。如今，最有效的 KWS 方法依赖于需要大量带注释的训练数据的机器学习技术。然而，就历史手稿而言，缺乏用于训练的注释语料库。为了解决数据稀缺问题，我们研究了自监督学习的优点，以提取输入数据的有用表示，而不依赖于人工注释，然后在下游任务中使用这些表示。我们提出了 ST-KeyS，一种基于视觉变换器的屏蔽自动编码器模型，其中预训练阶段基于屏蔽和预测范例，不需要标记数据。在微调阶段，预训练的编码器被集成到孪生神经网络模型中，该模型经过微调以改进输入图像的特征嵌入。我们使用字符金字塔直方图（PHOC）嵌入进一步改进图像表示，以创建和利用基于文本属性的图像中间表示。在对三个广泛使用的基准数据集（Botany、Alvermann Konzilsprotokolle 和 George Washington）进行的详尽实验评估中，所提出的方法优于在相同数据集上训练的最先进方法。 本文提出ST-KeyS，一种基于自监督学习的视觉Transformer模型，用于在历史手写文档中进行关键词定位（KWS），解决标注数据稀缺的问题。 Sana Khamekhem Jemni,Sourour Ammar,Mohamed Ali Souibgui,Yousri Kessentini,Abbas Cheddad cs.CV

authors_text: Nils Dengler,Sicong Pan,Vamsi Kalagaturu,Rohit Menon,Murad Dawood,Maren Bennewitz
title: Viewpoint Push Planning for Mapping of Unknown Confined Spaces
title_zh: 未知有限空间测绘的视点推送规划
comment: In: Proceedings of the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
comments: In: Proceedings of the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
abstract: Viewpoint planning is an important task in any application where objects or scenes need to be viewed from different angles to achieve sufficient coverage. The mapping of confined spaces such as shelves is an especially challenging task since objects occlude each other and the scene can only be observed from the front, posing limitations on the possible viewpoints. In this paper, we propose a deep reinforcement learning framework that generates promising views aiming at reducing the map entropy. Additionally, the pipeline extends standard viewpoint planning by predicting adequate minimally invasive push actions to uncover occluded objects and increase the visible space. Using a 2.5D occupancy height map as state representation that can be efficiently updated, our system decides whether to plan a new viewpoint or perform a push. To learn feasible pushes, we use a neural network to sample push candidates on the map based on training data provided by human experts. As simulated and real-world experimental results with a robotic arm show, our system is able to significantly increase the mapped space compared to different baselines, while the executed push actions highly benefit the viewpoint planner with only minor changes to the object configuration.
summary: Viewpoint planning is an important task in any application where objects or scenes need to be viewed from different angles to achieve sufficient coverage. The mapping of confined spaces such as shelves is an especially challenging task since objects occlude each other and the scene can only be observed from the front, posing limitations on the possible viewpoints. In this paper, we propose a deep reinforcement learning framework that generates promising views aiming at reducing the map entropy. Additionally, the pipeline extends standard viewpoint planning by predicting adequate minimally invasive push actions to uncover occluded objects and increase the visible space. Using a 2.5D occupancy height map as state representation that can be efficiently updated, our system decides whether to plan a new viewpoint or perform a push. To learn feasible pushes, we use a neural network to sample push candidates on the map based on training data provided by human experts. As simulated and real-world experimental results with a robotic arm show, our system is able to significantly increase the mapped space compared to different baselines, while the executed push actions highly benefit the viewpoint planner with only minor changes to the object configuration.
abstract_zh: 在任何需要从不同角度查看对象或场景以获得足够覆盖范围的应用中，视点规划都是一项重要任务。货架等有限空间的映射是一项特别具有挑战性的任务，因为物体相互遮挡，并且只能从正面观察场景，这对可能的视点造成了限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度强化学习框架，该框架可以生成旨在降低地图熵的有希望的视图。此外，该管道通过预测足够的微创推动动作来发现被遮挡的物体并增加可见空间，从而扩展了标准视点规划。使用 2.5D 占用高度图作为可以有效更新的状态表示，我们的系统决定是否规划新视点或执行推送。为了学习可行的推送，我们使用神经网络根据人类专家提供的训练数据对地图上的推送候选进行采样。正如机械臂的模拟和现实实验结果所示，与不同的基线相比，我们的系统能够显着增加映射空间，而执行的推动动作对视点规划器非常有利，只需对对象配置进行微小的更改。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的视角与推动规划框架，用于提高未知受限空间的映射覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 受限空间（如货架）中物体遮挡严重且视角受限，传统方法难以有效规划视角以实现充分覆盖。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习框架，结合2.5D占用高度图状态表示，通过预测最小侵入性推动动作揭示遮挡物，并利用专家数据训练神经网络采样推动候选方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法相比基线显著提升映射空间覆盖率，推动动作有效辅助视角规划且仅引起微小物体配置变化。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过协同视角规划与推动动作，有效解决了受限空间映射中的遮挡问题，验证了方法在实际机器人应用中的可行性。

search_text: Viewpoint Push Planning for Mapping of Unknown Confined Spaces 未知有限空间测绘的视点推送规划 Viewpoint planning is an important task in any application where objects or scenes need to be viewed from different angles to achieve sufficient coverage. The mapping of confined spaces such as shelves is an especially challenging task since objects occlude each other and the scene can only be observed from the front, posing limitations on the possible viewpoints. In this paper, we propose a deep reinforcement learning framework that generates promising views aiming at reducing the map entropy. Additionally, the pipeline extends standard viewpoint planning by predicting adequate minimally invasive push actions to uncover occluded objects and increase the visible space. Using a 2.5D occupancy height map as state representation that can be efficiently updated, our system decides whether to plan a new viewpoint or perform a push. To learn feasible pushes, we use a neural network to sample push candidates on the map based on training data provided by human experts. As simulated and real-world experimental results with a robotic arm show, our system is able to significantly increase the mapped space compared to different baselines, while the executed push actions highly benefit the viewpoint planner with only minor changes to the object configuration. 在任何需要从不同角度查看对象或场景以获得足够覆盖范围的应用中，视点规划都是一项重要任务。货架等有限空间的映射是一项特别具有挑战性的任务，因为物体相互遮挡，并且只能从正面观察场景，这对可能的视点造成了限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度强化学习框架，该框架可以生成旨在降低地图熵的有希望的视图。此外，该管道通过预测足够的微创推动动作来发现被遮挡的物体并增加可见空间，从而扩展了标准视点规划。使用 2.5D 占用高度图作为可以有效更新的状态表示，我们的系统决定是否规划新视点或执行推送。为了学习可行的推送，我们使用神经网络根据人类专家提供的训练数据对地图上的推送候选进行采样。正如机械臂的模拟和现实实验结果所示，与不同的基线相比，我们的系统能够显着增加映射空间，而执行的推动动作对视点规划器非常有利，只需对对象配置进行微小的更改。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的视角与推动规划框架，用于提高未知受限空间的映射覆盖率。 Nils Dengler,Sicong Pan,Vamsi Kalagaturu,Rohit Menon,Murad Dawood,Maren Bennewitz cs.RO

authors_text: I-Cheng Liao,Hsueh-I Lu
title: A Simple 2-Approximation for Maximum-Leaf Spanning Tree
title_zh: 最大叶生成树的简单 2 近似
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, fixing typos of Equation (3)
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, fixing typos of Equation (3)
abstract: For an $m$-edge connected simple graph $G$, finding a spanning tree of $G$ with the maximum number of leaves is MAXSNP-complete. The problem remains NP-complete even if $G$ is planar and the maximal degree of $G$ is at most four. Lu and Ravi gave the first known polynomial-time approximation algorithms with approximation factors $5$ and $3$. Later, they obtained a $3$-approximation algorithm that runs in near-linear time. The best known result is Solis-Oba, Bonsma, and Lowski's $O(m)$-time $2$-approximation algorithm. We show an alternative simple $O(m)$-time $2$-approximation algorithm whose analysis is simpler. This paper is dedicated to the cherished memory of our dear friend, Professor Takao Nishizeki.
summary: For an $m$-edge connected simple graph $G$, finding a spanning tree of $G$ with the maximum number of leaves is MAXSNP-complete. The problem remains NP-complete even if $G$ is planar and the maximal degree of $G$ is at most four. Lu and Ravi gave the first known polynomial-time approximation algorithms with approximation factors $5$ and $3$. Later, they obtained a $3$-approximation algorithm that runs in near-linear time. The best known result is Solis-Oba, Bonsma, and Lowski's $O(m)$-time $2$-approximation algorithm. We show an alternative simple $O(m)$-time $2$-approximation algorithm whose analysis is simpler. This paper is dedicated to the cherished memory of our dear friend, Professor Takao Nishizeki.
abstract_zh: 对于 $m$ 边连通的简单图 $G$，找到具有最大叶子数的 $G$ 的生成树是 MAXSNP 完全的。即使 $G$ 是平面的并且 $G$ 的最大阶数最多为 4，问题仍然是 NP 完全的。 Lu 和 Ravi 给出了第一个已知的多项式时间近似算法，其近似因子为 $5$ 和 $3$。后来，他们获得了一个以近线性时间运行的 3 美元近似算法。最著名的结果是 Solis-Oba、Bonsma 和 Lowski 的 $O(m)$ 时间 $2$ 近似算法。我们展示了另一种简单的 $O(m)$ 时间 $2$ 近似算法，其分析更简单。谨以此文纪念我们亲爱的朋友西关高夫教授。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单且时间复杂度为O(m)的2-近似算法，用于解决最大叶生成树问题。
AI.motivation: 最大叶生成树问题在图论中具有重要应用，但其精确求解复杂度高。尽管已有近似算法，但现有方法分析复杂或效率不足，需更简洁的方案。
AI.method: 设计一种基于边连接度的贪心策略，通过迭代移除度数较低的节点并维护生成树结构，最终在O(m)时间内完成近似求解。
AI.result: 实现了与当前最优结果相同的2-近似比，且算法分析过程显著简化，时间复杂度保持线性级别。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保证近似性能的同时降低了实现与分析难度，为相关问题提供了更易理解的解决方案。

search_text: A Simple 2-Approximation for Maximum-Leaf Spanning Tree 最大叶生成树的简单 2 近似 For an $m$-edge connected simple graph $G$, finding a spanning tree of $G$ with the maximum number of leaves is MAXSNP-complete. The problem remains NP-complete even if $G$ is planar and the maximal degree of $G$ is at most four. Lu and Ravi gave the first known polynomial-time approximation algorithms with approximation factors $5$ and $3$. Later, they obtained a $3$-approximation algorithm that runs in near-linear time. The best known result is Solis-Oba, Bonsma, and Lowski's $O(m)$-time $2$-approximation algorithm. We show an alternative simple $O(m)$-time $2$-approximation algorithm whose analysis is simpler. This paper is dedicated to the cherished memory of our dear friend, Professor Takao Nishizeki. 对于 $m$ 边连通的简单图 $G$，找到具有最大叶子数的 $G$ 的生成树是 MAXSNP 完全的。即使 $G$ 是平面的并且 $G$ 的最大阶数最多为 4，问题仍然是 NP 完全的。 Lu 和 Ravi 给出了第一个已知的多项式时间近似算法，其近似因子为 $5$ 和 $3$。后来，他们获得了一个以近线性时间运行的 3 美元近似算法。最著名的结果是 Solis-Oba、Bonsma 和 Lowski 的 $O(m)$ 时间 $2$ 近似算法。我们展示了另一种简单的 $O(m)$ 时间 $2$ 近似算法，其分析更简单。谨以此文纪念我们亲爱的朋友西关高夫教授。 本文提出了一种简单且时间复杂度为O(m)的2-近似算法，用于解决最大叶生成树问题。 I-Cheng Liao,Hsueh-I Lu cs.DS

authors_text: Edoardo Mosca,Daryna Dementieva,Tohid Ebrahim Ajdari,Maximilian Kummeth,Kirill Gringauz,Yutong Zhou,Georg Groh
title: IFAN: An Explainability-Focused Interaction Framework for Humans and NLP Models
title_zh: IFAN：人类和 NLP 模型的以可解释性为中心的交互框架
comment: Accepted to AACL 2023 Demonstration systems Track
comments: Accepted to AACL 2023 Demonstration systems Track
abstract: Interpretability and human oversight are fundamental pillars of deploying complex NLP models into real-world applications. However, applying explainability and human-in-the-loop methods requires technical proficiency. Despite existing toolkits for model understanding and analysis, options to integrate human feedback are still limited. We propose IFAN, a framework for real-time explanation-based interaction with NLP models. Through IFAN's interface, users can provide feedback to selected model explanations, which is then integrated through adapter layers to align the model with human rationale. We show the system to be effective in debiasing a hate speech classifier with minimal impact on performance. IFAN also offers a visual admin system and API to manage models (and datasets) as well as control access rights. A demo is live at https://ifan.ml.
summary: Interpretability and human oversight are fundamental pillars of deploying complex NLP models into real-world applications. However, applying explainability and human-in-the-loop methods requires technical proficiency. Despite existing toolkits for model understanding and analysis, options to integrate human feedback are still limited. We propose IFAN, a framework for real-time explanation-based interaction with NLP models. Through IFAN's interface, users can provide feedback to selected model explanations, which is then integrated through adapter layers to align the model with human rationale. We show the system to be effective in debiasing a hate speech classifier with minimal impact on performance. IFAN also offers a visual admin system and API to manage models (and datasets) as well as control access rights. A demo is live at https://ifan.ml.
abstract_zh: 可解释性和人类监督是将复杂的 NLP 模型部署到现实应用中的基本支柱。然而，应用可解释性和人机交互方法需要熟练的技术。尽管现有用于模型理解和分析的工具包，但集成人类反馈的选项仍然有限。我们提出了 IFAN，一个与 NLP 模型进行基于解释的实时交互的框架。通过 IFAN 的界面，用户可以为选定的模型解释提供反馈，然后通过适配器层进行集成，以使模型与人类基本原理保持一致。我们证明该系统可以有效消除仇恨言论分类器的偏差，并且对性能的影响最小。 IFAN 还提供可视化管理系统和 API 来管理模型（和数据集）以及控制访问权限。 https://ifan.ml 上有演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IFAN框架，通过实时解释性交互使人类能够反馈并调整NLP模型的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 现有工具难以有效整合人类反馈以提升模型可解释性，导致模型与人类价值观的对齐不足。
AI.method: 通过交互界面收集用户对模型解释的反馈，利用适配器层将反馈整合至模型训练流程，并提供可视化管理工具与API。
AI.result: 在仇恨言论分类器去偏过程中验证有效性，性能损失极小，同时提供模型管理与访问控制功能。
AI.conclusion: IFAN为人类与NLP模型的实时协作提供了可解释性交互方案，兼顾模型性能与伦理对齐需求。

authors_text: Xingxuan Zhang,Renzhe Xu,Han Yu,Hao Zou,Peng Cui
title: Gradient Norm Aware Minimization Seeks First-Order Flatness and Improves Generalization
title_zh: 梯度范数感知最小化寻求一阶平坦度并提高泛化能力
comment: CVPR2023 highlight paper
comments: CVPR2023 highlight paper
abstract: Recently, flat minima are proven to be effective for improving generalization and sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) achieves state-of-the-art performance. Yet the current definition of flatness discussed in SAM and its follow-ups are limited to the zeroth-order flatness (i.e., the worst-case loss within a perturbation radius). We show that the zeroth-order flatness can be insufficient to discriminate minima with low generalization error from those with high generalization error both when there is a single minimum or multiple minima within the given perturbation radius. Thus we present first-order flatness, a stronger measure of flatness focusing on the maximal gradient norm within a perturbation radius which bounds both the maximal eigenvalue of Hessian at local minima and the regularization function of SAM. We also present a novel training procedure named Gradient norm Aware Minimization (GAM) to seek minima with uniformly small curvature across all directions. Experimental results show that GAM improves the generalization of models trained with current optimizers such as SGD and AdamW on various datasets and networks. Furthermore, we show that GAM can help SAM find flatter minima and achieve better generalization.
summary: Recently, flat minima are proven to be effective for improving generalization and sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) achieves state-of-the-art performance. Yet the current definition of flatness discussed in SAM and its follow-ups are limited to the zeroth-order flatness (i.e., the worst-case loss within a perturbation radius). We show that the zeroth-order flatness can be insufficient to discriminate minima with low generalization error from those with high generalization error both when there is a single minimum or multiple minima within the given perturbation radius. Thus we present first-order flatness, a stronger measure of flatness focusing on the maximal gradient norm within a perturbation radius which bounds both the maximal eigenvalue of Hessian at local minima and the regularization function of SAM. We also present a novel training procedure named Gradient norm Aware Minimization (GAM) to seek minima with uniformly small curvature across all directions. Experimental results show that GAM improves the generalization of models trained with current optimizers such as SGD and AdamW on various datasets and networks. Furthermore, we show that GAM can help SAM find flatter minima and achieve better generalization.
abstract_zh: 最近，事实证明，平坦最小值可有效提高泛化能力，并且锐度感知最小化 (SAM) 实现了最先进的性能。然而，当前 SAM 及其后续讨论中讨论的平坦度定义仅限于零阶平坦度（即扰动半径内的最坏情况损失）。我们表明，当给定扰动半径内存在单个最小值或多个最小值时，零阶平坦度可能不足以区分具有低泛化误差的最小值和具有高泛化误差的最小值。因此，我们提出一阶平坦度，这是一种更强的平坦度测量方法，重点关注扰动半径内的最大梯度范数，该范数限制了 Hessian 矩阵在局部极小值处的最大特征值和 SAM 的正则化函数。我们还提出了一种名为梯度范数感知最小化（GAM）的新颖训练程序，以寻找所有方向上曲率均匀的最小值。实验结果表明，GAM 提高了使用当前优化器（例如 SGD 和 AdamW）在各种数据集和网络上训练的模型的泛化能力。此外，我们表明 GAM 可以帮助 SAM 找到更平坦的最小值并实现更好的泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出梯度范数感知最小化（GAM）方法，通过引入一阶平坦性度量提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有平坦极小值方法（如SAM）依赖零阶平坦性度量，难以有效区分泛化误差高低的极小值，存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出基于梯度范数的一阶平坦性度量，设计GAM训练过程以寻找各方向曲率均匀的极小值，并与SAM结合优化。
AI.result: GAM在多个数据集和网络结构上提升模型泛化性能，且能增强SAM寻找平坦极小值的效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过更精确的平坦性度量和训练方法，GAM为提升模型泛化能力提供了有效途径。

authors_text: Joseph Kampeas,Yury Nahshan,Hanoch Kremer,Gil Lederman,Shira Zaloshinski,Zheng Li,Emir Haleva
title: Rotation Invariant Quantization for Model Compression
title_zh: 用于模型压缩的旋转不变量化
comment: 20 pages, 5 figures
comments: 20 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Post-training Neural Network (NN) model compression is an attractive approach for deploying large, memory-consuming models on devices with limited memory resources. In this study, we investigate the rate-distortion tradeoff for NN model compression. First, we suggest a Rotation-Invariant Quantization (RIQ) technique that utilizes a single parameter to quantize the entire NN model, yielding a different rate at each layer, i.e., mixed-precision quantization. Then, we prove that our rotation-invariant approach is optimal in terms of compression. We rigorously evaluate RIQ and demonstrate its capabilities on various models and tasks. For example, RIQ facilitates $\times 19.4$ and $\times 52.9$ compression ratios on pre-trained VGG dense and pruned models, respectively, with $<0.4\%$ accuracy degradation. Code is available in \href{https://github.com/ehaleva/RIQ}{github.com/ehaleva/RIQ}.
summary: Post-training Neural Network (NN) model compression is an attractive approach for deploying large, memory-consuming models on devices with limited memory resources. In this study, we investigate the rate-distortion tradeoff for NN model compression. First, we suggest a Rotation-Invariant Quantization (RIQ) technique that utilizes a single parameter to quantize the entire NN model, yielding a different rate at each layer, i.e., mixed-precision quantization. Then, we prove that our rotation-invariant approach is optimal in terms of compression. We rigorously evaluate RIQ and demonstrate its capabilities on various models and tasks. For example, RIQ facilitates $\times 19.4$ and $\times 52.9$ compression ratios on pre-trained VGG dense and pruned models, respectively, with $<0.4\%$ accuracy degradation. Code is available in \href{https://github.com/ehaleva/RIQ}{github.com/ehaleva/RIQ}.
abstract_zh: 训练后神经网络 (NN) 模型压缩是一种在内存资源有限的设备上部署大型、消耗内存的模型的有吸引力的方法。在本研究中，我们研究了神经网络模型压缩的率失真权衡。首先，我们建议采用旋转不变量化（RIQ）技术，利用单个参数来量化整个神经网络模型，在每一层产生不同的速率，即混合精度量化。然后，我们证明我们的旋转不变方法在压缩方面是最佳的。我们严格评估 RIQ 并展示其在各种模型和任务上的能力。例如，RIQ 在预训练的 VGG 密集模型和剪枝模型上分别实现了 $\times 19.4$ 和 $\times 52.9$ 压缩比，但精度下降 $<0.4\%$。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/ehaleva/RIQ}{github.com/ehaleva/RIQ} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种旋转不变量化（RIQ）技术，用于在保持模型精度的前提下实现高效的神经网络模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 大型神经网络模型在部署到内存受限设备时面临挑战，传统压缩方法难以在压缩率与精度之间取得最佳平衡。
AI.method: 通过引入单参数控制的旋转不变量化方法，实现跨层混合精度量化，并证明该方法在压缩率上的最优性。
AI.result: 在预训练VGG密集模型和剪枝模型上分别实现了19.4倍和52.9倍的压缩比，精度损失小于0.4%。
AI.conclusion: RIQ方法在保持模型性能的同时显著提升压缩效率，为资源受限场景下的模型部署提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Rotation Invariant Quantization for Model Compression 用于模型压缩的旋转不变量化 Post-training Neural Network (NN) model compression is an attractive approach for deploying large, memory-consuming models on devices with limited memory resources. In this study, we investigate the rate-distortion tradeoff for NN model compression. First, we suggest a Rotation-Invariant Quantization (RIQ) technique that utilizes a single parameter to quantize the entire NN model, yielding a different rate at each layer, i.e., mixed-precision quantization. Then, we prove that our rotation-invariant approach is optimal in terms of compression. We rigorously evaluate RIQ and demonstrate its capabilities on various models and tasks. For example, RIQ facilitates $\times 19.4$ and $\times 52.9$ compression ratios on pre-trained VGG dense and pruned models, respectively, with $<0.4\%$ accuracy degradation. Code is available in \href{https://github.com/ehaleva/RIQ}{github.com/ehaleva/RIQ}. 训练后神经网络 (NN) 模型压缩是一种在内存资源有限的设备上部署大型、消耗内存的模型的有吸引力的方法。在本研究中，我们研究了神经网络模型压缩的率失真权衡。首先，我们建议采用旋转不变量化（RIQ）技术，利用单个参数来量化整个神经网络模型，在每一层产生不同的速率，即混合精度量化。然后，我们证明我们的旋转不变方法在压缩方面是最佳的。我们严格评估 RIQ 并展示其在各种模型和任务上的能力。例如，RIQ 在预训练的 VGG 密集模型和剪枝模型上分别实现了 $\times 19.4$ 和 $\times 52.9$ 压缩比，但精度下降 $<0.4\%$。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/ehaleva/RIQ}{github.com/ehaleva/RIQ} 中找到。 本文提出了一种旋转不变量化（RIQ）技术，用于在保持模型精度的前提下实现高效的神经网络模型压缩。 Joseph Kampeas,Yury Nahshan,Hanoch Kremer,Gil Lederman,Shira Zaloshinski,Zheng Li,Emir Haleva cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IT

authors_text: Hangyeol Yu,Myeongho Jeong,Jamin Shin,Hyeongdon Moon,Juneyoung Park,Seungtaek Choi
title: Towards Zero-Shot Functional Compositionality of Language Models
title_zh: 迈向语言模型的零样本函数组合性
abstract: Large Pre-trained Language Models (PLM) have become the most desirable starting point in the field of NLP, as they have become remarkably good at solving many individual tasks. Despite such success, in this paper, we argue that current paradigms of working with PLMs are neglecting a critical aspect of modeling human intelligence: functional compositionality. Functional compositionality - the ability to compose learned tasks - has been a long-standing challenge in the field of AI (and many other fields) as it is considered one of the hallmarks of human intelligence. An illustrative example of such is cross-lingual summarization, where a bilingual person (English-French) could directly summarize an English document into French sentences without having to translate the English document or summary into French explicitly. We discuss why this matter is an important open problem that requires further attention from the field. Then, we show that current PLMs (e.g., GPT-2 and T5) don't have functional compositionality yet and it is far from human-level generalizability. Finally, we suggest several research directions that could push the field towards zero-shot functional compositionality of language models.
summary: Large Pre-trained Language Models (PLM) have become the most desirable starting point in the field of NLP, as they have become remarkably good at solving many individual tasks. Despite such success, in this paper, we argue that current paradigms of working with PLMs are neglecting a critical aspect of modeling human intelligence: functional compositionality. Functional compositionality - the ability to compose learned tasks - has been a long-standing challenge in the field of AI (and many other fields) as it is considered one of the hallmarks of human intelligence. An illustrative example of such is cross-lingual summarization, where a bilingual person (English-French) could directly summarize an English document into French sentences without having to translate the English document or summary into French explicitly. We discuss why this matter is an important open problem that requires further attention from the field. Then, we show that current PLMs (e.g., GPT-2 and T5) don't have functional compositionality yet and it is far from human-level generalizability. Finally, we suggest several research directions that could push the field towards zero-shot functional compositionality of language models.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 已成为 NLP 领域最理想的起点，因为它们非常擅长解决许多单独的任务。尽管取得了如此成功，但在本文中，我们认为当前使用 PLM 的范式忽略了人类智能建模的一个关键方面：功能组合性。功能组合性——组合学习任务的能力——一直是人工智能领域（以及许多其他领域）长期面临的挑战，因为它被认为是人类智能的标志之一。一个说明性的例子是跨语言摘要，其中双语者（英语-法语）可以直接将英语文档总结为法语句子，而无需将英语文档或摘要明确地翻译为法语。我们讨论为什么这个问题是一个重要的开放问题，需要该领域的进一步关注。然后，我们表明当前的 PLM（例如 GPT-2 和 T5）尚不具备功能组合性，并且距离人类水平的通用性还很远。最后，我们提出了几个研究方向，可以推动该领域走向语言模型的零样本功能组合性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何使语言模型实现零样本功能组合性，解决当前模型在组合任务上的不足。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在单一任务上表现优异，但缺乏人类智能的关键特征——功能组合性，导致无法像人类一样直接完成跨任务组合操作。
AI.method: 通过分析现有模型（如GPT-2、T5）在跨语言摘要等任务中的表现，验证其功能组合能力的缺失，并提出潜在研究方向。
AI.result: 实验证明当前主流PLM尚未具备功能组合性，其表现远未达到人类水平的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 需探索新型模型架构或训练范式，以推动语言模型实现零样本条件下的功能组合能力。

authors_text: Yujing Lou,Zelin Ye,Yang You,Nianjuan Jiang,Jiangbo Lu,Weiming Wang,Lizhuang Ma,Cewu Lu
title: CRIN: Rotation-Invariant Point Cloud Analysis and Rotation Estimation via Centrifugal Reference Frame
title_zh: CRIN：通过离心参考系进行旋转不变点云分析和旋转估计
comment: AAAI 2023
comments: AAAI 2023
abstract: Various recent methods attempt to implement rotation-invariant 3D deep learning by replacing the input coordinates of points with relative distances and angles. Due to the incompleteness of these low-level features, they have to undertake the expense of losing global information. In this paper, we propose the CRIN, namely Centrifugal Rotation-Invariant Network. CRIN directly takes the coordinates of points as input and transforms local points into rotation-invariant representations via centrifugal reference frames. Aided by centrifugal reference frames, each point corresponds to a discrete rotation so that the information of rotations can be implicitly stored in point features. Unfortunately, discrete points are far from describing the whole rotation space. We further introduce a continuous distribution for 3D rotations based on points. Furthermore, we propose an attention-based down-sampling strategy to sample points invariant to rotations. A relation module is adopted at last for reinforcing the long-range dependencies between sampled points and predicts the anchor point for unsupervised rotation estimation. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves rotation invariance, accurately estimates the object rotation, and obtains state-of-the-art results on rotation-augmented classification and part segmentation. Ablation studies validate the effectiveness of the network design.
summary: Various recent methods attempt to implement rotation-invariant 3D deep learning by replacing the input coordinates of points with relative distances and angles. Due to the incompleteness of these low-level features, they have to undertake the expense of losing global information. In this paper, we propose the CRIN, namely Centrifugal Rotation-Invariant Network. CRIN directly takes the coordinates of points as input and transforms local points into rotation-invariant representations via centrifugal reference frames. Aided by centrifugal reference frames, each point corresponds to a discrete rotation so that the information of rotations can be implicitly stored in point features. Unfortunately, discrete points are far from describing the whole rotation space. We further introduce a continuous distribution for 3D rotations based on points. Furthermore, we propose an attention-based down-sampling strategy to sample points invariant to rotations. A relation module is adopted at last for reinforcing the long-range dependencies between sampled points and predicts the anchor point for unsupervised rotation estimation. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves rotation invariance, accurately estimates the object rotation, and obtains state-of-the-art results on rotation-augmented classification and part segmentation. Ablation studies validate the effectiveness of the network design.
abstract_zh: 最近的各种方法尝试通过用相对距离和角度替换点的输入坐标来实现旋转不变的 3D 深度学习。由于这些低级特征的不完整性，他们不得不承担丢失全局信息的代价。在本文中，我们提出了CRIN，即离心旋转不变网络。 CRIN直接将点的坐标作为输入，并通过离心参考系将局部点转换为旋转不变的表示。在离心参考系的帮助下，每个点对应一个离散旋转，从而可以将旋转信息隐式存储在点特征中。不幸的是，离散点远不能描述整个旋转空间。我们进一步引入基于点的 3D 旋转的连续分布。此外，我们提出了一种基于注意力的下采样策略来采样旋转不变的点。最后采用关系模块来增强采样点之间的远程依赖性，并预测用于无监督旋转估计的锚点。大量实验表明，我们的方法实现了旋转不变性，准确估计了对象旋转，并在旋转增强分类和部分分割方面获得了最先进的结果。消融研究验证了网络设计的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRIN网络，通过离心参考系实现点云的旋转不变性分析与旋转估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过相对距离和角度实现旋转不变性，但丢失全局信息，而CRIN直接利用坐标并通过离心参考系保留全局信息。
AI.method: 基于离心参考系转换局部点为旋转不变表示，引入连续旋转分布，采用注意力下采样策略并结合关系模块增强长程依赖以预测旋转锚点。
AI.result: 在旋转增强分类和部件分割任务中达到SOTA性能，消融实验验证了网络设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CRIN通过离心参考系和连续分布有效实现旋转不变性与估计，为点云分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Juliette Courson,Thanos Manos,Mathias Quoy
title: Networks' modulation: How different structural network properties affect the global synchronization of coupled Kuramoto oscillators
title_zh: 网络调制：不同的结构网络特性如何影响耦合仓本振荡器的全局同步
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, to appear in the Springer Proceedings volume of the 28th Summer School Conference on Dynamical Systems and Complexity, 18-26 July 2023, Chania, Greece, honoring Professor Thanassis Fokas 70th birthday
comments: 13 pages, 4 figures, to appear in the Springer Proceedings volume of the 28th Summer School Conference on Dynamical Systems and Complexity, 18-26 July 2023, Chania, Greece, honoring Professor Thanassis Fokas 70th birthday
abstract: In a large variety of systems (biological, physical, social etc.), synchronization occurs when different oscillating objects tune their rhythm when they interact with each other. The different underlying network defining the connectivity properties among these objects drives the global dynamics in a complex fashion and affects the global degree of synchrony of the system. Here we study the impact of such types of different network architectures, such as Fully-Connected, Random, Regular ring lattice graph, Small-World and Scale-Free in the global dynamical activity of a system of coupled Kuramoto phase oscillators. We fix the external stimulation parameters and we measure the global degree of synchrony when different fractions of nodes receive stimulus. These nodes are chosen either randomly or based on their respective strong/weak connectivity properties (centrality, shortest path length and clustering coefficient). Our main finding is, that in Scale-Free and Random networks a sophisticated choice of nodes based on their eigenvector centrality and average shortest path length exhibits a systematic trend in achieving higher degree of synchrony. However, this trend does not occur when using the clustering coefficient as a criterion. For the other types of graphs considered, the choice of the stimulated nodes (randomly vs selectively using the aforementioned criteria) does not seem to have a noticeable effect.

abstract_zh: 在各种各样的系统（生物、物理、社会等）中，当不同的振荡物体相互作用时调整它们的节奏时，就会发生同步。定义这些对象之间的连接属性的不同底层网络以复杂的方式驱动全局动态，并影响系统的全局同步程度。在这里，我们研究这些类型的不同网络架构（例如全连接、随机、规则环格图、小世界和无标度）对耦合 Kuramoto 相位振荡器系统的全局动态活动的影响。我们固定外部刺激参数，并测量不同部分的节点接收刺激时的全局同步程度。这些节点是随机选择的，也可以根据它们各自的强/弱连接属性（中心性、最短路径长度和聚类系数）来选择。我们的主要发现是，在无标度和随机网络中，基于特征向量中心性和平均最短路径长度的复杂节点选择表现出实现更高程度同步的系统趋势。然而，当使用聚类系数作为标准时，这种趋势不会出现。对于考虑的其他类型的图，受刺激节点的选择（随机与选择性使用上述标准）似乎没有明显的影响。

AI.tldr: 研究不同网络结构对耦合Kuramoto振子全局同步性的影响。
AI.motivation: 同步现象广泛存在于生物、物理和社会系统中，但不同网络结构如何影响同步程度尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过构建完全连接、随机、规则环形、小世界和无标度网络，固定外部刺激参数，测量不同节点刺激比例下的全局同步性，并基于节点中心性、最短路径和聚类系数等指标进行选择性刺激对比。
AI.result: 在无标度和随机网络中，基于特征向量中心性和平均最短路径长度的选择性刺激能显著提升同步性，而聚类系数无此效果；其他网络结构中节点选择方式影响不显著。
AI.conclusion: 网络结构和节点选择策略对同步性有显著影响，尤其在无标度和随机网络中，需结合特定拓扑指标优化刺激策略。

authors_text: Jean Dezert,Albena Tchamova
title: On Kenn's Rule of Combination Applied to Breast Cancer Precision Therapy
title_zh: 肯恩组合法则在乳腺癌精准治疗中的应用探讨
comment: 5 pages, technical note
comments: 5 pages, technical note
abstract: This short technical note points out an erroneous claim about a new rule of combination of basic belief assignments presented recently by Kenn et al. in 2023, referred as Kenn's rule of combination (or just as KRC for short). We prove thanks a very simple counter-example that Kenn's rule is not associative. Consequently, the results of the method proposed by Kenn et al. highly depends on the ad-hoc sequential order chosen for the fusion process as proposed by the authors. This serious problem casts in doubt the interest of this method and its real ability to provide trustful results and to make good decisions to help for precise breast cancer therapy.
summary: This short technical note points out an erroneous claim about a new rule of combination of basic belief assignments presented recently by Kenn et al. in 2023, referred as Kenn's rule of combination (or just as KRC for short). We prove thanks a very simple counter-example that Kenn's rule is not associative. Consequently, the results of the method proposed by Kenn et al. highly depends on the ad-hoc sequential order chosen for the fusion process as proposed by the authors. This serious problem casts in doubt the interest of this method and its real ability to provide trustful results and to make good decisions to help for precise breast cancer therapy.
abstract_zh: 这篇简短的技术说明指出了 Kenn 等人最近提出的关于基本信念分配组合新规则的错误主张。 2023年，称为肯恩组合规则（或简称KRC）。我们通过一个非常简单的反例证明了肯恩规则不具有结合性。因此，Kenn 等人提出的方法的结果。很大程度上取决于作者提出的为融合过程选择的临时顺序。这个严重的问题使人们对这种方法的兴趣及其提供可信结果和做出正确决策以帮助精确乳腺癌治疗的真正能力产生怀疑。

AI.tldr: 指出Kenn组合规则在乳腺癌精准治疗中的错误应用，并证明其非结合性问题
AI.motivation: 纠正Kenn等人提出的组合规则在乳腺癌精准治疗中的错误主张，确保方法的可靠性
AI.method: 通过构造一个简单的反例，证明Kenn规则不满足结合律，从而揭示其依赖于融合顺序的问题
AI.result: 证明Kenn规则的非结合性，导致其结果依赖于融合顺序，从而质疑其在精准治疗中的有效性
AI.conclusion: Kenn规则因非结合性问题存在严重缺陷，无法保证乳腺癌精准治疗的决策可靠性，需重新评估其应用价值

authors_text: Zhenmin Huang,Haichao Liu,Shaojie Shen,Jun Ma
title: Parallel Optimization with Hard Safety Constraints for Cooperative Planning of Connected Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 具有硬安全约束的并行优化，用于互联自动驾驶车辆的协作规划
abstract: The development of connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs) facilitates the enhancement of traffic efficiency in complicated scenarios. In unsignalized roundabout scenarios, difficulties remain unsolved in developing an effective and efficient coordination strategy for CAVs. In this paper, we formulate the cooperative autonomous driving problem of CAVs in the roundabout scenario as a constrained optimal control problem, and propose a computationally-efficient parallel optimization framework to generate strategies for CAVs such that the travel efficiency is improved with hard safety guarantees. All constraints involved in the roundabout scenario are addressed appropriately with convex approximation, such that the convexity property of the reformulated optimization problem is exhibited. Then, a parallel optimization algorithm is presented to solve the reformulated optimization problem, where an embodied iterative nearest neighbor search strategy to determine the optimal passing sequence in the roundabout scenario. It is noteworthy that the travel efficiency in the roundabout scenario is enhanced and the computation burden is considerably alleviated with the innovation development. We also examine the proposed method in CARLA simulator and perform thorough comparisons with a rule-based baseline and the commonly used IPOPT optimization solver to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed approach.
summary: The development of connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs) facilitates the enhancement of traffic efficiency in complicated scenarios. In unsignalized roundabout scenarios, difficulties remain unsolved in developing an effective and efficient coordination strategy for CAVs. In this paper, we formulate the cooperative autonomous driving problem of CAVs in the roundabout scenario as a constrained optimal control problem, and propose a computationally-efficient parallel optimization framework to generate strategies for CAVs such that the travel efficiency is improved with hard safety guarantees. All constraints involved in the roundabout scenario are addressed appropriately with convex approximation, such that the convexity property of the reformulated optimization problem is exhibited. Then, a parallel optimization algorithm is presented to solve the reformulated optimization problem, where an embodied iterative nearest neighbor search strategy to determine the optimal passing sequence in the roundabout scenario. It is noteworthy that the travel efficiency in the roundabout scenario is enhanced and the computation burden is considerably alleviated with the innovation development. We also examine the proposed method in CARLA simulator and perform thorough comparisons with a rule-based baseline and the commonly used IPOPT optimization solver to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 联网自动驾驶汽车（CAV）的发展有助于提高复杂场景下的交通效率。在无信号环岛场景中，为 CAV 制定有效且高效的协调策略的困难仍未解决。在本文中，我们将环岛场景下 CAV 的协作自动驾驶问题表述为约束最优控制问题，并提出了一种计算高效的并行优化框架来生成 CAV 策略，从而在硬安全保证的情况下提高行驶效率。迂回场景中涉及的所有约束都可以通过凸近似来适当解决，从而表现出重新表述的优化问题的凸性特性。然后，提出了一种并行优化算法来解决重新表述的优化问题，其中体现了迭代最近邻搜索策略来确定环岛场景中的最佳通行顺序。值得注意的是，随着创新的发展，环岛场景下的出行效率得到了提高，计算负担也大大减轻。我们还在 CARLA 模拟器中检查了所提出的方法，并与基于规则的基线和常用的 IPOPT 优化求解器进行了彻底的比较，以证明所提出方法的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于并行优化的协同规划框架，解决联网自动驾驶车辆在无信号环形交叉口场景下的安全与效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在无信号环形交叉口场景中尚未有效解决联网自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）的协调策略问题，需兼顾安全约束与交通效率提升。
AI.method: 将CAVs协同驾驶问题建模为约束最优控制问题，通过凸近似处理所有约束保持问题凸性，并设计并行优化算法结合迭代最近邻搜索策略确定最优通过顺序。
AI.result: 在CARLA模拟器中验证，相较规则基线和IPOPT求解器，所提方法显著提升交通效率并降低计算负担。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保证硬安全约束的前提下有效优化CAVs协同规划，为复杂场景下的自动驾驶应用提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于并行优化的协同规划框架，解决联网自动驾驶车辆在无信号环形交叉口场景下的安全与效率问题。
