search_text: Parallel Optimization with Hard Safety Constraints for Cooperative Planning of Connected Autonomous Vehicles 具有硬安全约束的并行优化，用于互联自动驾驶车辆的协作规划 The development of connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs) facilitates the enhancement of traffic efficiency in complicated scenarios. In unsignalized roundabout scenarios, difficulties remain unsolved in developing an effective and efficient coordination strategy for CAVs. In this paper, we formulate the cooperative autonomous driving problem of CAVs in the roundabout scenario as a constrained optimal control problem, and propose a computationally-efficient parallel optimization framework to generate strategies for CAVs such that the travel efficiency is improved with hard safety guarantees. All constraints involved in the roundabout scenario are addressed appropriately with convex approximation, such that the convexity property of the reformulated optimization problem is exhibited. Then, a parallel optimization algorithm is presented to solve the reformulated optimization problem, where an embodied iterative nearest neighbor search strategy to determine the optimal passing sequence in the roundabout scenario. It is noteworthy that the travel efficiency in the roundabout scenario is enhanced and the computation burden is considerably alleviated with the innovation development. We also examine the proposed method in CARLA simulator and perform thorough comparisons with a rule-based baseline and the commonly used IPOPT optimization solver to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed approach. 联网自动驾驶汽车（CAV）的发展有助于提高复杂场景下的交通效率。在无信号环岛场景中，为 CAV 制定有效且高效的协调策略的困难仍未解决。在本文中，我们将环岛场景下 CAV 的协作自动驾驶问题表述为约束最优控制问题，并提出了一种计算高效的并行优化框架来生成 CAV 策略，从而在硬安全保证的情况下提高行驶效率。迂回场景中涉及的所有约束都可以通过凸近似来适当解决，从而表现出重新表述的优化问题的凸性特性。然后，提出了一种并行优化算法来解决重新表述的优化问题，其中体现了迭代最近邻搜索策略来确定环岛场景中的最佳通行顺序。值得注意的是，随着创新的发展，环岛场景下的出行效率得到了提高，计算负担也大大减轻。我们还在 CARLA 模拟器中检查了所提出的方法，并与基于规则的基线和常用的 IPOPT 优化求解器进行了彻底的比较，以证明所提出方法的有效性和效率。 本文提出一种基于并行优化的协同规划框架，解决联网自动驾驶车辆在无信号环形交叉口场景下的安全与效率问题。 Zhenmin Huang,Haichao Liu,Shaojie Shen,Jun Ma cs.RO,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Quentin Herau,Nathan Piasco,Moussab Bennehar,Luis Roldão,Dzmitry Tsishkou,Cyrille Migniot,Pascal Vasseur,Cédric Demonceaux
title: MOISST: Multimodal Optimization of Implicit Scene for SpatioTemporal calibration
title_zh: MOISST：时空校准隐式场景的多模态优化
comment: Accepted at IROS2023 Project site: https://qherau.github.io/MOISST/
comments: Accepted at IROS2023 Project site: https://qherau.github.io/MOISST/
abstract: With the recent advances in autonomous driving and the decreasing cost of LiDARs, the use of multimodal sensor systems is on the rise. However, in order to make use of the information provided by a variety of complimentary sensors, it is necessary to accurately calibrate them. We take advantage of recent advances in computer graphics and implicit volumetric scene representation to tackle the problem of multi-sensor spatial and temporal calibration. Thanks to a new formulation of the Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) optimization, we are able to jointly optimize calibration parameters along with scene representation based on radiometric and geometric measurements. Our method enables accurate and robust calibration from data captured in uncontrolled and unstructured urban environments, making our solution more scalable than existing calibration solutions. We demonstrate the accuracy and robustness of our method in urban scenes typically encountered in autonomous driving scenarios.
summary: With the recent advances in autonomous driving and the decreasing cost of LiDARs, the use of multimodal sensor systems is on the rise. However, in order to make use of the information provided by a variety of complimentary sensors, it is necessary to accurately calibrate them. We take advantage of recent advances in computer graphics and implicit volumetric scene representation to tackle the problem of multi-sensor spatial and temporal calibration. Thanks to a new formulation of the Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) optimization, we are able to jointly optimize calibration parameters along with scene representation based on radiometric and geometric measurements. Our method enables accurate and robust calibration from data captured in uncontrolled and unstructured urban environments, making our solution more scalable than existing calibration solutions. We demonstrate the accuracy and robustness of our method in urban scenes typically encountered in autonomous driving scenarios.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶的最新进展和激光雷达成本的下降，多模态传感器系统的使用正在增加。然而，为了利用各种互补传感器提供的信息，有必要对其进行精确校准。我们利用计算机图形学和隐式体积场景表示的最新进展来解决多传感器空间和时间校准的问题。得益于神经辐射场（NeRF）优化的新公式，我们能够联合优化校准参数以及基于辐射和几何测量的场景表示。我们的方法可以根据在不受控制和非结构化的城市环境中捕获的数据进行准确和稳健的校准，使我们的解决方案比现有的校准解决方案更具可扩展性。我们在自动驾驶场景中通常遇到的城市场景中展示了我们的方法的准确性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOISST方法，通过多模态优化隐式场景表示，解决自动驾驶中多传感器时空校准问题。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶发展和LiDAR成本降低，多传感器系统广泛应用，但现有校准方法难以应对复杂城市环境下的动态场景。
AI.method: 基于神经辐射场（NeRF）优化框架，联合优化校准参数与隐式场景表示，利用辐射度和几何测量数据实现多传感器时空对齐。
AI.result: 在无控制的城市场景中验证了方法的准确性和鲁棒性，相比现有方案更具可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶提供了高效、鲁棒的多传感器校准解决方案，推动了复杂环境下的感知系统发展。

authors_text: Feng Wu,Yuelin Zhao,Jianhua Pang,Jun Yan,Wanxie Zhong
title: Low-discrepancy Sampling in the Expanded Dimensional Space: An Acceleration Technique for Particle Swarm Optimization
title_zh: 扩展维空间中的低差异采样：粒子群优化的加速技术
comment: 29 pages, 0 figures
comments: 29 pages, 0 figures
abstract: Compared with random sampling, low-discrepancy sampling is more effective in covering the search space. However, the existing research cannot definitely state whether the impact of a low-discrepancy sample on particle swarm optimization (PSO) is positive or negative. Using Niderreiter's theorem, this study completes an error analysis of PSO, which reveals that the error bound of PSO at each iteration depends on the dispersion of the sample set in an expanded dimensional space. Based on this error analysis, an acceleration technique for PSO-type algorithms is proposed with low-discrepancy sampling in the expanded dimensional space. The acceleration technique can generate a low-discrepancy sample set with a smaller dispersion, compared with a random sampling, in the expanded dimensional space; it also reduces the error at each iteration, and hence improves the convergence speed. The acceleration technique is combined with the standard PSO and the comprehensive learning particle swarm optimization, and the performance of the improved algorithm is compared with the original algorithm. The experimental results show that the two improved algorithms have significantly faster convergence speed under the same accuracy requirement.
summary: Compared with random sampling, low-discrepancy sampling is more effective in covering the search space. However, the existing research cannot definitely state whether the impact of a low-discrepancy sample on particle swarm optimization (PSO) is positive or negative. Using Niderreiter's theorem, this study completes an error analysis of PSO, which reveals that the error bound of PSO at each iteration depends on the dispersion of the sample set in an expanded dimensional space. Based on this error analysis, an acceleration technique for PSO-type algorithms is proposed with low-discrepancy sampling in the expanded dimensional space. The acceleration technique can generate a low-discrepancy sample set with a smaller dispersion, compared with a random sampling, in the expanded dimensional space; it also reduces the error at each iteration, and hence improves the convergence speed. The acceleration technique is combined with the standard PSO and the comprehensive learning particle swarm optimization, and the performance of the improved algorithm is compared with the original algorithm. The experimental results show that the two improved algorithms have significantly faster convergence speed under the same accuracy requirement.
abstract_zh: 与随机采样相比，低差异采样能够更有效地覆盖搜索空间。然而，现有的研究并不能明确说明低差异样本对粒子群优化（PSO）的影响是积极的还是消极的。本研究利用 Niderreiter 定理完成了 PSO 的误差分析，揭示了 PSO 在每次迭代时的误差界取决于样本集在扩展维空间中的离散度。基于该误差分析，提出了一种在扩展维空间中进行低差异采样的 PSO 类算法的加速技术。加速技术可以在扩展的维空间中生成比随机采样离散度更小的低差异样本集；它还减少了每次迭代的误差，从而提高了收敛速度。将加速技术与标准PSO和综合学习粒子群优化相结合，并将改进算法的性能与原算法进行了比较。实验结果表明，在相同精度要求下，两种改进算法的收敛速度明显更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩展维度空间低差异采样的粒子群优化算法加速技术。
AI.motivation: 现有研究无法明确低差异采样对粒子群优化（PSO）的影响，需通过误差分析验证其有效性并提升收敛速度。
AI.method: 基于Niderreiter定理进行误差分析，提出在扩展维度空间中使用低差异采样生成分散度更低的样本集，结合标准PSO和综合学习PSO改进算法。
AI.result: 改进后的算法在相同精度要求下显著提升了收敛速度，实验结果验证了该技术的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 低差异采样在扩展维度空间中能有效降低迭代误差，为PSO类算法提供了一种可靠的加速方法。

authors_text: Yao Xiao,Ziyi Tang,Pengxu Wei,Cong Liu,Liang Lin
title: Masked Images Are Counterfactual Samples for Robust Fine-tuning
title_zh: 蒙版图像是用于稳健微调的反事实样本
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023 (v2: improve the clarity; v3: camera ready version)
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023 (v2: improve the clarity; v3: camera ready version)
abstract: Deep learning models are challenged by the distribution shift between the training data and test data. Recently, the large models pre-trained on diverse data have demonstrated unprecedented robustness to various distribution shifts. However, fine-tuning these models can lead to a trade-off between in-distribution (ID) performance and out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness. Existing methods for tackling this trade-off do not explicitly address the OOD robustness problem. In this paper, based on causal analysis of the aforementioned problems, we propose a novel fine-tuning method, which uses masked images as counterfactual samples that help improve the robustness of the fine-tuning model. Specifically, we mask either the semantics-related or semantics-unrelated patches of the images based on class activation map to break the spurious correlation, and refill the masked patches with patches from other images. The resulting counterfactual samples are used in feature-based distillation with the pre-trained model. Extensive experiments verify that regularizing the fine-tuning with the proposed masked images can achieve a better trade-off between ID and OOD performance, surpassing previous methods on the OOD performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/Coxy7/robust-finetuning.
summary: Deep learning models are challenged by the distribution shift between the training data and test data. Recently, the large models pre-trained on diverse data have demonstrated unprecedented robustness to various distribution shifts. However, fine-tuning these models can lead to a trade-off between in-distribution (ID) performance and out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness. Existing methods for tackling this trade-off do not explicitly address the OOD robustness problem. In this paper, based on causal analysis of the aforementioned problems, we propose a novel fine-tuning method, which uses masked images as counterfactual samples that help improve the robustness of the fine-tuning model. Specifically, we mask either the semantics-related or semantics-unrelated patches of the images based on class activation map to break the spurious correlation, and refill the masked patches with patches from other images. The resulting counterfactual samples are used in feature-based distillation with the pre-trained model. Extensive experiments verify that regularizing the fine-tuning with the proposed masked images can achieve a better trade-off between ID and OOD performance, surpassing previous methods on the OOD performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/Coxy7/robust-finetuning.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型受到训练数据和测试数据之间分布变化的挑战。最近，在不同数据上预训练的大型模型对各种分布变化表现出了前所未有的鲁棒性。然而，微调这些模型可能会导致分布内 (ID) 性能和分布外 (OOD) 鲁棒性之间的权衡。解决这种权衡的现有方法没有明确解决 OOD 稳健性问题。在本文中，基于对上述问题的因果分析，我们提出了一种新颖的微调方法，该方法使用掩模图像作为反事实样本，有助于提高微调模型的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们根据类激活图屏蔽图像的语义相关或语义不相关的补丁，以打破虚假相关性，并用其他图像的补丁重新填充被屏蔽的补丁。生成的反事实样本用于通过预训练模型进行基于特征的蒸馏。大量实验验证了使用所提出的掩模图像进行正则化微调可以在 ID 和 OOD 性能之间实现更好的权衡，超越了以前的 OOD 性能方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Coxy7/robust-finetuning 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过使用掩码图像作为反事实样本的方法，以提升模型在分布外（OOD）场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 微调预训练模型时，模型在分布内（ID）性能与分布外（OOD）鲁棒性之间存在权衡，现有方法未能有效解决OOD鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 基于类别激活图，对图像中语义相关或无关的区域进行掩码处理，并用其他图像的补丁填充，生成反事实样本，再通过特征蒸馏与预训练模型对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持ID性能的同时显著提升OOD性能，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用掩码图像作为反事实样本进行微调，可有效打破虚假相关性，实现ID与OOD性能的更好平衡。

authors_text: Rohit Agarwal,Gyanendra Das,Saksham Aggarwal,Alexander Horsch,Dilip K. Prasad
title: MABNet: Master Assistant Buddy Network with Hybrid Learning for Image Retrieval
title_zh: MABNet：具有混合学习图像检索功能的主助手好友网络
comment: Accepted at International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
comments: Accepted at International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
abstract: Image retrieval has garnered growing interest in recent times. The current approaches are either supervised or self-supervised. These methods do not exploit the benefits of hybrid learning using both supervision and self-supervision. We present a novel Master Assistant Buddy Network (MABNet) for image retrieval which incorporates both learning mechanisms. MABNet consists of master and assistant blocks, both learning independently through supervision and collectively via self-supervision. The master guides the assistant by providing its knowledge base as a reference for self-supervision and the assistant reports its knowledge back to the master by weight transfer. We perform extensive experiments on public datasets with and without post-processing.
summary: Image retrieval has garnered growing interest in recent times. The current approaches are either supervised or self-supervised. These methods do not exploit the benefits of hybrid learning using both supervision and self-supervision. We present a novel Master Assistant Buddy Network (MABNet) for image retrieval which incorporates both learning mechanisms. MABNet consists of master and assistant blocks, both learning independently through supervision and collectively via self-supervision. The master guides the assistant by providing its knowledge base as a reference for self-supervision and the assistant reports its knowledge back to the master by weight transfer. We perform extensive experiments on public datasets with and without post-processing.
abstract_zh: 近年来，图像检索引起了越来越多的兴趣。当前的方法要么是监督的，要么是自我监督的。这些方法没有利用监督和自我监督的混合学习的好处。我们提出了一种新颖的用于图像检索的主助理伙伴网络（MABNet），它结合了两种学习机制。 MABNet 由主模块和辅助模块组成，既通过监督独立学习，又通过自我监督集体学习。主人通过提供其知识库作为自我监督的参考来指导助手，而助手则通过权重转移将其知识报告给主人。我们对经过或不经过后处理的公共数据集进行了广泛的实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合监督学习与自监督学习的混合学习框架MABNet，用于改进图像检索任务。
AI.motivation: 现有图像检索方法仅采用监督或自监督学习，未能有效融合两者优势，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 构建包含主块（Master）与助手块（Assistant）的双模块网络，主块通过监督学习获取知识，助手块通过自监督学习优化，二者通过知识库共享与权重转移实现协同学习。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上实验表明，MABNet在有无后处理情况下均优于现有方法，验证了混合学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MABNet通过创新性双模块协同机制，成功融合监督与自监督学习优势，为图像检索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bastiaan Tamm,Rik Vandenberghe,Hugo Van hamme
title: Cross-Lingual Transfer Learning for Alzheimer's Detection From Spontaneous Speech
title_zh: 跨语言迁移学习从自发语音检测阿尔茨海默病
comment: 2 pages, submitted to ICASSP 2023
comments: 2 pages, submitted to ICASSP 2023
abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disease most often associated with memory deficits and cognitive decline. With the aging population, there has been much interest in automated methods for cognitive impairment detection. One approach that has attracted attention in recent years is AD detection through spontaneous speech. While the results are promising, it is not certain whether the learned speech features can be generalized across languages. To fill this gap, the ADReSS-M challenge was organized. This paper presents our submission to this ICASSP-2023 Signal Processing Grand Challenge (SPGC). The model was trained on 228 English samples of a picture description task and was transferred to Greek using only 8 samples. We obtained an accuracy of 82.6% for AD detection, a root-mean-square error of 4.345 for cognitive score prediction, and ranked 2nd place in the competition out of 24 competitors.
summary: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disease most often associated with memory deficits and cognitive decline. With the aging population, there has been much interest in automated methods for cognitive impairment detection. One approach that has attracted attention in recent years is AD detection through spontaneous speech. While the results are promising, it is not certain whether the learned speech features can be generalized across languages. To fill this gap, the ADReSS-M challenge was organized. This paper presents our submission to this ICASSP-2023 Signal Processing Grand Challenge (SPGC). The model was trained on 228 English samples of a picture description task and was transferred to Greek using only 8 samples. We obtained an accuracy of 82.6% for AD detection, a root-mean-square error of 4.345 for cognitive score prediction, and ranked 2nd place in the competition out of 24 competitors.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是一种进行性神经退行性疾病，通常与记忆缺陷和认知能力下降有关。随着人口老龄化，人们对认知障碍检测的自动化方法产生了浓厚的兴趣。近年来引起关注的一种方法是通过自发语音进行 AD 检测。虽然结果令人鼓舞，但尚不确定所学习的语音特征是否可以跨语言推广。为了填补这一空白，组织了 ADReSS-M 挑战赛。本文介绍了我们向 ICASSP-2023 信号处理大挑战赛 (SPGC) 提交的作品。该模型在图片描述任务的 228 个英语样本上进行训练，并仅使用 8 个样本将其转换为希腊语。我们的 AD 检测准确率为 82.6%，认知得分预测均方根误差为 4.345，在 24 名参赛者中排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是通过自发性言语检测阿尔茨海默病，并利用跨语言迁移学习解决不同语言间的模型泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管自发性言语检测AD有潜力，但跨语言泛化能力尚未明确，因此本文通过参与挑战赛验证迁移学习在跨语言场景下的有效性。
AI.method: 采用跨语言迁移学习方法，模型在英语数据集上预训练后，仅使用8个希腊语样本进行微调，实现跨语言的AD检测。
AI.result: 在AD检测中达到82.6%的准确率，认知评分预测RMSE为4.345，在24支参赛队伍中排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，即使目标语言数据有限，跨语言迁移学习仍能有效提升AD检测性能，为多语言场景下的应用提供了可行方案。

tldr: 本文主要任务是通过自发性言语检测阿尔茨海默病，并利用跨语言迁移学习解决不同语言间的模型泛化问题。
motivation: 尽管自发性言语检测AD有潜力，但跨语言泛化能力尚未明确，因此本文通过参与挑战赛验证迁移学习在跨语言场景下的有效性。
method: 采用跨语言迁移学习方法，模型在英语数据集上预训练后，仅使用8个希腊语样本进行微调，实现跨语言的AD检测。
result: 在AD检测中达到82.6%的准确率，认知评分预测RMSE为4.345，在24支参赛队伍中排名第二。
conclusion: 研究表明，即使目标语言数据有限，跨语言迁移学习仍能有效提升AD检测性能，为多语言场景下的应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: Cross-Lingual Transfer Learning for Alzheimer's Detection From Spontaneous Speech 跨语言迁移学习从自发语音检测阿尔茨海默病 Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disease most often associated with memory deficits and cognitive decline. With the aging population, there has been much interest in automated methods for cognitive impairment detection. One approach that has attracted attention in recent years is AD detection through spontaneous speech. While the results are promising, it is not certain whether the learned speech features can be generalized across languages. To fill this gap, the ADReSS-M challenge was organized. This paper presents our submission to this ICASSP-2023 Signal Processing Grand Challenge (SPGC). The model was trained on 228 English samples of a picture description task and was transferred to Greek using only 8 samples. We obtained an accuracy of 82.6% for AD detection, a root-mean-square error of 4.345 for cognitive score prediction, and ranked 2nd place in the competition out of 24 competitors. 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是一种进行性神经退行性疾病，通常与记忆缺陷和认知能力下降有关。随着人口老龄化，人们对认知障碍检测的自动化方法产生了浓厚的兴趣。近年来引起关注的一种方法是通过自发语音进行 AD 检测。虽然结果令人鼓舞，但尚不确定所学习的语音特征是否可以跨语言推广。为了填补这一空白，组织了 ADReSS-M 挑战赛。本文介绍了我们向 ICASSP-2023 信号处理大挑战赛 (SPGC) 提交的作品。该模型在图片描述任务的 228 个英语样本上进行训练，并仅使用 8 个样本将其转换为希腊语。我们的 AD 检测准确率为 82.6%，认知得分预测均方根误差为 4.345，在 24 名参赛者中排名第二。 本文主要任务是通过自发性言语检测阿尔茨海默病，并利用跨语言迁移学习解决不同语言间的模型泛化问题。 Bastiaan Tamm,Rik Vandenberghe,Hugo Van hamme eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Tobias Zaenker,Julius Rückin,Rohit Menon,Marija Popović,Maren Bennewitz
title: Graph-based View Motion Planning for Fruit Detection
title_zh: 用于水果检测的基于图的视图运动规划
comment: 7 pages, 10 figures, accepted at IROS 2023
comments: 7 pages, 10 figures, accepted at IROS 2023
abstract: Crop monitoring is crucial for maximizing agricultural productivity and efficiency. However, monitoring large and complex structures such as sweet pepper plants presents significant challenges, especially due to frequent occlusions of the fruits. Traditional next-best view planning can lead to unstructured and inefficient coverage of the crops. To address this, we propose a novel view motion planner that builds a graph network of viable view poses and trajectories between nearby poses, thereby considering robot motion constraints. The planner searches the graphs for view sequences with the highest accumulated information gain, allowing for efficient pepper plant monitoring while minimizing occlusions. The generated view poses aim at both sufficiently covering already detected and discovering new fruits. The graph and the corresponding best view pose sequence are computed with a limited horizon and are adaptively updated in fixed time intervals as the system gathers new information. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through simulated and real-world experiments using a robotic arm equipped with an RGB-D camera and mounted on a trolley. As the experimental results show, our planner produces view pose sequences to systematically cover the crops and leads to increased fruit coverage when given a limited time in comparison to a state-of-the-art single next-best view planner.
summary: Crop monitoring is crucial for maximizing agricultural productivity and efficiency. However, monitoring large and complex structures such as sweet pepper plants presents significant challenges, especially due to frequent occlusions of the fruits. Traditional next-best view planning can lead to unstructured and inefficient coverage of the crops. To address this, we propose a novel view motion planner that builds a graph network of viable view poses and trajectories between nearby poses, thereby considering robot motion constraints. The planner searches the graphs for view sequences with the highest accumulated information gain, allowing for efficient pepper plant monitoring while minimizing occlusions. The generated view poses aim at both sufficiently covering already detected and discovering new fruits. The graph and the corresponding best view pose sequence are computed with a limited horizon and are adaptively updated in fixed time intervals as the system gathers new information. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through simulated and real-world experiments using a robotic arm equipped with an RGB-D camera and mounted on a trolley. As the experimental results show, our planner produces view pose sequences to systematically cover the crops and leads to increased fruit coverage when given a limited time in comparison to a state-of-the-art single next-best view planner.
abstract_zh: 作物监测对于最大限度提高农业生产力和效率至关重要。然而，监测甜椒植物等大型复杂结构面临着巨大的挑战，特别是由于果实经常被遮挡。传统的次佳视图规划可能会导致农作物的无组织和低效覆盖。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视图运动规划器，它构建了可行视图姿势和附近姿势之间的轨迹的图形网络，从而考虑机器人运动约束。规划器在图表中搜索具有最高累积信息增益的视图序列，从而实现有效的辣椒植物监测，同时最大限度地减少遮挡。生成的视图姿势旨在充分覆盖已检测到的结果并发现新的成果。该图和相应的最佳视图姿势序列是在有限的范围内计算的，并在系统收集新信息时以固定的时间间隔自适应更新。我们使用配备 RGB-D 相机并安装在手推车上的机械臂，通过模拟和现实实验证明了我们方法的有效性。正如实验结果所示，与最先进的单一次佳视图规划器相比，我们的规划器生成视图姿势序列来系统地覆盖农作物，并在有限的时间内增加水果覆盖范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图的视图运动规划方法，用于解决甜椒植物等复杂结构中的水果检测问题，通过优化机器人视角规划提高覆盖效率并减少遮挡。
AI.motivation: 传统视角规划方法在复杂作物结构中存在覆盖效率低、遮挡严重的问题，需开发更智能的路径规划策略以提升农业监测效果。
AI.method: 构建包含可行视角及轨迹的图网络，结合机器人运动约束，通过搜索信息增益最大的视角序列实现动态更新的高效覆盖规划。
AI.result: 仿真与实际实验表明，该方法在有限时间内比现有单视角规划算法显著提升了果实覆盖范围与检测效率。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的视角规划方法能系统化覆盖作物区域，在农业机器人应用中具有提升检测效率与鲁棒性的潜力。

authors_text: Cheng Chuanxiang,Yang Jia,Wang Chao,Zheng Zhi,Li Xiaopeng,Dong Di,Chang Mengxia,Zhuang Zhiheng
title: Automatic detection of aerial survey ground control points based on Yolov5-OBB
title_zh: 基于Yolov5-OBB的航测地面控制点自动检测
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures
abstract: The use of ground control points (GCPs) for georeferencing is the most common strategy in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) photogrammetry, but at the same time their collection represents the most time-consuming and expensive part of UAV campaigns. Recently, deep learning has been rapidly developed in the field of small object detection. In this letter, to automatically extract coordinates information of ground control points (GCPs) by detecting GCP-markers in UAV images, we propose a solution that uses a deep learning-based architecture, YOLOv5-OBB, combined with a confidence threshold filtering algorithm and an optimal ranking algorithm. We applied our proposed method to a dataset collected by DJI Phantom 4 Pro drone and obtained good detection performance with the mean Average Precision (AP) of 0.832 and the highest AP of 0.982 for the cross-type GCP-markers. The proposed method can be a promising tool for future implementation of the end-to-end aerial triangulation process.
summary: The use of ground control points (GCPs) for georeferencing is the most common strategy in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) photogrammetry, but at the same time their collection represents the most time-consuming and expensive part of UAV campaigns. Recently, deep learning has been rapidly developed in the field of small object detection. In this letter, to automatically extract coordinates information of ground control points (GCPs) by detecting GCP-markers in UAV images, we propose a solution that uses a deep learning-based architecture, YOLOv5-OBB, combined with a confidence threshold filtering algorithm and an optimal ranking algorithm. We applied our proposed method to a dataset collected by DJI Phantom 4 Pro drone and obtained good detection performance with the mean Average Precision (AP) of 0.832 and the highest AP of 0.982 for the cross-type GCP-markers. The proposed method can be a promising tool for future implementation of the end-to-end aerial triangulation process.
abstract_zh: 使用地面控制点 (GCP) 进行地理配准是无人机 (UAV) 摄影测量中最常见的策略，但同时它们的收集也代表了无人机活动中最耗时且最昂贵的部分。近年来，深度学习在小物体检测领域得到了快速发展。在这封信中，为了通过检测无人机图像中的地面控制点（GCP）标记来自动提取地面控制点（GCP）的坐标信息，我们提出了一种使用基于深度学习的架构YOLOv5-OBB，结合置信度阈值过滤算法和最优排序算法的解决方案。我们将我们提出的方法应用于 DJI Phantom 4 Pro 无人机收集的数据集，并获得了良好的检测性能，交叉类型 GCP 标记的平均精度 (AP) 为 0.832，最高 AP 为 0.982。所提出的方法可以成为未来实施端到端空中三角测量过程的有前途的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于YOLOv5-OBB模型的无人机航拍图像地面控制点自动检测方法，实现GCP坐标信息的自动化提取。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机测绘中地面控制点(GCP)的人工采集耗时昂贵，而深度学习在小目标检测领域的发展为自动识别GCP标记提供了新思路。
AI.method: 融合YOLOv5-OBB目标检测框架、置信度阈值过滤算法和最优排序算法，构建端到端的GCP自动检测系统。
AI.result: 在大疆Phantom 4 Pro数据集上实现mAP 0.832的检测性能，其中十字形GCP标记最高AP达到0.982。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无人机航测提供了高效的自动化GCP检测方案，可作为未来端到端空中三角测量流程的重要技术支撑。

In this letter, to automatically extract coordinates information of ground control points (GCPs) by detecting GCP-markers in UAV images, we propose a solution that uses a deep learning-based architecture, YOLOv5-OBB, combined with a confidence threshold filtering algorithm and an optimal ranking algorithm. We applied our proposed method to a dataset collected by DJI Phantom 4 Pro drone and obtained good detection performance with the mean Average Precision (AP) of 0.832 and the highest AP of 0.982 for the cross-type GCP-markers. The proposed method can be a promising tool for future implementation of the end-to-end aerial triangulation process. 使用地面控制点 (GCP) 进行地理配准是无人机 (UAV) 摄影测量中最常见的策略，但同时它们的收集也代表了无人机活动中最耗时且最昂贵的部分。近年来，深度学习在小物体检测领域得到了快速发展。在这封信中，为了通过检测无人机图像中的地面控制点（GCP）标记来自动提取地面控制点（GCP）的坐标信息，我们提出了一种使用基于深度学习的架构YOLOv5-OBB，结合置信度阈值过滤算法和最优排序算法的解决方案。我们将我们提出的方法应用于 DJI Phantom 4 Pro 无人机收集的数据集，并获得了良好的检测性能，交叉类型 GCP 标记的平均精度 (AP) 为 0.832，最高 AP 为 0.982。所提出的方法可以成为未来实施端到端空中三角测量过程的有前途的工具。 本文提出基于YOLOv5-OBB模型的无人机航拍图像地面控制点自动检测方法，实现GCP坐标信息的自动化提取。 Cheng Chuanxiang,Yang Jia,Wang Chao,Zheng Zhi,Li Xiaopeng,Dong Di,Chang Mengxia,Zhuang Zhiheng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Monish R. Nallapareddy,Kshitij Sirohi,Paulo L. J. Drews-Jr,Wolfram Burgard,Chih-Hong Cheng,Abhinav Valada
title: EvCenterNet: Uncertainty Estimation for Object Detection using Evidential Learning
title_zh: EvCenterNet：使用证据学习进行对象检测的不确定性估计
abstract: Uncertainty estimation is crucial in safety-critical settings such as automated driving as it provides valuable information for several downstream tasks including high-level decision making and path planning. In this work, we propose EvCenterNet, a novel uncertainty-aware 2D object detection framework using evidential learning to directly estimate both classification and regression uncertainties. To employ evidential learning for object detection, we devise a combination of evidential and focal loss functions for the sparse heatmap inputs. We introduce class-balanced weighting for regression and heatmap prediction to tackle the class imbalance encountered by evidential learning. Moreover, we propose a learning scheme to actively utilize the predicted heatmap uncertainties to improve the detection performance by focusing on the most uncertain points. We train our model on the KITTI dataset and evaluate it on challenging out-of-distribution datasets including BDD100K and nuImages. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach improves the precision and minimizes the execution time loss in relation to the base model.
summary: Uncertainty estimation is crucial in safety-critical settings such as automated driving as it provides valuable information for several downstream tasks including high-level decision making and path planning. In this work, we propose EvCenterNet, a novel uncertainty-aware 2D object detection framework using evidential learning to directly estimate both classification and regression uncertainties. To employ evidential learning for object detection, we devise a combination of evidential and focal loss functions for the sparse heatmap inputs. We introduce class-balanced weighting for regression and heatmap prediction to tackle the class imbalance encountered by evidential learning. Moreover, we propose a learning scheme to actively utilize the predicted heatmap uncertainties to improve the detection performance by focusing on the most uncertain points. We train our model on the KITTI dataset and evaluate it on challenging out-of-distribution datasets including BDD100K and nuImages. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach improves the precision and minimizes the execution time loss in relation to the base model.
abstract_zh: 不确定性估计在自动驾驶等安全关键环境中至关重要，因为它为包括高级决策和路径规划在内的多个下游任务提供了有价值的信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了 EvCenterNet，这是一种新颖的不确定性感知 2D 对象检测框架，使用证据学习来直接估计分类和回归不确定性。为了将证据学习用于对象检测，我们为稀疏热图输入设计了证据损失函数和焦点损失函数的组合。我们为回归和热图预测引入了类别平衡权重，以解决证据学习遇到的类别不平衡问题。此外，我们提出了一种学习方案，通过关注最不确定的点，主动利用预测的热图不确定性来提高检测性能。我们在 KITTI 数据集上训练我们的模型，并在具有挑战性的分布外数据集（包括 BDD100K 和 nuImages）上对其进行评估。我们的实验表明，与基本模型相比，我们的方法提高了精度并最大限度地减少了执行时间损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvCenterNet框架，通过证据学习直接估计目标检测中的分类和回归不确定性，提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶等安全关键场景中，不确定性估计对决策和路径规划至关重要，但现有方法难以有效建模检测过程中的不确定性。
AI.method: 结合证据学习与焦点损失处理稀疏热图输入，引入类别平衡加权解决类别不平衡问题，并利用预测的热图不确定性优化检测性能。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集训练后，模型在BDD100K和nuImages等数据集上精度提升，同时减少执行时间损失。
AI.conclusion: EvCenterNet通过不确定性估计有效提升检测鲁棒性，为安全关键场景提供可靠支持，未来可探索更复杂的不确定性建模方法。

authors_text: Alessia Ferraro,Vito Antonio Nardi,Valerio Scordamaglia
title: Mathematical model of a remotely controlled skid-slip tracked mobile robot
title_zh: 滑移履带式远程控制移动机器人数学模型
abstract: In this paper, an uncertain norm-bounded mathematical model for a remotely controlled skid-slip tracked mobile robot. The linear state space description aims to describe the nonlinear error dynamics of the robot during the trajectory tracking maneuver in the presence of a delay in the control channel, taking into account unknown but bounded slip coefficients.
summary: In this paper, an uncertain norm-bounded mathematical model for a remotely controlled skid-slip tracked mobile robot. The linear state space description aims to describe the nonlinear error dynamics of the robot during the trajectory tracking maneuver in the presence of a delay in the control channel, taking into account unknown but bounded slip coefficients.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了远程控制滑移履带式移动机器人的不确定范数有界数学模型。线性状态空间描述旨在描述机器人在控制通道存在延迟的情况下轨迹跟踪操作期间的非线性误差动力学，同时考虑未知但有界的滑移系数。

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个考虑控制延迟和未知滑移系数的不确定范数有界数学模型，用于远程控制的滑移履带式移动机器人轨迹跟踪问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以有效处理控制通道延迟及滑移不确定性对轨迹跟踪性能的影响，需构建更鲁棒的数学模型以提高控制精度。
AI.method: 采用线性状态空间描述方法，将非线性误差动态转化为不确定参数的范数有界形式，并纳入控制延迟与滑移系数的约束条件。
AI.result: 提出的模型能够准确表征机器人动态特性，增强系统对未知滑移系数和控制延迟的鲁棒性，提升轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 该数学模型为远程控制移动机器人的鲁棒控制设计提供了理论依据，有助于应对实际环境中的不确定性挑战。

authors_text: Wei Li,Linchao Zhu,Longyin Wen,Yi Yang
title: DeCap: Decoding CLIP Latents for Zero-Shot Captioning via Text-Only Training
title_zh: DeCap：通过纯文本训练解码零镜头字幕的 CLIP 潜伏
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/dhg-wei/DeCap
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/dhg-wei/DeCap
abstract: Large-scale pre-trained multi-modal models (e.g., CLIP) demonstrate strong zero-shot transfer capability in many discriminative tasks. Their adaptation to zero-shot image-conditioned text generation tasks has drawn increasing interest. Prior arts approach to zero-shot captioning by either utilizing the existing large language models (e.g., GPT-2) or pre-training the encoder-decoder network in an end-to-end manner. In this work, we propose a simple framework, named DeCap, for zero-shot captioning. We introduce a lightweight visual-aware language decoder. This decoder is both data-efficient and computation-efficient: 1) it only requires the text data for training, easing the burden on the collection of paired data. 2) it does not require end-to-end training. When trained with text-only data, the decoder takes the text embedding extracted from the off-the-shelf CLIP encoder as a prefix embedding. The challenge is that the decoder is trained on the text corpus but at the inference stage, it needs to generate captions based on visual inputs. The modality gap issue is widely observed in multi-modal contrastive models that prevents us from directly taking the visual embedding as the prefix embedding. We propose a training-free mechanism to reduce the modality gap. We project the visual embedding into the CLIP text embedding space, while the projected embedding retains the information of the visual input. Taking the projected embedding as the prefix embedding, the decoder generates high-quality descriptions that match the visual input. The experiments show that DeCap outperforms other zero-shot captioning methods and unpaired captioning methods on the typical image captioning benchmarks, i.e., MSCOCO and NoCaps.
summary: Large-scale pre-trained multi-modal models (e.g., CLIP) demonstrate strong zero-shot transfer capability in many discriminative tasks. Their adaptation to zero-shot image-conditioned text generation tasks has drawn increasing interest. Prior arts approach to zero-shot captioning by either utilizing the existing large language models (e.g., GPT-2) or pre-training the encoder-decoder network in an end-to-end manner. In this work, we propose a simple framework, named DeCap, for zero-shot captioning. We introduce a lightweight visual-aware language decoder. This decoder is both data-efficient and computation-efficient: 1) it only requires the text data for training, easing the burden on the collection of paired data. 2) it does not require end-to-end training. When trained with text-only data, the decoder takes the text embedding extracted from the off-the-shelf CLIP encoder as a prefix embedding. The challenge is that the decoder is trained on the text corpus but at the inference stage, it needs to generate captions based on visual inputs. The modality gap issue is widely observed in multi-modal contrastive models that prevents us from directly taking the visual embedding as the prefix embedding. We propose a training-free mechanism to reduce the modality gap. We project the visual embedding into the CLIP text embedding space, while the projected embedding retains the information of the visual input. Taking the projected embedding as the prefix embedding, the decoder generates high-quality descriptions that match the visual input. The experiments show that DeCap outperforms other zero-shot captioning methods and unpaired captioning methods on the typical image captioning benchmarks, i.e., MSCOCO and NoCaps.
abstract_zh: 大规模预训练多模态模型（例如 CLIP）在许多判别任务中表现出强大的零样本传输能力。它们对零样本图像条件文本生成任务的适应引起了越来越多的兴趣。现有技术通过利用现有的大型语言模型（例如，GPT-2）或以端到端的方式预训练编码器-解码器网络来实现零镜头字幕。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单的框架，名为 DeCap，用于零镜头字幕。我们引入了一种轻量级视觉感知语言解码器。该解码器既具有数据效率又具有计算效率：1）它只需要文本数据进行训练，减轻了配对数据收集的负担。 2）不需要端到端的训练。当使用纯文本数据进行训练时，解码器将从现成的 CLIP 编码器中提取的文本嵌入作为前缀嵌入。挑战在于解码器是在文本语料库上进行训练的，但在推理阶段，它需要根据视觉输入生成字幕。模态间隙问题在多模态对比模型中广泛存在，这使得我们无法直接将视觉嵌入作为前缀嵌入。我们提出了一种免培训机制来缩小模式差距。我们将视觉嵌入投影到 CLIP 文本嵌入空间中，而投影的嵌入保留了视觉输入的信息。将投影嵌入作为前缀嵌入，解码器生成与视觉输入相匹配的高质量描述。实验表明，在典型的图像字幕基准（即 MSCOCO 和 NoCaps）上，DeCap 优于其他零镜头字幕方法和不成对字幕方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeCap框架，通过仅使用文本数据训练轻量级解码器，实现无需配对数据和端到端训练的零样本图像描述生成。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本图像描述方法依赖大型语言模型或端到端预训练，存在数据效率低、训练成本高等问题，且跨模态对齐困难。
AI.method: 利用预训练CLIP编码器提取视觉嵌入，通过投影到文本嵌入空间消除模态差距，结合仅文本训练的轻量解码器生成描述。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO和NoCaps基准测试中，DeCap优于其他零样本及无配对数据描述方法。
AI.conclusion: DeCap通过解耦编码器与解码器、利用文本预训练和跨模态投影机制，实现了高效且高质量的零样本图像描述生成。

search_text: DeCap: Decoding CLIP Latents for Zero-Shot Captioning via Text-Only Training DeCap：通过纯文本训练解码零镜头字幕的 CLIP 潜伏 Large-scale pre-trained multi-modal models (e.g., CLIP) demonstrate strong zero-shot transfer capability in many discriminative tasks. Their adaptation to zero-shot image-conditioned text generation tasks has drawn increasing interest. Prior arts approach to zero-shot captioning by either utilizing the existing large language models (e.g., GPT-2) or pre-training the encoder-decoder network in an end-to-end manner. In this work, we propose a simple framework, named DeCap, for zero-shot captioning. We introduce a lightweight visual-aware language decoder. This decoder is both data-efficient and computation-efficient: 1) it only requires the text data for training, easing the burden on the collection of paired data. 2) it does not require end-to-end training. When trained with text-only data, the decoder takes the text embedding extracted from the off-the-shelf CLIP encoder as a prefix embedding. The challenge is that the decoder is trained on the text corpus but at the inference stage, it needs to generate captions based on visual inputs. The modality gap issue is widely observed in multi-modal contrastive models that prevents us from directly taking the visual embedding as the prefix embedding. We propose a training-free mechanism to reduce the modality gap. We project the visual embedding into the CLIP text embedding space, while the projected embedding retains the information of the visual input. Taking the projected embedding as the prefix embedding, the decoder generates high-quality descriptions that match the visual input. The experiments show that DeCap outperforms other zero-shot captioning methods and unpaired captioning methods on the typical image captioning benchmarks, i.e., MSCOCO and NoCaps. 大规模预训练多模态模型（例如 CLIP）在许多判别任务中表现出强大的零样本传输能力。它们对零样本图像条件文本生成任务的适应引起了越来越多的兴趣。现有技术通过利用现有的大型语言模型（例如，GPT-2）或以端到端的方式预训练编码器-解码器网络来实现零镜头字幕。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单的框架，名为 DeCap，用于零镜头字幕。我们引入了一种轻量级视觉感知语言解码器。该解码器既具有数据效率又具有计算效率：1）它只需要文本数据进行训练，减轻了配对数据收集的负担。 2）不需要端到端的训练。当使用纯文本数据进行训练时，解码器将从现成的 CLIP 编码器中提取的文本嵌入作为前缀嵌入。挑战在于解码器是在文本语料库上进行训练的，但在推理阶段，它需要根据视觉输入生成字幕。模态间隙问题在多模态对比模型中广泛存在，这使得我们无法直接将视觉嵌入作为前缀嵌入。我们提出了一种免培训机制来缩小模式差距。我们将视觉嵌入投影到 CLIP 文本嵌入空间中，而投影的嵌入保留了视觉输入的信息。将投影嵌入作为前缀嵌入，解码器生成与视觉输入相匹配的高质量描述。实验表明，在典型的图像字幕基准（即 MSCOCO 和 NoCaps）上，DeCap 优于其他零镜头字幕方法和不成对字幕方法。 本文提出DeCap框架，通过仅使用文本数据训练轻量级解码器，实现无需配对数据和端到端训练的零样本图像描述生成。 Wei Li,Linchao Zhu,Longyin Wen,Yi Yang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Bharath Bhushan Damodaran,Muhammet Balcilar,Franck Galpin,Pierre Hellier
title: RQAT-INR: Improved Implicit Neural Image Compression
title_zh: RQAT-INR：改进的隐式神经图像压缩
comment: Accepted as oral at Data compression conference 2023
comments: Accepted as oral at Data compression conference 2023
abstract: Deep variational autoencoders for image and video compression have gained significant attraction in the recent years, due to their potential to offer competitive or better compression rates compared to the decades long traditional codecs such as AVC, HEVC or VVC. However, because of complexity and energy consumption, these approaches are still far away from practical usage in industry. More recently, implicit neural representation (INR) based codecs have emerged, and have lower complexity and energy usage to classical approaches at decoding. However, their performances are not in par at the moment with state-of-the-art methods. In this research, we first show that INR based image codec has a lower complexity than VAE based approaches, then we propose several improvements for INR-based image codec and outperformed baseline model by a large margin.
summary: Deep variational autoencoders for image and video compression have gained significant attraction in the recent years, due to their potential to offer competitive or better compression rates compared to the decades long traditional codecs such as AVC, HEVC or VVC. However, because of complexity and energy consumption, these approaches are still far away from practical usage in industry. More recently, implicit neural representation (INR) based codecs have emerged, and have lower complexity and energy usage to classical approaches at decoding. However, their performances are not in par at the moment with state-of-the-art methods. In this research, we first show that INR based image codec has a lower complexity than VAE based approaches, then we propose several improvements for INR-based image codec and outperformed baseline model by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 近年来，用于图像和视频压缩的深度变分自动编码器受到了极大的关注，因为与已有数十年历史的传统编解码器（如 AVC、HEVC 或 VVC）相比，它们有可能提供有竞争力或更好的压缩率。然而，由于复杂性和能耗，这些方法距离工业实际应用还很远。最近，基于隐式神经表示（INR）的编解码器已经出现，与传统的解码方法相比，其复杂性和能耗更低。然而，他们的表现目前还无法与最先进的方法相提并论。在这项研究中，我们首先证明基于 INR 的图像编解码器比基于 VAE 的方法具有更低的复杂性，然后我们对基于 INR 的图像编解码器提出了一些改进，并且大大优于基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的基于隐式神经表示（INR）的图像压缩方法RQAT-INR，通过降低复杂度并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统VAE压缩方法复杂度和能耗高，而现有INR方法性能不足，需优化以实现工业应用。
AI.method: 证明INR复杂度低于VAE，并提出多项改进策略优化INR编码器结构与训练过程。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在性能上显著超越基线INR方法，压缩效率接近或优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: INR压缩潜力大，通过结构优化可兼顾低复杂度与高性能，为实际应用提供新方向。

authors_text: Hankook Lee,Jongheon Jeong,Sejun Park,Jinwoo Shin
title: Guiding Energy-based Models via Contrastive Latent Variables
title_zh: 通过对比潜在变量指导基于能量的模型
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2023 (Spotlight). The code is available at https://github.com/hankook/CLEL
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2023 (Spotlight). The code is available at https://github.com/hankook/CLEL
abstract: An energy-based model (EBM) is a popular generative framework that offers both explicit density and architectural flexibility, but training them is difficult since it is often unstable and time-consuming. In recent years, various training techniques have been developed, e.g., better divergence measures or stabilization in MCMC sampling, but there often exists a large gap between EBMs and other generative frameworks like GANs in terms of generation quality. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective framework for improving EBMs via contrastive representation learning (CRL). To be specific, we consider representations learned by contrastive methods as the true underlying latent variable. This contrastive latent variable could guide EBMs to understand the data structure better, so it can improve and accelerate EBM training significantly. To enable the joint training of EBM and CRL, we also design a new class of latent-variable EBMs for learning the joint density of data and the contrastive latent variable. Our experimental results demonstrate that our scheme achieves lower FID scores, compared to prior-art EBM methods (e.g., additionally using variational autoencoders or diffusion techniques), even with significantly faster and more memory-efficient training. We also show conditional and compositional generation abilities of our latent-variable EBMs as their additional benefits, even without explicit conditional training. The code is available at https://github.com/hankook/CLEL.
summary: An energy-based model (EBM) is a popular generative framework that offers both explicit density and architectural flexibility, but training them is difficult since it is often unstable and time-consuming. In recent years, various training techniques have been developed, e.g., better divergence measures or stabilization in MCMC sampling, but there often exists a large gap between EBMs and other generative frameworks like GANs in terms of generation quality. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective framework for improving EBMs via contrastive representation learning (CRL). To be specific, we consider representations learned by contrastive methods as the true underlying latent variable. This contrastive latent variable could guide EBMs to understand the data structure better, so it can improve and accelerate EBM training significantly. To enable the joint training of EBM and CRL, we also design a new class of latent-variable EBMs for learning the joint density of data and the contrastive latent variable. Our experimental results demonstrate that our scheme achieves lower FID scores, compared to prior-art EBM methods (e.g., additionally using variational autoencoders or diffusion techniques), even with significantly faster and more memory-efficient training. We also show conditional and compositional generation abilities of our latent-variable EBMs as their additional benefits, even without explicit conditional training. The code is available at https://github.com/hankook/CLEL.
abstract_zh: 基于能量的模型（EBM）是一种流行的生成框架，它提供明确的密度和架构灵活性，但训练它们很困难，因为它通常不稳定且耗时。近年来，已经开发了各种训练技术，例如更好的散度测量或 MCMC 采样的稳定性，但 EBM 和 GAN 等其他生成框架在生成质量方面往往存在很大差距。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的框架，用于通过对比表示学习（CRL）来改进 EBM。具体来说，我们将通过对比方法学习到的表示视为真正的潜在变量。这种对比潜变量可以指导 EBM 更好地理解数据结构，从而可以显着改善和加速 EBM 训练。为了实现 EBM 和 CRL 的联合训练，我们还设计了一类新的潜变量 EBM，用于学习数据的联合密度和对比潜变量。我们的实验结果表明，与现有技术的 EBM 方法（例如，另外使用变分自动编码器或扩散技术）相比，我们的方案实现了较低的 FID 分数，即使训练速度明显更快且内存效率更高。我们还展示了潜变量 EBM 的条件和组合生成能力，作为其额外的好处，即使没有明确的条件训练。代码可在 https://github.com/hankook/CLEL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过对比表示学习引导能量基模型（EBM），以提升其生成质量和训练效率。
AI.motivation: 能量基模型（EBM）虽具有灵活性，但训练不稳定且耗时，生成质量常落后于GAN等框架。现有改进方法（如变分自编码器或扩散技术）仍存在不足。
AI.method: 将对比学习得到的表示作为潜在变量，设计联合训练的潜在变量EBM框架，通过对比表示学习与EBM联合优化数据与潜在变量的联合密度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在FID指标上优于现有EBM方法，训练更快且内存效率更高，并具备条件生成能力而无需显式条件训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过对比潜在变量引导EBM，有效提升了模型训练效率与生成质量，为EBM的应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Guiding Energy-based Models via Contrastive Latent Variables 通过对比潜在变量指导基于能量的模型 An energy-based model (EBM) is a popular generative framework that offers both explicit density and architectural flexibility, but training them is difficult since it is often unstable and time-consuming. In recent years, various training techniques have been developed, e.g., better divergence measures or stabilization in MCMC sampling, but there often exists a large gap between EBMs and other generative frameworks like GANs in terms of generation quality. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective framework for improving EBMs via contrastive representation learning (CRL). To be specific, we consider representations learned by contrastive methods as the true underlying latent variable. This contrastive latent variable could guide EBMs to understand the data structure better, so it can improve and accelerate EBM training significantly. To enable the joint training of EBM and CRL, we also design a new class of latent-variable EBMs for learning the joint density of data and the contrastive latent variable. Our experimental results demonstrate that our scheme achieves lower FID scores, compared to prior-art EBM methods (e.g., additionally using variational autoencoders or diffusion techniques), even with significantly faster and more memory-efficient training. We also show conditional and compositional generation abilities of our latent-variable EBMs as their additional benefits, even without explicit conditional training. The code is available at https://github.com/hankook/CLEL. 基于能量的模型（EBM）是一种流行的生成框架，它提供明确的密度和架构灵活性，但训练它们很困难，因为它通常不稳定且耗时。近年来，已经开发了各种训练技术，例如更好的散度测量或 MCMC 采样的稳定性，但 EBM 和 GAN 等其他生成框架在生成质量方面往往存在很大差距。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的框架，用于通过对比表示学习（CRL）来改进 EBM。具体来说，我们将通过对比方法学习到的表示视为真正的潜在变量。这种对比潜变量可以指导 EBM 更好地理解数据结构，从而可以显着改善和加速 EBM 训练。为了实现 EBM 和 CRL 的联合训练，我们还设计了一类新的潜变量 EBM，用于学习数据的联合密度和对比潜变量。我们的实验结果表明，与现有技术的 EBM 方法（例如，另外使用变分自动编码器或扩散技术）相比，我们的方案实现了较低的 FID 分数，即使训练速度明显更快且内存效率更高。我们还展示了潜变量 EBM 的条件和组合生成能力，作为其额外的好处，即使没有明确的条件训练。代码可在 https://github.com/hankook/CLEL 获取。 本文提出通过对比表示学习引导能量基模型（EBM），以提升其生成质量和训练效率。 Hankook Lee,Jongheon Jeong,Sejun Park,Jinwoo Shin cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Mohamed Nabih Ali,Francesco Paissan,Daniele Falavigna,Alessio Brutti
title: Scaling strategies for on-device low-complexity source separation with Conv-Tasnet
title_zh: 使用 Conv-Tasnet 实现设备上低复杂性源分离的扩展策略
abstract: Recently, several very effective neural approaches for single-channel speech separation have been presented in the literature. However, due to the size and complexity of these models, their use on low-resource devices, e.g. for hearing aids, and earphones, is still a challenge and established solutions are not available yet. Although approaches based on either pruning or compressing neural models have been proposed, the design of a model architecture suitable for a certain application domain often requires heuristic procedures not easily portable to different low-resource platforms. Given the modular nature of the well-known Conv-Tasnet speech separation architecture, in this paper we consider three parameters that directly control the overall size of the model, namely: the number of residual blocks, the number of repetitions of the separation blocks and the number of channels in the depth-wise convolutions, and experimentally evaluate how they affect the speech separation performance. In particular, experiments carried out on the Libri2Mix show that the number of dilated 1D-Conv blocks is the most critical parameter and that the usage of extra-dilation in the residual blocks allows reducing the performance drop.
summary: Recently, several very effective neural approaches for single-channel speech separation have been presented in the literature. However, due to the size and complexity of these models, their use on low-resource devices, e.g. for hearing aids, and earphones, is still a challenge and established solutions are not available yet. Although approaches based on either pruning or compressing neural models have been proposed, the design of a model architecture suitable for a certain application domain often requires heuristic procedures not easily portable to different low-resource platforms. Given the modular nature of the well-known Conv-Tasnet speech separation architecture, in this paper we consider three parameters that directly control the overall size of the model, namely: the number of residual blocks, the number of repetitions of the separation blocks and the number of channels in the depth-wise convolutions, and experimentally evaluate how they affect the speech separation performance. In particular, experiments carried out on the Libri2Mix show that the number of dilated 1D-Conv blocks is the most critical parameter and that the usage of extra-dilation in the residual blocks allows reducing the performance drop.
abstract_zh: 最近，文献中提出了几种非常有效的单通道语音分离神经方法。然而，由于这些模型的大小和复杂性，它们在资源匮乏的设备上使用，例如对于助听器和耳机来说，这仍然是一个挑战，而且还没有既定的解决方案。尽管已经提出了基于修剪或压缩神经模型的方法，但适合特定应用领域的模型架构的设计通常需要启发式过程，而不易移植到不同的低资源平台。考虑到著名的 Conv-Tasnet 语音分离架构的模块化性质，在本文中，我们考虑三个直接控制模型整体大小的参数，即：残差块的数量、分离块的重复次数和深度卷积中的通道数，并通过实验评估它们如何影响语音分离性能。特别是，在 Libri2Mix 上进行的实验表明，扩张的 1D-Conv 块的数量是最关键的参数，并且在残差块中使用额外扩张可以减少性能下降。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过调整Conv-Tasnet架构的参数，在低资源设备上实现低复杂度的语音分离。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络语音分离模型因规模和复杂度高，难以应用于助听器等低资源设备，需设计可扩展的轻量化方案。
AI.method: 通过实验调整Conv-Tasnet的残差块数量、分离块重复次数及深度卷积通道数，分析其对分离性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，扩张1D-Conv块数量是关键参数，残差块中使用额外扩张可缓解性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数优化可有效降低模型复杂度，其中扩张块数量控制最为关键，额外扩张策略有助于保持性能。

authors_text: Yuqi Zhang,Guanying Chen,Shuguang Cui
title: Efficient Large-scale Scene Representation with a Hybrid of High-resolution Grid and Plane Features
title_zh: 结合高分辨率网格和平面特征的高效大规模场景表示
abstract: Existing neural radiance fields (NeRF) methods for large-scale scene modeling require days of training using multiple GPUs, hindering their applications in scenarios with limited computing resources. Despite fast optimization NeRF variants have been proposed based on the explicit dense or hash grid features, their effectivenesses are mainly demonstrated in object-scale scene representation. In this paper, we point out that the low feature resolution in explicit representation is the bottleneck for large-scale unbounded scene representation. To address this problem, we introduce a new and efficient hybrid feature representation for NeRF that fuses the 3D hash-grids and high-resolution 2D dense plane features. Compared with the dense-grid representation, the resolution of a dense 2D plane can be scaled up more efficiently. Based on this hybrid representation, we propose a fast optimization NeRF variant, called GP-NeRF, that achieves better rendering results while maintaining a compact model size. Extensive experiments on multiple large-scale unbounded scene datasets show that our model can converge in 1.5 hours using a single GPU while achieving results comparable to or even better than the existing method that requires about one day's training with 8 GPUs.
summary: Existing neural radiance fields (NeRF) methods for large-scale scene modeling require days of training using multiple GPUs, hindering their applications in scenarios with limited computing resources. Despite fast optimization NeRF variants have been proposed based on the explicit dense or hash grid features, their effectivenesses are mainly demonstrated in object-scale scene representation. In this paper, we point out that the low feature resolution in explicit representation is the bottleneck for large-scale unbounded scene representation. To address this problem, we introduce a new and efficient hybrid feature representation for NeRF that fuses the 3D hash-grids and high-resolution 2D dense plane features. Compared with the dense-grid representation, the resolution of a dense 2D plane can be scaled up more efficiently. Based on this hybrid representation, we propose a fast optimization NeRF variant, called GP-NeRF, that achieves better rendering results while maintaining a compact model size. Extensive experiments on multiple large-scale unbounded scene datasets show that our model can converge in 1.5 hours using a single GPU while achieving results comparable to or even better than the existing method that requires about one day's training with 8 GPUs.
abstract_zh: 现有的用于大规模场景建模的神经辐射场（NeRF）方法需要使用多个 GPU 进行数天的训练，这阻碍了其在计算资源有限的场景中的应用。尽管基于显式密集或散列网格特征提出了快速优化 NeRF 变体，但它们的有效性主要在对象尺度场景表示中得到证明。在本文中，我们指出显式表示中的低特征分辨率是大规模无界场景表示的瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，我们为 NeRF 引入了一种新的高效混合特征表示，它融合了 3D 哈希网格和高分辨率 2D 密集平面特征。与密集网格表示相比，密集二维平面的分辨率可以更有效地放大。基于这种混合表示，我们提出了一种快速优化 NeRF 变体，称为 GP-NeRF，它可以在保持紧凑的模型尺寸的同时实现更好的渲染结果。对多个大规模无界场景数据集的大量实验表明，我们的模型可以使用单个 GPU 在 1.5 小时内收敛，同时获得与需要使用 8 个 GPU 大约一天的训练的现有方法相当甚至更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合特征表示方法，结合高分辨率网格与平面特征，提升大规模场景的神经辐射场（NeRF）效率。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法在大规模场景建模中训练耗时且依赖多GPU，而快速优化变体在大场景表现不足，主要受限于显式表示的低分辨率。
AI.method: 引入3D哈希网格与高分辨率2D平面特征的混合表示，设计GP-NeRF模型，在保持模型紧凑性的同时提升渲染效果。
AI.result: 在多个大规模场景数据集上，单GPU训练1.5小时即可收敛，效果优于或匹敌需8GPU训练一天的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合特征表示有效平衡了效率与质量，为资源受限环境下的大规模NeRF应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yulin He,Wei Chen,Ke Liang,Yusong Tan,Zhengfa Liang,Yulan Guo
title: Pseudo-label Correction and Learning For Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 半监督目标检测的伪标签校正和学习
abstract: Pseudo-Labeling has emerged as a simple yet effective technique for semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). However, the inevitable noise problem in pseudo-labels significantly degrades the performance of SSOD methods. Recent advances effectively alleviate the classification noise in SSOD, while the localization noise which is a non-negligible part of SSOD is not well-addressed. In this paper, we analyse the localization noise from the generation and learning phases, and propose two strategies, namely pseudo-label correction and noise-unaware learning. For pseudo-label correction, we introduce a multi-round refining method and a multi-vote weighting method. The former iteratively refines the pseudo boxes to improve the stability of predictions, while the latter smoothly self-corrects pseudo boxes by weighing the scores of surrounding jittered boxes. For noise-unaware learning, we introduce a loss weight function that is negatively correlated with the Intersection over Union (IoU) in the regression task, which pulls the predicted boxes closer to the object and improves localization accuracy. Our proposed method, Pseudo-label Correction and Learning (PCL), is extensively evaluated on the MS COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks. On MS COCO, PCL outperforms the supervised baseline by 12.16, 12.11, and 9.57 mAP and the recent SOTA (SoftTeacher) by 3.90, 2.54, and 2.43 mAP under 1\%, 5\%, and 10\% labeling ratios, respectively. On PASCAL VOC, PCL improves the supervised baseline by 5.64 mAP and the recent SOTA (Unbiased Teacherv2) by 1.04 mAP on AP$^{50}$.
summary: Pseudo-Labeling has emerged as a simple yet effective technique for semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). However, the inevitable noise problem in pseudo-labels significantly degrades the performance of SSOD methods. Recent advances effectively alleviate the classification noise in SSOD, while the localization noise which is a non-negligible part of SSOD is not well-addressed. In this paper, we analyse the localization noise from the generation and learning phases, and propose two strategies, namely pseudo-label correction and noise-unaware learning. For pseudo-label correction, we introduce a multi-round refining method and a multi-vote weighting method. The former iteratively refines the pseudo boxes to improve the stability of predictions, while the latter smoothly self-corrects pseudo boxes by weighing the scores of surrounding jittered boxes. For noise-unaware learning, we introduce a loss weight function that is negatively correlated with the Intersection over Union (IoU) in the regression task, which pulls the predicted boxes closer to the object and improves localization accuracy. Our proposed method, Pseudo-label Correction and Learning (PCL), is extensively evaluated on the MS COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks. On MS COCO, PCL outperforms the supervised baseline by 12.16, 12.11, and 9.57 mAP and the recent SOTA (SoftTeacher) by 3.90, 2.54, and 2.43 mAP under 1\%, 5\%, and 10\% labeling ratios, respectively. On PASCAL VOC, PCL improves the supervised baseline by 5.64 mAP and the recent SOTA (Unbiased Teacherv2) by 1.04 mAP on AP$^{50}$.
abstract_zh: 伪标签已经成为一种简单而有效的半监督对象检测（SSOD）技术。然而，伪标签中不可避免的噪声问题显着降低了 SSOD 方法的性能。最近的进展有效地减轻了 SSOD 中的分类噪声，而作为 SSOD 中不可忽略的部分的定位噪声却没有得到很好的解决。在本文中，我们分析了生成和学习阶段的定位噪声，并提出了两种策略，即伪标签校正和噪声无意识学习。对于伪标签校正，我们引入了多轮细化方法和多票加权方法。前者迭代地细化伪框以提高预测的稳定性，而后者通过权衡周围抖动框的分数来平滑地自我校正伪框。对于无噪声学习，我们引入了一个与回归任务中的交并集（IoU）负相关的损失权重函数，它使预测框更接近目标并提高定位精度。我们提出的方法，伪标签校正和学习（PCL），在 MS COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 基准上进行了广泛的评估。在 MS COCO 上，在 1\%、5\% 和 10\% 标记率下，PCL 的性能分别优于监督基线 12.16、12.11 和 9.57 mAP，以及最近的 SOTA (SoftTeacher) 3.90、2.54 和 2.43 mAP。在 PASCAL VOC 上，PCL 将监督基线提高了 5.64 mAP，最近的 SOTA（无偏教师 v2）在 AP$^{50}$ 上提高了 1.04 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督目标检测方法PCL，通过修正伪标签中的定位噪声提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 伪标签中的定位噪声严重影响半监督目标检测性能，现有方法未有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 提出伪标签修正（多轮迭代优化和多投票加权）与无噪声感知学习（基于IoU的损失权重函数）双重策略。
AI.result: 在MS COCO上优于监督基线12.16/12.11/9.57 mAP，超越SOTA方法3.90/2.54/2.43 mAP；PASCAL VOC提升5.64/1.04 mAP。
AI.conclusion: PCL通过系统性处理定位噪声显著提升半监督检测效果，为相关领域提供新思路。

search_text: Pseudo-label Correction and Learning For Semi-Supervised Object Detection 半监督目标检测的伪标签校正和学习 Pseudo-Labeling has emerged as a simple yet effective technique for semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). However, the inevitable noise problem in pseudo-labels significantly degrades the performance of SSOD methods. Recent advances effectively alleviate the classification noise in SSOD, while the localization noise which is a non-negligible part of SSOD is not well-addressed. In this paper, we analyse the localization noise from the generation and learning phases, and propose two strategies, namely pseudo-label correction and noise-unaware learning. For pseudo-label correction, we introduce a multi-round refining method and a multi-vote weighting method. The former iteratively refines the pseudo boxes to improve the stability of predictions, while the latter smoothly self-corrects pseudo boxes by weighing the scores of surrounding jittered boxes. For noise-unaware learning, we introduce a loss weight function that is negatively correlated with the Intersection over Union (IoU) in the regression task, which pulls the predicted boxes closer to the object and improves localization accuracy. Our proposed method, Pseudo-label Correction and Learning (PCL), is extensively evaluated on the MS COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks. On MS COCO, PCL outperforms the supervised baseline by 12.16, 12.11, and 9.57 mAP and the recent SOTA (SoftTeacher) by 3.90, 2.54, and 2.43 mAP under 1\%, 5\%, and 10\% labeling ratios, respectively. On PASCAL VOC, PCL improves the supervised baseline by 5.64 mAP and the recent SOTA (Unbiased Teacherv2) by 1.04 mAP on AP$^{50}$. 伪标签已经成为一种简单而有效的半监督对象检测（SSOD）技术。然而，伪标签中不可避免的噪声问题显着降低了 SSOD 方法的性能。最近的进展有效地减轻了 SSOD 中的分类噪声，而作为 SSOD 中不可忽略的部分的定位噪声却没有得到很好的解决。在本文中，我们分析了生成和学习阶段的定位噪声，并提出了两种策略，即伪标签校正和噪声无意识学习。对于伪标签校正，我们引入了多轮细化方法和多票加权方法。前者迭代地细化伪框以提高预测的稳定性，而后者通过权衡周围抖动框的分数来平滑地自我校正伪框。对于无噪声学习，我们引入了一个与回归任务中的交并集（IoU）负相关的损失权重函数，它使预测框更接近目标并提高定位精度。我们提出的方法，伪标签校正和学习（PCL），在 MS COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 基准上进行了广泛的评估。在 MS COCO 上，在 1\%、5\% 和 10\% 标记率下，PCL 的性能分别优于监督基线 12.16、12.11 和 9.57 mAP，以及最近的 SOTA (SoftTeacher) 3.90、2.54 和 2.43 mAP。在 PASCAL VOC 上，PCL 将监督基线提高了 5.64 mAP，最近的 SOTA（无偏教师 v2）在 AP$^{50}$ 上提高了 1.04 mAP。 本文提出一种半监督目标检测方法PCL，通过修正伪标签中的定位噪声提升检测性能。 Yulin He,Wei Chen,Ke Liang,Yusong Tan,Zhengfa Liang,Yulan Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Sarita de Berg,Marc van Kreveld,Frank Staals
title: The Complexity of Geodesic Spanners
title_zh: 测地扳手的复杂性
comment: 38 pages, 21 figures, a preliminary version appeared at SoCG 2023
comments: 38 pages, 21 figures, a preliminary version appeared at SoCG 2023
abstract: A geometric $t$-spanner for a set $S$ of $n$ point sites is an edge-weighted graph for which the (weighted) distance between any two sites $p,q \in S$ is at most $t$ times the original distance between $p$ and~$q$. We study geometric $t$-spanners for point sets in a constrained two-dimensional environment $P$. In such cases, the edges of the spanner may have non-constant complexity. Hence, we introduce a novel spanner property: the spanner complexity, that is, the total complexity of all edges in the spanner. Let $S$ be a set of $n$ point sites in a simple polygon $P$ with $m$ vertices. We present an algorithm to construct, for any fixed integer $k \geq 1$, a $2\sqrt{2}k$-spanner with complexity $O(mn^{1/k} + n\log^2 n)$ in $O(n\log^2n + m\log n + K)$ time, where $K$ denotes the output complexity. When we relax the restriction that the edges in the spanner are shortest paths, such that an edge in the spanner can be any path between two sites, we obtain for any constant $\varepsilon \in (0,2k)$ a relaxed geodesic $(2k + \varepsilon)$-spanner of the same complexity, where the constant is dependent on $\varepsilon$. When we consider sites in a polygonal domain $P$ with holes, we can construct a relaxed geodesic $6k$-spanner of complexity $O(mn^{1/k} + n\log^2 n)$ in $O((n+m)\log^2n\log m+ K)$ time. Additionally, for any constant $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ and integer constant $t \geq 2$, we show a lower bound for the complexity of any $(t-\varepsilon)$-spanner of $Ω(mn^{1/(t-1)} + n)$.
summary: A geometric $t$-spanner for a set $S$ of $n$ point sites is an edge-weighted graph for which the (weighted) distance between any two sites $p,q \in S$ is at most $t$ times the original distance between $p$ and~$q$. We study geometric $t$-spanners for point sets in a constrained two-dimensional environment $P$. In such cases, the edges of the spanner may have non-constant complexity. Hence, we introduce a novel spanner property: the spanner complexity, that is, the total complexity of all edges in the spanner. Let $S$ be a set of $n$ point sites in a simple polygon $P$ with $m$ vertices. We present an algorithm to construct, for any fixed integer $k \geq 1$, a $2\sqrt{2}k$-spanner with complexity $O(mn^{1/k} + n\log^2 n)$ in $O(n\log^2n + m\log n + K)$ time, where $K$ denotes the output complexity. When we relax the restriction that the edges in the spanner are shortest paths, such that an edge in the spanner can be any path between two sites, we obtain for any constant $\varepsilon \in (0,2k)$ a relaxed geodesic $(2k + \varepsilon)$-spanner of the same complexity, where the constant is dependent on $\varepsilon$. When we consider sites in a polygonal domain $P$ with holes, we can construct a relaxed geodesic $6k$-spanner of complexity $O(mn^{1/k} + n\log^2 n)$ in $O((n+m)\log^2n\log m+ K)$ time. Additionally, for any constant $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ and integer constant $t \geq 2$, we show a lower bound for the complexity of any $(t-\varepsilon)$-spanner of $Ω(mn^{1/(t-1)} + n)$.
abstract_zh: 一组 $S$ 的 $n$ 个点站点的几何 $t$ 扳手是一个边加权图，其中任意两个站点 $p,q \in S$ 之间的（加权）距离最多为 $p$ 和 ~$q$ 之间的原始距离的 $t$ 倍。我们研究约束二维环境 $P$ 中点集的几何 $t$ 扳手。在这种情况下，扳手的边缘可能具有非恒定的复杂性。因此，我们引入了一个新颖的扳手属性：扳手复杂度，即扳手中所有边的总复杂度。令 $S$ 为具有 $m$ 个顶点的简单多边形 $P$ 中的一组 $n$ 个点位。我们提出了一种算法，对于任何固定整数 $k \geq 1$，在 $O(n\log^2n + m\log n + K)$ 时间内构建复杂度为 $O(mn^{1/k} + n\log^2 n)$ 的 $2\sqrt{2}k$-spanner，其中 $K$ 表示输出复杂度。当我们放宽扳手中的边是最短路径的限制时，使得扳手中的边可以是两个站点之间的任何路径，对于任何常数 $\varepsilon \in (0,2k)$，我们获得具有相同复杂度的宽松测地线 $(2k + \varepsilon)$-spanner，其中常数取决于 $\varepsilon$。当我们考虑带有孔的多边形域 $P$ 中的站点时，我们可以在 $O((n+m)\log^2n\log m+ K)$ 时间内构建复杂度为 $O(mn^{1/k} + n\log^2 n)$ 的宽松测地线 $6k$ 扳手。此外，对于任何常数 $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ 和整数常数 $t \geq 2$，我们显示了 $Ω(mn^{1/(t-1)} + n)$ 的任何 $(t-\varepsilon)$-spanner 的复杂度下限。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在二维约束环境中构造几何t-跨度生成树的复杂度问题，提出了一种新的跨度复杂度属性，并设计了针对简单多边形和带孔多边形域的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统几何跨度生成树在约束环境中存在边复杂度非常数的问题，需引入新的复杂度度量标准以平衡生成树的近似质量与构造效率。
AI.method: 提出跨度复杂度概念，设计基于简单多边形和带孔多边形域的算法，通过调整边路径约束条件（最短路径或松弛路径）实现不同复杂度的生成树构造。
AI.result: 在简单多边形中构造了复杂度为O(mn^{1/k}+n log²n)的2√2k-跨度生成树；在带孔域中构造了复杂度相同的6k-跨度生成树，并证明了(t−ε)-跨度生成树的复杂度下界为Ω(mn^{1/(t−1)}+n)。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入跨度复杂度属性，论文为约束环境下的几何跨度生成树提供了理论界和高效算法，揭示了近似质量与构造复杂度之间的权衡关系。

authors_text: Shijie Geng,Jianbo Yuan,Yu Tian,Yuxiao Chen,Yongfeng Zhang
title: HiCLIP: Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining with Hierarchy-aware Attention
title_zh: HiCLIP：具有层次感知注意力的对比语言图像预训练
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2023
comments: Accepted at ICLR 2023
abstract: The success of large-scale contrastive vision-language pretraining (CLIP) has benefited both visual recognition and multimodal content understanding. The concise design brings CLIP the advantage in inference efficiency against other vision-language models with heavier cross-attention fusion layers, making it a popular choice for a wide spectrum of downstream tasks. However, CLIP does not explicitly capture the hierarchical nature of high-level and fine-grained semantics conveyed in images and texts, which is arguably critical to vision-language understanding and reasoning. To this end, we equip both the visual and language branches in CLIP with hierarchy-aware attentions, namely Hierarchy-aware CLIP (HiCLIP), to progressively discover semantic hierarchies layer-by-layer from both images and texts in an unsupervised manner. As a result, such hierarchical aggregation significantly improves the cross-modal alignment. To demonstrate the advantages of HiCLIP, we conduct qualitative analysis on its unsupervised hierarchy induction during inference, as well as extensive quantitative experiments on both visual recognition and vision-language downstream tasks.
summary: The success of large-scale contrastive vision-language pretraining (CLIP) has benefited both visual recognition and multimodal content understanding. The concise design brings CLIP the advantage in inference efficiency against other vision-language models with heavier cross-attention fusion layers, making it a popular choice for a wide spectrum of downstream tasks. However, CLIP does not explicitly capture the hierarchical nature of high-level and fine-grained semantics conveyed in images and texts, which is arguably critical to vision-language understanding and reasoning. To this end, we equip both the visual and language branches in CLIP with hierarchy-aware attentions, namely Hierarchy-aware CLIP (HiCLIP), to progressively discover semantic hierarchies layer-by-layer from both images and texts in an unsupervised manner. As a result, such hierarchical aggregation significantly improves the cross-modal alignment. To demonstrate the advantages of HiCLIP, we conduct qualitative analysis on its unsupervised hierarchy induction during inference, as well as extensive quantitative experiments on both visual recognition and vision-language downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 大规模对比视觉语言预训练（CLIP）的成功使视觉识别和多模态内容理解受益。简洁的设计使 CLIP 相对于其他具有较重交叉注意力融合层的视觉语言模型而言具有推理效率的优势，使其成为广泛下游任务的流行选择。然而，CLIP 并没有明确捕获图像和文本中传达的高级和细粒度语义的层次性质，这对于视觉语言理解和推理来说可以说是至关重要的。为此，我们为 CLIP 中的视觉和语言分支配备了层次感知注意力，即层次感知 CLIP (HiCLIP)，以无监督的方式逐步从图像和文本中逐层发现语义层次结构。因此，这种分层聚合显着改善了跨模式对齐。为了展示 HiCLIP 的优势，我们对其推理过程中的无监督层次归纳进行了定性分析，并对视觉识别和视觉语言下游任务进行了广泛的定量实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiCLIP模型，通过引入层次感知注意力机制改进对比语言-图像预训练，以增强跨模态对齐并提升视觉-语言理解能力。
AI.motivation: CLIP等模型虽在推理效率上具有优势，但未能显式捕捉图像和文本中高阶与细粒度语义的层次结构，而这种层次性对视觉-语言理解和推理至关重要。
AI.method: 在CLIP的视觉和语言分支中分别引入层次感知注意力模块，通过无监督方式逐层挖掘图像和文本的语义层次，逐步聚合跨模态信息。
AI.result: 实验表明HiCLIP在视觉识别和视觉-语言下游任务中均优于基线模型，且通过定性分析验证了其层次语义归纳能力。
AI.conclusion: 层次感知机制有效提升了跨模态对齐性能，HiCLIP为复杂视觉-语言任务提供了更强大的表示学习框架。

As a result, such hierarchical aggregation significantly improves the cross-modal alignment. authors_text: Gauthier Tallec,Arnaud Dapogny,Kevin Bailly
title: Fighting noise and imbalance in Action Unit detection problems
title_zh: 解决行动单元检测中的噪音和不平衡问题
abstract: Action Unit (AU) detection aims at automatically caracterizing facial expressions with the muscular activations they involve. Its main interest is to provide a low-level face representation that can be used to assist higher level affective computing tasks learning. Yet, it is a challenging task. Indeed, the available databases display limited face variability and are imbalanced toward neutral expressions. Furthermore, as AU involve subtle face movements they are difficult to annotate so that some of the few provided datapoints may be mislabeled. In this work, we aim at exploiting label smoothing ability to mitigate noisy examples impact by reducing confidence [1]. However, applying label smoothing as it is may aggravate imbalance-based pre-existing under-confidence issue and degrade performance. To circumvent this issue, we propose Robin Hood Label Smoothing (RHLS). RHLS principle is to restrain label smoothing confidence reduction to the majority class. In that extent, it alleviates both the imbalance-based over-confidence issue and the negative impact of noisy majority class examples. From an experimental standpoint, we show that RHLS provides a free performance improvement in AU detection. In particular, by applying it on top of a modern multi-task baseline we get promising results on BP4D and outperform state-of-the-art methods on DISFA.
summary: Action Unit (AU) detection aims at automatically caracterizing facial expressions with the muscular activations they involve. Its main interest is to provide a low-level face representation that can be used to assist higher level affective computing tasks learning. Yet, it is a challenging task. Indeed, the available databases display limited face variability and are imbalanced toward neutral expressions. Furthermore, as AU involve subtle face movements they are difficult to annotate so that some of the few provided datapoints may be mislabeled. In this work, we aim at exploiting label smoothing ability to mitigate noisy examples impact by reducing confidence [1]. However, applying label smoothing as it is may aggravate imbalance-based pre-existing under-confidence issue and degrade performance. To circumvent this issue, we propose Robin Hood Label Smoothing (RHLS). RHLS principle is to restrain label smoothing confidence reduction to the majority class. In that extent, it alleviates both the imbalance-based over-confidence issue and the negative impact of noisy majority class examples. From an experimental standpoint, we show that RHLS provides a free performance improvement in AU detection. In particular, by applying it on top of a modern multi-task baseline we get promising results on BP4D and outperform state-of-the-art methods on DISFA.
abstract_zh: 动作单元 (AU) 检测旨在自动表征面部表情及其所涉及的肌肉激活。其主要兴趣是提供低级面部表示，可用于辅助更高级别的情感计算任务学习。然而，这是一项具有挑战性的任务。事实上，可用的数据库显示面部变化有限，并且对于中性表情不平衡。此外，由于 AU 涉及微妙的面部运动，因此很难对其进行注释，因此提供的少数数据点中的一些可能会被错误标记。在这项工作中，我们的目标是利用标签平滑能力通过降低置信度来减轻噪声示例的影响[1]。然而，按原样应用标签平滑可能会加剧基于不平衡的预先存在的置信度不足问题并降低性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了罗宾汉标签平滑（RHLS）。 RHLS的原理是抑制标签平滑置信度降低到多数类。从这个意义上说，它减轻了基于不平衡的过度自信问题和嘈杂的多数类例子的负面影响。从实验的角度来看，我们表明 RHLS 在 AU 检测方面提供了免费的性能改进。特别是，通过将其应用在现代多任务基线之上，我们在 BP4D 上获得了有希望的结果，并且在 DISFA 上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过提出Robin Hood Label Smoothing（RHLS）方法，解决动作单元（AU）检测中的噪声标注和类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AU检测数据集存在标注噪声和类别不平衡问题，传统标签平滑方法可能加剧不平衡导致的过自信问题，需设计针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 提出RHLS方法，仅对多数类进行标签平滑置信度缩减，兼顾缓解不平衡引起的过自信和多数类噪声样本的负面影响。
AI.result: 在BP4D数据集上实现性能提升，在DISFA数据集上超越现有最优方法，验证了RHLS的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RHLS通过差异化标签平滑策略，有效应对AU检测中的噪声与不平衡挑战，为多任务学习提供可扩展的改进方案。

authors_text: Pavel Petracek,Viktor Walter,Tomas Baca,Martin Saska
title: Bio-Inspired Compact Swarms of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles without Communication and External Localization
title_zh: 无通信和外部定位的仿生紧凑型无人机群
comment: ef:Bioinspiration & Biomimetics, vol. 16, no. 2, pp. 026009, 2020
comments: ef:Bioinspiration & Biomimetics, vol. 16, no. 2, pp. 026009, 2020
abstract: This article presents a unique framework for deploying decentralized and infrastructure-independent swarms of homogeneous aerial vehicles in the real world without explicit communication. This is a requirement in swarm research, which anticipates that global knowledge and communication will not scale well with the number of robots. The system architecture proposed in this article employs the UVDAR technique to directly perceive the local neighborhood for direct mutual localization of swarm members. The technique allows for decentralization and high scalability of swarm systems, such as can be observed in fish schools, bird flocks, or cattle herds. The bio-inspired swarming model that has been developed is suited for real-world deployment of large particle groups in outdoor and indoor environments with obstacles. The collective behavior of the model emerges from a set of local rules based on direct observation of the neighborhood using onboard sensors only. The model is scalable, requires only local perception of agents and the environment, and requires no communication among the agents. Apart from simulated scenarios, the performance and usability of the entire framework is analyzed in several real-world experiments with a fully-decentralized swarm of UAVs deployed in outdoor conditions. To the best of our knowledge, these experiments are the first deployment of decentralized bio-inspired compact swarms of UAVs without the use of a communication network or shared absolute localization. The entire system is available as open-source at https://github.com/ctu-mrs.

To the best of our knowledge, these experiments are the first deployment of decentralized bio-inspired compact swarms of UAVs without the use of a communication network or shared absolute localization. The entire system is available as open-source at https://github.com/ctu-mrs.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个独特的框架，用于在现实世界中部署分散且独立于基础设施的同质飞行器群，而无需明确的通信。这是群体研究的要求，群体研究预计全球知识和通信不会随着机器人数量的增加而很好地扩展。本文提出的系统架构采用UVDAR技术来直接感知局部邻域，以实现群体成员的直接相互定位。该技术允许集群系统的分散化和高可扩展性，例如可以在鱼群、鸟群或牛群中观察到的情况。已开发的仿生蜂群模型适用于在有障碍物的室外和室内环境中实际部署大颗粒群。该模型的集体行为源自一组局部规则，这些规则基于仅使用机载传感器对邻近区域的直接观察。该模型具有可扩展性，仅需要代理和环境的本地感知，并且不需要代理之间的通信。除了模拟场景之外，还通过在室外条件下部署的完全分散的无人机群进行的几次实际实验来分析整个框架的性能和可用性。据我们所知，这些实验是首次在不使用通信网络或共享绝对定位的情况下部署分散式仿生紧凑型无人机群。整个系统可在 https://github.com/ctu-mrs 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需通信和外部定位的去中心化无人机群框架，灵感来自生物群体行为。
AI.motivation: 传统群机器人系统依赖通信和全局定位，但随着机器人数量增加难以扩展，需探索无需通信的生物启发式方法。
AI.method: 采用UVDAR技术通过局部感知实现成员间直接定位，基于局部规则和 onboard 传感器构建去中心化模型。
AI.result: 在户外真实环境中成功部署了无需通信网络和绝对定位的完全去中心化无人机群，验证了系统的可扩展性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了无需通信的生物启发式无人机群控制，适用于复杂环境，代码已开源供进一步研究。
