search_text: Bio-Inspired Compact Swarms of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles without Communication and External Localization 无通信和外部定位的仿生紧凑型无人机群 This article presents a unique framework for deploying decentralized and infrastructure-independent swarms of homogeneous aerial vehicles in the real world without explicit communication. This is a requirement in swarm research, which anticipates that global knowledge and communication will not scale well with the number of robots. The system architecture proposed in this article employs the UVDAR technique to directly perceive the local neighborhood for direct mutual localization of swarm members. The technique allows for decentralization and high scalability of swarm systems, such as can be observed in fish schools, bird flocks, or cattle herds. The bio-inspired swarming model that has been developed is suited for real-world deployment of large particle groups in outdoor and indoor environments with obstacles. The collective behavior of the model emerges from a set of local rules based on direct observation of the neighborhood using onboard sensors only. The model is scalable, requires only local perception of agents and the environment, and requires no communication among the agents. Apart from simulated scenarios, the performance and usability of the entire framework is analyzed in several real-world experiments with a fully-decentralized swarm of UAVs deployed in outdoor conditions. To the best of our knowledge, these experiments are the first deployment of decentralized bio-inspired compact swarms of UAVs without the use of a communication network or shared absolute localization. The entire system is available as open-source at https://github.com/ctu-mrs. 本文提出了一个独特的框架，用于在现实世界中部署分散且独立于基础设施的同质飞行器群，而无需明确的通信。这是群体研究的要求，群体研究预计全球知识和通信不会随着机器人数量的增加而很好地扩展。本文提出的系统架构采用UVDAR技术来直接感知局部邻域，以实现群体成员的直接相互定位。该技术允许集群系统的分散化和高可扩展性，例如可以在鱼群、鸟群或牛群中观察到的情况。已开发的仿生蜂群模型适用于在有障碍物的室外和室内环境中实际部署大颗粒群。该模型的集体行为源自一组局部规则，这些规则基于仅使用机载传感器对邻近区域的直接观察。该模型具有可扩展性，仅需要代理和环境的本地感知，并且不需要代理之间的通信。除了模拟场景之外，还通过在室外条件下部署的完全分散的无人机群进行的几次实际实验来分析整个框架的性能和可用性。据我们所知，这些实验是首次在不使用通信网络或共享绝对定位的情况下部署分散式仿生紧凑型无人机群。整个系统可在 https://github.com/ctu-mrs 上开源。 本文提出了一种无需通信和外部定位的去中心化无人机群框架，灵感来自生物群体行为。 Pavel Petracek,Viktor Walter,Tomas Baca,Martin Saska cs.RO,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Zahra Kadkhodaie,Florentin Guth,Stéphane Mallat,Eero P Simoncelli
title: Learning multi-scale local conditional probability models of images
title_zh: 学习图像的多尺度局部条件概率模型
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures
comments: 16 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Deep neural networks can learn powerful prior probability models for images, as evidenced by the high-quality generations obtained with recent score-based diffusion methods. But the means by which these networks capture complex global statistical structure, apparently without suffering from the curse of dimensionality, remain a mystery. To study this, we incorporate diffusion methods into a multi-scale decomposition, reducing dimensionality by assuming a stationary local Markov model for wavelet coefficients conditioned on coarser-scale coefficients. We instantiate this model using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with local receptive fields, which enforce both the stationarity and Markov properties. Global structures are captured using a CNN with receptive fields covering the entire (but small) low-pass image. We test this model on a dataset of face images, which are highly non-stationary and contain large-scale geometric structures. Remarkably, denoising, super-resolution, and image synthesis results all demonstrate that these structures can be captured with significantly smaller conditioning neighborhoods than required by a Markov model implemented in the pixel domain. Our results show that score estimation for large complex images can be reduced to low-dimensional Markov conditional models across scales, alleviating the curse of dimensionality.
summary: Deep neural networks can learn powerful prior probability models for images, as evidenced by the high-quality generations obtained with recent score-based diffusion methods. But the means by which these networks capture complex global statistical structure, apparently without suffering from the curse of dimensionality, remain a mystery. To study this, we incorporate diffusion methods into a multi-scale decomposition, reducing dimensionality by assuming a stationary local Markov model for wavelet coefficients conditioned on coarser-scale coefficients. We instantiate this model using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with local receptive fields, which enforce both the stationarity and Markov properties. Global structures are captured using a CNN with receptive fields covering the entire (but small) low-pass image. We test this model on a dataset of face images, which are highly non-stationary and contain large-scale geometric structures. Remarkably, denoising, super-resolution, and image synthesis results all demonstrate that these structures can be captured with significantly smaller conditioning neighborhoods than required by a Markov model implemented in the pixel domain. Our results show that score estimation for large complex images can be reduced to low-dimensional Markov conditional models across scales, alleviating the curse of dimensionality.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络可以学习强大的图像先验概率模型，最近基于分数的扩散方法获得的高质量生成就证明了这一点。但这些网络如何捕获复杂的全球统计结构，并且显然不会受到维数灾难的影响，仍然是一个谜。为了研究这一点，我们将扩散方法纳入多尺度分解，通过假设以较粗尺度系数为条件的小波系数的稳态局部马尔可夫模型来降低维度。我们使用具有局部感受野的卷积神经网络（CNN）实例化该模型，这增强了平稳性和马尔可夫特性。使用 CNN 捕获全局结构，其感受野覆盖整个（但很小）低通图像。我们在人脸图像数据集上测试该模型，该数据集高度非平稳且包含大规模几何结构。值得注意的是，去噪、超分辨率和图像合成结果都表明，可以使用比在像素域中实现的马尔可夫模型所需的小得多的条件邻域来捕获这些结构。我们的结果表明，大型复杂图像的分数估计可以简化为跨尺度的低维马尔可夫条件模型，从而减轻维数灾难。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度局部条件概率模型，用于学习图像的全局统计结构并缓解维度灾难问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络能生成高质量图像，但其如何捕捉复杂全局统计结构并避免维度灾难的机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 结合扩散模型与多尺度分解，假设小波系数在粗尺度条件下满足平稳局部马尔可夫模型，使用CNN局部感受野强制平稳性和马尔可夫性，通过覆盖低通图像的全局CNN捕捉大尺度结构。
AI.result: 在人脸数据集上验证，去噪、超分辨率和图像合成结果表明，该模型能以远小于像素域马尔可夫模型所需的条件邻域捕获大尺度几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 大规模复杂图像的分数估计可分解为跨尺度的低维马尔可夫条件模型，有效缓解维度灾难问题。

But the means by which these networks capture complex global statistical structure, apparently without suffering from the curse of dimensionality, remain a mystery. authors_text: Xiang Wang,Shiwei Zhang,Jun Cen,Changxin Gao,Yingya Zhang,Deli Zhao,Nong Sang
title: CLIP-guided Prototype Modulating for Few-shot Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于少镜头动作识别的 CLIP 引导原型调制
comment: This work has been submitted to the Springer for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the Springer for possible publication
abstract: Learning from large-scale contrastive language-image pre-training like CLIP has shown remarkable success in a wide range of downstream tasks recently, but it is still under-explored on the challenging few-shot action recognition (FSAR) task. In this work, we aim to transfer the powerful multimodal knowledge of CLIP to alleviate the inaccurate prototype estimation issue due to data scarcity, which is a critical problem in low-shot regimes. To this end, we present a CLIP-guided prototype modulating framework called CLIP-FSAR, which consists of two key components: a video-text contrastive objective and a prototype modulation. Specifically, the former bridges the task discrepancy between CLIP and the few-shot video task by contrasting videos and corresponding class text descriptions. The latter leverages the transferable textual concepts from CLIP to adaptively refine visual prototypes with a temporal Transformer. By this means, CLIP-FSAR can take full advantage of the rich semantic priors in CLIP to obtain reliable prototypes and achieve accurate few-shot classification. Extensive experiments on five commonly used benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method, and CLIP-FSAR significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods under various settings. The source code and models will be publicly available at https://github.com/alibaba-mmai-research/CLIP-FSAR.
summary: Learning from large-scale contrastive language-image pre-training like CLIP has shown remarkable success in a wide range of downstream tasks recently, but it is still under-explored on the challenging few-shot action recognition (FSAR) task. In this work, we aim to transfer the powerful multimodal knowledge of CLIP to alleviate the inaccurate prototype estimation issue due to data scarcity, which is a critical problem in low-shot regimes. To this end, we present a CLIP-guided prototype modulating framework called CLIP-FSAR, which consists of two key components: a video-text contrastive objective and a prototype modulation. Specifically, the former bridges the task discrepancy between CLIP and the few-shot video task by contrasting videos and corresponding class text descriptions. The latter leverages the transferable textual concepts from CLIP to adaptively refine visual prototypes with a temporal Transformer. By this means, CLIP-FSAR can take full advantage of the rich semantic priors in CLIP to obtain reliable prototypes and achieve accurate few-shot classification. Extensive experiments on five commonly used benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method, and CLIP-FSAR significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods under various settings. The source code and models will be publicly available at https://github.com/alibaba-mmai-research/CLIP-FSAR.
abstract_zh: 像 CLIP 这样的大规模对比语言图像预训练学习最近在广泛的下游任务中取得了显着的成功，但在具有挑战性的少镜头动作识别（FSAR）任务上仍然没有得到充分的探索。在这项工作中，我们的目标是转移 CLIP 强大的多模态知识，以缓解由于数据稀缺而导致的原型估计不准确的问题，这是低样本情况下的一个关键问题。为此，我们提出了一种称为 CLIP-FSAR 的 CLIP 引导原型调制框架，它由两个关键组件组成：视频文本对比目标和原型调制。具体来说，前者通过对比视频和相应的类文本描述来弥合 CLIP 和少镜头视频任务之间的任务差异。后者利用 CLIP 中的可转移文本概念，通过时间 Transformer 自适应地完善视觉原型。通过这种方式，CLIP-FSAR可以充分利用CLIP中丰富的语义先验来获得可靠的原型并实现准确的少样本分类。对五个常用基准的大量实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，并且 CLIP-FSAR 在各种设置下都显着优于现有的最先进方法。源代码和模型将在 https://github.com/alibaba-mmai-research/CLIP-FSAR 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-FSAR框架，通过结合CLIP的多模态知识解决少样本动作识别中的原型估计不准确问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本动作识别方法在数据稀缺场景下难以准确估计视觉原型，而CLIP的预训练语言-图像对齐能力可提供丰富的语义先验知识。
AI.method: 设计包含视频-文本对比目标和原型调制模块的框架，通过对比视频与文本描述缩小任务差异，并利用CLIP的文本概念与时间Transformer动态优化视觉原型。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上显著优于现有SOTA方法，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-FSAR通过有效整合CLIP的语义先验，实现了更可靠的少样本动作分类性能。

search_text: CLIP-guided Prototype Modulating for Few-shot Action Recognition 用于少镜头动作识别的 CLIP 引导原型调制 Learning from large-scale contrastive language-image pre-training like CLIP has shown remarkable success in a wide range of downstream tasks recently, but it is still under-explored on the challenging few-shot action recognition (FSAR) task. In this work, we aim to transfer the powerful multimodal knowledge of CLIP to alleviate the inaccurate prototype estimation issue due to data scarcity, which is a critical problem in low-shot regimes. To this end, we present a CLIP-guided prototype modulating framework called CLIP-FSAR, which consists of two key components: a video-text contrastive objective and a prototype modulation. Specifically, the former bridges the task discrepancy between CLIP and the few-shot video task by contrasting videos and corresponding class text descriptions. The latter leverages the transferable textual concepts from CLIP to adaptively refine visual prototypes with a temporal Transformer. By this means, CLIP-FSAR can take full advantage of the rich semantic priors in CLIP to obtain reliable prototypes and achieve accurate few-shot classification. Extensive experiments on five commonly used benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method, and CLIP-FSAR significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods under various settings. The source code and models will be publicly available at https://github.com/alibaba-mmai-research/CLIP-FSAR. 像 CLIP 这样的大规模对比语言图像预训练学习最近在广泛的下游任务中取得了显着的成功，但在具有挑战性的少镜头动作识别（FSAR）任务上仍然没有得到充分的探索。在这项工作中，我们的目标是转移 CLIP 强大的多模态知识，以缓解由于数据稀缺而导致的原型估计不准确的问题，这是低样本情况下的一个关键问题。为此，我们提出了一种称为 CLIP-FSAR 的 CLIP 引导原型调制框架，它由两个关键组件组成：视频文本对比目标和原型调制。具体来说，前者通过对比视频和相应的类文本描述来弥合 CLIP 和少镜头视频任务之间的任务差异。后者利用 CLIP 中的可转移文本概念，通过时间 Transformer 自适应地完善视觉原型。通过这种方式，CLIP-FSAR可以充分利用CLIP中丰富的语义先验来获得可靠的原型并实现准确的少样本分类。对五个常用基准的大量实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，并且 CLIP-FSAR 在各种设置下都显着优于现有的最先进方法。源代码和模型将在 https://github.com/alibaba-mmai-research/CLIP-FSAR 公开提供。 本文提出CLIP-FSAR框架，通过结合CLIP的多模态知识解决少样本动作识别中的原型估计不准确问题。 Xiang Wang,Shiwei Zhang,Jun Cen,Changxin Gao,Yingya Zhang,Deli Zhao,Nong Sang cs.CV

authors_text: Chang Sun,Qianying Li,Guanxiang Wang,Sihao Xu,Yitong Liu
title: KDSM: An uplift modeling framework based on knowledge distillation and sample matching
title_zh: KDSM：基于知识蒸馏和样本匹配的提升建模框架
abstract: Uplift modeling aims to estimate the treatment effect on individuals, widely applied in the e-commerce platform to target persuadable customers and maximize the return of marketing activities. Among the existing uplift modeling methods, tree-based methods are adept at fitting increment and generalization, while neural-network-based models excel at predicting absolute value and precision, and these advantages have not been fully explored and combined. Also, the lack of counterfactual sample pairs is the root challenge in uplift modeling. In this paper, we proposed an uplift modeling framework based on Knowledge Distillation and Sample Matching (KDSM). The teacher model is the uplift decision tree (UpliftDT), whose structure is exploited to construct counterfactual sample pairs, and the pairwise incremental prediction is treated as another objective for the student model. Under the idea of multitask learning, the student model can achieve better performance on generalization and even surpass the teacher. Extensive offline experiments validate the universality of different combinations of teachers and student models and the superiority of KDSM measured against the baselines. In online A/B testing, the cost of each incremental room night is reduced by 6.5\%.
summary: Uplift modeling aims to estimate the treatment effect on individuals, widely applied in the e-commerce platform to target persuadable customers and maximize the return of marketing activities. Among the existing uplift modeling methods, tree-based methods are adept at fitting increment and generalization, while neural-network-based models excel at predicting absolute value and precision, and these advantages have not been fully explored and combined. Also, the lack of counterfactual sample pairs is the root challenge in uplift modeling. In this paper, we proposed an uplift modeling framework based on Knowledge Distillation and Sample Matching (KDSM). The teacher model is the uplift decision tree (UpliftDT), whose structure is exploited to construct counterfactual sample pairs, and the pairwise incremental prediction is treated as another objective for the student model. Under the idea of multitask learning, the student model can achieve better performance on generalization and even surpass the teacher. Extensive offline experiments validate the universality of different combinations of teachers and student models and the superiority of KDSM measured against the baselines. In online A/B testing, the cost of each incremental room night is reduced by 6.5\%.
abstract_zh: 提升模型旨在估计对个体的治疗效果，广泛应用于电子商务平台，以瞄准可说服的客户并最大化营销活动的回报。现有的隆起建模方法中，基于树的方法擅长拟合增量和泛化，而基于神经网络的模型擅长预测绝对值和精度，这些优点尚未得到充分的挖掘和结合。此外，缺乏反事实样本对是隆起建模的根本挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于知识蒸馏和样本匹配（KDSM）的提升建模框架。教师模型是提升决策树（UpliftDT），利用其结构来构造反事实样本对，成对增量预测被视为学生模型的另一个目标。在多任务学习的思想下，学生模型可以在泛化上取得更好的表现，甚至超越老师。大量的线下实验验证了教师和学生模型不同组合的普遍性以及 KDSM 相对于基线的优越性。在线A/B测试中，每增量间夜成本降低6.5\%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识蒸馏和样本匹配的提升建模框架KDSM，用于解决电子商务平台中精准识别可说服客户的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有提升建模方法中，树模型擅长增量拟合但精度不足，神经网络模型精度高但难以处理反事实样本缺失问题，亟需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 以UpliftDT为教师模型生成反事实样本对，通过知识蒸馏与多任务学习训练学生模型，同时优化增量预测目标。
AI.result: 离线实验验证了教师-学生模型组合的普适性，线上A/B测试使每间客房增量成本降低6.5%。
AI.conclusion: KDSM有效融合了树模型与神经网络优势，在提升建模任务中展现出优于基线方法的泛化能力与实际效果。

authors_text: Johannes Künzel,Darko Vehar,Rico Nestler,Karl-Heinz Franke,Anna Hilsmann,Peter Eisert
title: System for 3D Acquisition and 3D Reconstruction using Structured Light for Sewer Line Inspection
title_zh: 使用结构光进行下水道管道检查的 3D 采集和 3D 重建系统
comment: 10 pages, published at VISAPP 2023, Lisbon, Portugal
comments: 10 pages, published at VISAPP 2023, Lisbon, Portugal
abstract: The assessment of sewer pipe systems is a highly important, but at the same time cumbersome and error-prone task. We introduce an innovative system based on single-shot structured light modules that facilitates the detection and classification of spatial defects like jutting intrusions, spallings, or misaligned joints. This system creates highly accurate 3D measurements with sub-millimeter resolution of pipe surfaces and fuses them into a holistic 3D model. The benefit of such a holistic 3D model is twofold: on the one hand, it facilitates the accurate manual sewer pipe assessment, on the other, it simplifies the detection of defects in downstream automatic systems as it endows the input with highly accurate depth information. In this work, we provide an extensive overview of the system and give valuable insights into our design choices.
summary: The assessment of sewer pipe systems is a highly important, but at the same time cumbersome and error-prone task. We introduce an innovative system based on single-shot structured light modules that facilitates the detection and classification of spatial defects like jutting intrusions, spallings, or misaligned joints. This system creates highly accurate 3D measurements with sub-millimeter resolution of pipe surfaces and fuses them into a holistic 3D model. The benefit of such a holistic 3D model is twofold: on the one hand, it facilitates the accurate manual sewer pipe assessment, on the other, it simplifies the detection of defects in downstream automatic systems as it endows the input with highly accurate depth information. In this work, we provide an extensive overview of the system and give valuable insights into our design choices.
abstract_zh: 下水道管道系统的评估是一项非常重要的任务，但同时也是一项繁琐且容易出错的任务。我们引入了一种基于单次结构光模块的创新系统，该系统有助于空间缺陷的检测和分类，例如突出侵入、剥落或未对准的接头。该系统可对管道表面进行亚毫米分辨率的高精度 3D 测量，并将其融合成整体 3D 模型。这种整体 3D 模型的好处是双重的：一方面，它有助于准确的手动污水管道评估，另一方面，它简化了下游自动系统中缺陷的检测，因为它为输入赋予了高度准确的深度信息。在这项工作中，我们提供了系统的广泛概述，并对我们的设计选择提供了宝贵的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单次结构光模块的系统，用于下水道管道的3D获取与重建，以实现高精度的缺陷检测与分类。
AI.motivation: 下水道管道系统的检测任务繁琐且易出错，传统方法难以高效准确地识别如突起、剥落或错位接缝等空间缺陷，亟需一种自动化高精度的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用单次结构光模块对管道表面进行亚毫米级3D测量，并融合生成整体3D模型，结合深度信息提升缺陷检测的准确性。
AI.result: 系统实现了高精度的3D管道建模，既辅助人工检测，又为下游自动检测系统提供可靠深度数据，显著提升缺陷识别效率与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过结构光技术有效解决了传统下水道检测的痛点，为人工与自动化检测提供了统一的高精度数据基础，具有重要工程应用价值。

We introduce an innovative system based on single-shot structured light modules that facilitates the detection and classification of spatial defects like jutting intrusions, spallings, or misaligned joints. This system creates highly accurate 3D measurements with sub-millimeter resolution of pipe surfaces and fuses them into a holistic 3D model. The benefit of such a holistic 3D model is twofold: on the one hand, it facilitates the accurate manual sewer pipe assessment, on the other, it simplifies the detection of defects in downstream automatic systems as it endows the input with highly accurate depth information. In this work, we provide an extensive overview of the system and give valuable insights into our design choices. 下水道管道系统的评估是一项非常重要的任务，但同时也是一项繁琐且容易出错的任务。我们引入了一种基于单次结构光模块的创新系统，该系统有助于空间缺陷的检测和分类，例如突出侵入、剥落或未对准的接头。该系统可对管道表面进行亚毫米分辨率的高精度 3D 测量，并将其融合成整体 3D 模型。这种整体 3D 模型的好处是双重的：一方面，它有助于准确的手动污水管道评估，另一方面，它简化了下游自动系统中缺陷的检测，因为它为输入赋予了高度准确的深度信息。在这项工作中，我们提供了系统的广泛概述，并对我们的设计选择提供了宝贵的见解。 本文提出了一种基于单次结构光模块的系统，用于下水道管道的3D获取与重建，以实现高精度的缺陷检测与分类。 Johannes Künzel,Darko Vehar,Rico Nestler,Karl-Heinz Franke,Anna Hilsmann,Peter Eisert cs.CV

authors_text: Pavel Petracek,Vit Kratky,Martin Saska
title: Dronument: System for Reliable Deployment of Micro Aerial Vehicles in Dark Areas of Large Historical Monuments
title_zh: Dronument：在大型历史古迹的黑暗区域可靠部署微型飞行器的系统
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 5, no. 2, pp. 2078-2085, 2020
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 5, no. 2, pp. 2078-2085, 2020
abstract: This letter presents a self-contained system for robust deployment of autonomous aerial vehicles in environments without access to global navigation systems and with limited lighting conditions. The proposed system, application-tailored for documentation in dark areas of large historical monuments, uses a unique and reliable aerial platform with a multi-modal lightweight sensory setup to acquire data in human-restricted areas with adverse lighting conditions, especially in areas that are high above the ground. The introduced localization method relies on an easy-to-obtain 3-D point cloud of a historical building, while it copes with a lack of visible light by fusing active laser-based sensors. The approach does not rely on any external localization, or on a preset motion-capture system. This enables fast deployment in the interiors of investigated structures while being computationally undemanding enough to process data online, onboard an MAV equipped with ordinary processing resources. The reliability of the system is analyzed, is quantitatively evaluated on a set of aerial trajectories performed inside a real-world church, and is deployed onto the aerial platform in the position control feedback loop to demonstrate the reliability of the system in the safety-critical application of historical monuments documentation.
summary: This letter presents a self-contained system for robust deployment of autonomous aerial vehicles in environments without access to global navigation systems and with limited lighting conditions. The proposed system, application-tailored for documentation in dark areas of large historical monuments, uses a unique and reliable aerial platform with a multi-modal lightweight sensory setup to acquire data in human-restricted areas with adverse lighting conditions, especially in areas that are high above the ground. The introduced localization method relies on an easy-to-obtain 3-D point cloud of a historical building, while it copes with a lack of visible light by fusing active laser-based sensors. The approach does not rely on any external localization, or on a preset motion-capture system. This enables fast deployment in the interiors of investigated structures while being computationally undemanding enough to process data online, onboard an MAV equipped with ordinary processing resources. The reliability of the system is analyzed, is quantitatively evaluated on a set of aerial trajectories performed inside a real-world church, and is deployed onto the aerial platform in the position control feedback loop to demonstrate the reliability of the system in the safety-critical application of historical monuments documentation.
abstract_zh: 这封信提出了一种独立的系统，可在无法访问全球导航系统且照明条件有限的环境中稳健部署自主飞行器。所提出的系统专为大型历史古迹黑暗区域的记录而设计，使用独特且可靠的空中平台，具有多模态轻量级传感装置，可在光照条件不利的人类限制区域（尤其是高于地面的区域）获取数据。引入的定位方法依赖于易于获得的历史建筑的 3D 点云，同时通过融合基于主动激光的传感器来解决可见光缺乏的问题。该方法不依赖于任何外部定位，也不依赖于预设的动作捕捉系统。这使得能够在所研究的结构内部快速部署，同时计算要求不高，足以在配备普通处理资源的 MAV 上在线处理数据。对系统的可靠性进行了分析，在现实教堂内执行的一组空中轨迹上进行定量评估，并部署到位置控制反馈回路中的空中平台上，以证明系统在历史古迹记录的安全关键应用中的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于在无全球导航系统和光线不足的大型历史遗迹黑暗区域可靠部署微型空中车辆（MAV）的系统。
AI.motivation: 历史遗迹的黑暗区域通常难以人工进入且缺乏GPS信号，传统方法无法高效获取数据，需开发无需外部定位的自主系统。
AI.method: 基于历史建筑的3D点云数据，结合主动激光传感器与多模态轻量级感知模块，实现无需外部定位系统的实时在线数据处理与定位。
AI.result: 系统在真实教堂内部轨迹测试中验证可靠性，并成功部署于MAV的位置控制反馈环中，证明其在历史遗迹文档中的安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为黑暗环境下的历史遗迹自动化文档提供了可靠、低成本的解决方案，适用于其他GPS受限的复杂场景。

authors_text: Maxim Tatarchenko,Kilian Rambach
title: Histogram-based Deep Learning for Automotive Radar
title_zh: 基于直方图的汽车雷达深度学习
abstract: There are various automotive applications that rely on correctly interpreting point cloud data recorded with radar sensors. We present a deep learning approach for histogram-based processing of such point clouds. Compared to existing methods, the design of our approach is extremely simple: it boils down to computing a point cloud histogram and passing it through a multi-layer perceptron. Our approach matches and surpasses state-of-the-art approaches on the task of automotive radar object type classification. It is also robust to noise that often corrupts radar measurements, and can deal with missing features of single radar reflections. Finally, the design of our approach makes it more interpretable than existing methods, allowing insightful analysis of its decisions.
summary: There are various automotive applications that rely on correctly interpreting point cloud data recorded with radar sensors. We present a deep learning approach for histogram-based processing of such point clouds. Compared to existing methods, the design of our approach is extremely simple: it boils down to computing a point cloud histogram and passing it through a multi-layer perceptron. Our approach matches and surpasses state-of-the-art approaches on the task of automotive radar object type classification. It is also robust to noise that often corrupts radar measurements, and can deal with missing features of single radar reflections. Finally, the design of our approach makes it more interpretable than existing methods, allowing insightful analysis of its decisions.
abstract_zh: 有多种汽车应用依赖于正确解释雷达传感器记录的点云数据。我们提出了一种基于直方图处理此类点云的深度学习方法。与现有方法相比，我们方法的设计非常简单：它归结为计算点云直方图并将其传递给多层感知器。我们的方法在汽车雷达对象类型分类任务上匹配并超越了最先进的方法。它对于经常破坏雷达测量的噪声也具有鲁棒性，并且可以处理单个雷达反射的缺失特征。最后，我们方法的设计使其比现有方法更具可解释性，从而可以对其决策进行深入分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于直方图的深度学习方法，用于处理汽车雷达点云数据中的目标分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有雷达点云处理方法复杂且缺乏鲁棒性，难以应对噪声干扰和特征缺失问题，同时可解释性不足。
AI.method: 通过计算点云直方图并输入多层感知机实现端到端分类，简化了传统复杂模型的处理流程。
AI.result: 在目标分类任务中达到或超越现有最佳方法性能，且对噪声和缺失特征具有更强鲁棒性，决策过程更易解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以简单架构实现了高性能和可解释性，为汽车雷达数据处理提供了有效且实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Pavel Petracek,Vit Kratky,Matej Petrlik,Tomas Baca,Radim Kratochvil,Martin Saska
title: Large-Scale Exploration of Cave Environments by Unmanned Aerial Vehicles
title_zh: 无人机大规模洞穴环境探索
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 6, no. 4, pp. 7596-7603, 2021
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 6, no. 4, pp. 7596-7603, 2021
abstract: This paper presents a self-contained system for the robust utilization of aerial robots in the autonomous exploration of cave environments to help human explorers, first responders, and speleologists. The proposed system is generally applicable to an arbitrary exploration task within an unknown and unstructured subterranean environment and interconnects crucial robotic subsystems to provide full autonomy of the robots. Such subsystems primarily include mapping, path and trajectory planning, localization, control, and decision making. Due to the diversity, complexity, and structural uncertainty of natural cave environments, the proposed system allows for the possible use of any arbitrary exploration strategy for a single robot, as well as for a cooperating team. A multi-robot cooperation strategy that maximizes the limited flight time of each aerial robot is proposed for exploration and search & rescue scenarios where the homing of all deployed robots back to an initial location is not required The entire system is validated in a comprehensive experimental analysis comprising of hours of flight time in a real-world cave environment, as well as by hundreds of hours within a state-of-the-art virtual testbed that was developed for the DARPA Subterranean Challenge robotic competition. Among others, experimental results include multiple real-world exploration flights traveling over 470 meters on a single battery in a demanding unknown cave environment.
summary: This paper presents a self-contained system for the robust utilization of aerial robots in the autonomous exploration of cave environments to help human explorers, first responders, and speleologists. The proposed system is generally applicable to an arbitrary exploration task within an unknown and unstructured subterranean environment and interconnects crucial robotic subsystems to provide full autonomy of the robots. Such subsystems primarily include mapping, path and trajectory planning, localization, control, and decision making. Due to the diversity, complexity, and structural uncertainty of natural cave environments, the proposed system allows for the possible use of any arbitrary exploration strategy for a single robot, as well as for a cooperating team. A multi-robot cooperation strategy that maximizes the limited flight time of each aerial robot is proposed for exploration and search & rescue scenarios where the homing of all deployed robots back to an initial location is not required The entire system is validated in a comprehensive experimental analysis comprising of hours of flight time in a real-world cave environment, as well as by hundreds of hours within a state-of-the-art virtual testbed that was developed for the DARPA Subterranean Challenge robotic competition. Among others, experimental results include multiple real-world exploration flights traveling over 470 meters on a single battery in a demanding unknown cave environment.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种独立的系统，可在洞穴环境的自主探索中充分利用空中机器人，以帮助人类探险家、急救人员和洞穴学家。所提出的系统通常适用于未知和非结构化地下环境中的任意探索任务，并将关键的机器人子系统互连以提供机器人的完全自主性。这些子系统主要包括绘图、路径和轨迹规划、定位、控制和决策。由于自然洞穴环境的多样性、复杂性和结构不确定性，所提出的系统允许单个机器人以及合作团队使用任何任意探索策略。针对探索和搜救场景，提出了一种多机器人合作策略，可最大化每个空中机器人的有限飞行时间，在这些场景中，不需要将所有部署的机器人引导回初始位置。整个系统在全面的实验分析中进行了验证，包括在真实洞穴环境中的数小时飞行时间，以及在为 DARPA 地下挑战机器人竞赛开发的最先进的虚拟测试台中进行的数百小时的飞行时间。其中，实验结果包括在严苛的未知洞穴环境中使用单块电池进行多次现实世界探索飞行，飞行距离超过 470 米。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自主无人机系统，用于在未知洞穴环境中进行大规模探索，以辅助人类探险者、救援人员和洞穴学家。
AI.motivation: 洞穴环境复杂且危险，传统人工探索存在高风险和低效率，需开发自主机器人系统以提高探索安全性与效率。
AI.method: 整合映射、路径规划、定位、控制和决策等关键子系统，支持单机或多机协作策略，无需所有无人机返回起点以最大化飞行时间。
AI.result: 在真实洞穴环境中单次电池完成470米探索，通过DARPA虚拟测试平台验证系统有效性，实验累计飞行时间达数百小时。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了无人机在复杂地下环境中的自主探索可行性，为搜救和洞穴研究提供了可靠技术方案。

search_text: Large-Scale Exploration of Cave Environments by Unmanned Aerial Vehicles 无人机大规模洞穴环境探索 This paper presents a self-contained system for the robust utilization of aerial robots in the autonomous exploration of cave environments to help human explorers, first responders, and speleologists. The proposed system is generally applicable to an arbitrary exploration task within an unknown and unstructured subterranean environment and interconnects crucial robotic subsystems to provide full autonomy of the robots. Such subsystems primarily include mapping, path and trajectory planning, localization, control, and decision making. Due to the diversity, complexity, and structural uncertainty of natural cave environments, the proposed system allows for the possible use of any arbitrary exploration strategy for a single robot, as well as for a cooperating team. A multi-robot cooperation strategy that maximizes the limited flight time of each aerial robot is proposed for exploration and search & rescue scenarios where the homing of all deployed robots back to an initial location is not required The entire system is validated in a comprehensive experimental analysis comprising of hours of flight time in a real-world cave environment, as well as by hundreds of hours within a state-of-the-art virtual testbed that was developed for the DARPA Subterranean Challenge robotic competition. Among others, experimental results include multiple real-world exploration flights traveling over 470 meters on a single battery in a demanding unknown cave environment. 本文提出了一种独立的系统，可在洞穴环境的自主探索中充分利用空中机器人，以帮助人类探险家、急救人员和洞穴学家。所提出的系统通常适用于未知和非结构化地下环境中的任意探索任务，并将关键的机器人子系统互连以提供机器人的完全自主性。这些子系统主要包括绘图、路径和轨迹规划、定位、控制和决策。由于自然洞穴环境的多样性、复杂性和结构不确定性，所提出的系统允许单个机器人以及合作团队使用任何任意探索策略。针对探索和搜救场景，提出了一种多机器人合作策略，可最大化每个空中机器人的有限飞行时间，在这些场景中，不需要将所有部署的机器人引导回初始位置。整个系统在全面的实验分析中进行了验证，包括在真实洞穴环境中的数小时飞行时间，以及在为 DARPA 地下挑战机器人竞赛开发的最先进的虚拟测试台中进行的数百小时的飞行时间。其中，实验结果包括在严苛的未知洞穴环境中使用单块电池进行多次现实世界探索飞行，飞行距离超过 470 米。 本文提出了一种自主无人机系统，用于在未知洞穴环境中进行大规模探索，以辅助人类探险者、救援人员和洞穴学家。 Pavel Petracek,Vit Kratky,Matej Petrlik,Tomas Baca,Radim Kratochvil,Martin Saska cs.RO,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Fei Zhu,Zhen Cheng,Xu-Yao Zhang,Cheng-Lin Liu
title: Rethinking Confidence Calibration for Failure Prediction
title_zh: 重新思考故障预测的置信度校准
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/Impression2805/FMFP
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/Impression2805/FMFP
abstract: Reliable confidence estimation for the predictions is important in many safety-critical applications. However, modern deep neural networks are often overconfident for their incorrect predictions. Recently, many calibration methods have been proposed to alleviate the overconfidence problem. With calibrated confidence, a primary and practical purpose is to detect misclassification errors by filtering out low-confidence predictions (known as failure prediction). In this paper, we find a general, widely-existed but actually-neglected phenomenon that most confidence calibration methods are useless or harmful for failure prediction. We investigate this problem and reveal that popular confidence calibration methods often lead to worse confidence separation between correct and incorrect samples, making it more difficult to decide whether to trust a prediction or not. Finally, inspired by the natural connection between flat minima and confidence separation, we propose a simple hypothesis: flat minima is beneficial for failure prediction. We verify this hypothesis via extensive experiments and further boost the performance by combining two different flat minima techniques. Our code is available at https://github.com/Impression2805/FMFP
summary: Reliable confidence estimation for the predictions is important in many safety-critical applications. However, modern deep neural networks are often overconfident for their incorrect predictions. Recently, many calibration methods have been proposed to alleviate the overconfidence problem. With calibrated confidence, a primary and practical purpose is to detect misclassification errors by filtering out low-confidence predictions (known as failure prediction). In this paper, we find a general, widely-existed but actually-neglected phenomenon that most confidence calibration methods are useless or harmful for failure prediction. We investigate this problem and reveal that popular confidence calibration methods often lead to worse confidence separation between correct and incorrect samples, making it more difficult to decide whether to trust a prediction or not. Finally, inspired by the natural connection between flat minima and confidence separation, we propose a simple hypothesis: flat minima is beneficial for failure prediction. We verify this hypothesis via extensive experiments and further boost the performance by combining two different flat minima techniques. Our code is available at https://github.com/Impression2805/FMFP
abstract_zh: 可靠的预测置信度估计在许多安全关键型应用中非常重要。然而，现代深度神经网络常常因其错误的预测而过于自信。最近，已经提出了许多校准方法来缓解过度自信问题。通过校准置信度，主要和实际目的是通过过滤掉低置信度预测（称为故障预测）来检测错误分类错误。在本文中，我们发现了一个普遍存在但实际上被忽视的现象，即大多数置信校准方法对于故障预测是无用或有害的。我们研究了这个问题，并发现流行的置信度校准方法通常会导致正确样本和不正确样本之间的置信度分离较差，从而使决定是否信任预测变得更加困难。最后，受到平坦最小值和置信分离之间自然联系的启发，我们提出了一个简单的假设：平坦最小值有利于故障预测。我们通过大量实验验证了这一假设，并通过结合两种不同的平坦最小值技术进一步提高了性能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/Impression2805/FMFP

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了置信度校准在故障预测中的作用，指出现有方法存在缺陷并提出基于平坦极小值的新方法。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在错误预测上过度自信，现有校准方法无法有效提升故障预测可靠性，甚至可能产生负面影响。
AI.method: 分析校准方法的局限性，提出平坦极小值与置信度分离的关联假设，结合两种平坦极小值技术优化模型。
AI.result: 实验验证平坦极小值有效提升故障预测性能，优于传统校准方法。
AI.conclusion: 现有校准方法不适用于故障预测，基于平坦极小值的新方法能更可靠地区分正确与错误预测。

However, modern deep neural networks are often overconfident for their incorrect predictions. Recently, many calibration methods have been proposed to alleviate the overconfidence problem. Finally, inspired by the natural connection between flat minima and confidence separation, we propose a simple hypothesis: flat minima is beneficial for failure prediction. We verify this hypothesis via extensive experiments and further boost the performance by combining two different flat minima techniques. authors_text: Md Awsafur Rahman,Shaikh Anowarul Fattah
title: DwinFormer: Dual Window Transformers for End-to-End Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: DwinFormer：用于端到端单目深度估计的双窗口变压器
comment: ef:IEEE Sensors Journal (Volume: 23, Issue: 18, 15 September 2023)
comments: ef:IEEE Sensors Journal (Volume: 23, Issue: 18, 15 September 2023)
abstract: Depth estimation from a single image is of paramount importance in the realm of computer vision, with a multitude of applications. Conventional methods suffer from the trade-off between consistency and fine-grained details due to the local-receptive field limiting their practicality. This lack of long-range dependency inherently comes from the convolutional neural network part of the architecture. In this paper, a dual window transformer-based network, namely DwinFormer, is proposed, which utilizes both local and global features for end-to-end monocular depth estimation. The DwinFormer consists of dual window self-attention and cross-attention transformers, Dwin-SAT and Dwin-CAT, respectively. The Dwin-SAT seamlessly extracts intricate, locally aware features while concurrently capturing global context. It harnesses the power of local and global window attention to adeptly capture both short-range and long-range dependencies, obviating the need for complex and computationally expensive operations, such as attention masking or window shifting. Moreover, Dwin-SAT introduces inductive biases which provide desirable properties, such as translational equvariance and less dependence on large-scale data. Furthermore, conventional decoding methods often rely on skip connections which may result in semantic discrepancies and a lack of global context when fusing encoder and decoder features. In contrast, the Dwin-CAT employs both local and global window cross-attention to seamlessly fuse encoder and decoder features with both fine-grained local and contextually aware global information, effectively amending semantic gap. Empirical evidence obtained through extensive experimentation on the NYU-Depth-V2 and KITTI datasets demonstrates the superiority of the proposed method, consistently outperforming existing approaches across both indoor and outdoor environments.
summary: Depth estimation from a single image is of paramount importance in the realm of computer vision, with a multitude of applications. Conventional methods suffer from the trade-off between consistency and fine-grained details due to the local-receptive field limiting their practicality. This lack of long-range dependency inherently comes from the convolutional neural network part of the architecture. In this paper, a dual window transformer-based network, namely DwinFormer, is proposed, which utilizes both local and global features for end-to-end monocular depth estimation. The DwinFormer consists of dual window self-attention and cross-attention transformers, Dwin-SAT and Dwin-CAT, respectively. The Dwin-SAT seamlessly extracts intricate, locally aware features while concurrently capturing global context. It harnesses the power of local and global window attention to adeptly capture both short-range and long-range dependencies, obviating the need for complex and computationally expensive operations, such as attention masking or window shifting. Moreover, Dwin-SAT introduces inductive biases which provide desirable properties, such as translational equvariance and less dependence on large-scale data. Furthermore, conventional decoding methods often rely on skip connections which may result in semantic discrepancies and a lack of global context when fusing encoder and decoder features. In contrast, the Dwin-CAT employs both local and global window cross-attention to seamlessly fuse encoder and decoder features with both fine-grained local and contextually aware global information, effectively amending semantic gap. Empirical evidence obtained through extensive experimentation on the NYU-Depth-V2 and KITTI datasets demonstrates the superiority of the proposed method, consistently outperforming existing approaches across both indoor and outdoor environments.
abstract_zh: 单幅图像的深度估计在计算机视觉领域至关重要，具有多种应用。由于局部感受野限制了传统方法的实用性，传统方法需要在一致性和细粒度细节之间进行权衡。这种缺乏远程依赖性本质上来自于架构的卷积神经网络部分。本文提出了一种基于双窗口变压器的网络，即 DwinFormer，它利用局部和全局特征进行端到端单目深度估计。 DwinFormer 由双窗口自注意力和交叉注意力变压器组成，分别为 Dwin-SAT 和 Dwin-CAT。 Dwin-SAT 无缝提取复杂的局部感知特征，同时捕获全局上下文。它利用本地和全局窗口注意力的力量来熟练地捕获短程和长程依赖关系，从而消除了复杂且计算成本高昂的操作的需要，例如注意力屏蔽或窗口移位。此外，Dwin-SAT 引入了归纳偏差，这些偏差提供了所需的属性，例如平移等方差和对大规模数据的较少依赖。此外，传统的解码方法通常依赖于跳跃连接，这在融合编码器和解码器特征时可能导致语义差异和全局上下文的缺乏。相比之下，Dwin-CAT 采用局部和全局窗口交叉注意力，将编码器和解码器特征与细粒度局部和上下文感知全局信息无缝融合，有效地修正了语义差距。通过对 NYU-Depth-V2 和 KITTI 数据集进行广泛实验获得的经验证据证明了所提出方法的优越性，在室内和室外环境中始终优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DwinFormer网络，通过双窗口Transformer实现端到端单目深度估计，结合局部与全局特征提升精度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法因卷积神经网络的局部感受野限制，难以平衡深度估计的一致性与细节表现，且缺乏长距离依赖建模能力。
AI.method: 设计双窗口自注意力（Dwin-SAT）和跨注意力（Dwin-CAT）模块，分别提取局部-全局特征并融合编码器-解码器信息，避免复杂操作并引入平移等变性归纳偏置。
AI.result: 在NYU-Depth-V2和KITTI数据集上均优于现有方法，室内外场景表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 双窗口Transformer架构有效解决了单目深度估计中的局部-全局特征矛盾，为后续研究提供新思路。

motivation: 传统方法因卷积神经网络的局部感受野限制，难以平衡深度估计的一致性与细节表现，且缺乏长距离依赖建模能力。
method: 设计双窗口自注意力（Dwin-SAT）和跨注意力（Dwin-CAT）模块，分别提取局部-全局特征并融合编码器-解码器信息，避免复杂操作并引入平移等变性归纳偏置。

search_text: DwinFormer: Dual Window Transformers for End-to-End Monocular Depth Estimation DwinFormer：用于端到端单目深度估计的双窗口变压器 Depth estimation from a single image is of paramount importance in the realm of computer vision, with a multitude of applications. Conventional methods suffer from the trade-off between consistency and fine-grained details due to the local-receptive field limiting their practicality. This lack of long-range dependency inherently comes from the convolutional neural network part of the architecture. In this paper, a dual window transformer-based network, namely DwinFormer, is proposed, which utilizes both local and global features for end-to-end monocular depth estimation. The DwinFormer consists of dual window self-attention and cross-attention transformers, Dwin-SAT and Dwin-CAT, respectively. The Dwin-SAT seamlessly extracts intricate, locally aware features while concurrently capturing global context. It harnesses the power of local and global window attention to adeptly capture both short-range and long-range dependencies, obviating the need for complex and computationally expensive operations, such as attention masking or window shifting. Moreover, Dwin-SAT introduces inductive biases which provide desirable properties, such as translational equvariance and less dependence on large-scale data. Furthermore, conventional decoding methods often rely on skip connections which may result in semantic discrepancies and a lack of global context when fusing encoder and decoder features. In contrast, the Dwin-CAT employs both local and global window cross-attention to seamlessly fuse encoder and decoder features with both fine-grained local and contextually aware global information, effectively amending semantic gap. Empirical evidence obtained through extensive experimentation on the NYU-Depth-V2 and KITTI datasets demonstrates the superiority of the proposed method, consistently outperforming existing approaches across both indoor and outdoor environments. 单幅图像的深度估计在计算机视觉领域至关重要，具有多种应用。由于局部感受野限制了传统方法的实用性，传统方法需要在一致性和细粒度细节之间进行权衡。这种缺乏远程依赖性本质上来自于架构的卷积神经网络部分。本文提出了一种基于双窗口变压器的网络，即 DwinFormer，它利用局部和全局特征进行端到端单目深度估计。 DwinFormer 由双窗口自注意力和交叉注意力变压器组成，分别为 Dwin-SAT 和 Dwin-CAT。 Dwin-SAT 无缝提取复杂的局部感知特征，同时捕获全局上下文。它利用本地和全局窗口注意力的力量来熟练地捕获短程和长程依赖关系，从而消除了复杂且计算成本高昂的操作的需要，例如注意力屏蔽或窗口移位。此外，Dwin-SAT 引入了归纳偏差，这些偏差提供了所需的属性，例如平移等方差和对大规模数据的较少依赖。此外，传统的解码方法通常依赖于跳跃连接，这在融合编码器和解码器特征时可能导致语义差异和全局上下文的缺乏。相比之下，Dwin-CAT 采用局部和全局窗口交叉注意力，将编码器和解码器特征与细粒度局部和上下文感知全局信息无缝融合，有效地修正了语义差距。通过对 NYU-Depth-V2 和 KITTI 数据集进行广泛实验获得的经验证据证明了所提出方法的优越性，在室内和室外环境中始终优于现有方法。 本文提出DwinFormer网络，通过双窗口Transformer实现端到端单目深度估计，结合局部与全局特征提升精度。 Md Awsafur Rahman,Shaikh Anowarul Fattah cs.CV

authors_text: Liwen Zou,Zhenghua Cai,Liang Mao,Ziwei Nie,Yudong Qiu,Xiaoping Yang
title: Automated Peripancreatic Vessel Segmentation and Labeling Based on Iterative Trunk Growth and Weakly Supervised Mechanism
title_zh: 基于迭代主干生长和弱监督机制的自动胰周血管分割和标记
abstract: Peripancreatic vessel segmentation and anatomical labeling play extremely important roles to assist the early diagnosis, surgery planning and prognosis for patients with pancreatic tumors. However, most current techniques cannot achieve satisfactory segmentation performance for peripancreatic veins and usually make predictions with poor integrity and connectivity. Besides, unsupervised labeling algorithms cannot deal with complex anatomical variation while fully supervised methods require a large number of voxel-wise annotations for training, which is very labor-intensive and time-consuming. To address these problems, we propose our Automated Peripancreatic vEssel Segmentation and lAbeling (APESA) framework, to not only highly improve the segmentation performance for peripancreatic veins, but also efficiently identify the peripancreatic artery branches. There are two core modules in our proposed APESA framework: iterative trunk growth module (ITGM) for vein segmentation and weakly supervised labeling mechanism (WSLM) for artery branch identification. Our proposed ITGM is composed of a series of trunk growth modules, each of which chooses the most reliable trunk of a basic vessel prediction by the largest connected constraint, and seeks for the possible growth branches by branch proposal network. Our designed iterative process guides the raw trunk to be more complete and fully connected. Our proposed WSLM consists of an unsupervised rule-based preprocessing for generating pseudo branch annotations, and an anatomical labeling network to learn the branch distribution voxel by voxel. We achieve Dice of 94.01% for vein segmentation on our collected dataset, which boosts the accuracy by nearly 10% compared with the state-of-the-art methods. Additionally, we also achieve Dice of 97.01% on segmentation and competitive performance on anatomical labeling for peripancreatic arteries.
summary: Peripancreatic vessel segmentation and anatomical labeling play extremely important roles to assist the early diagnosis, surgery planning and prognosis for patients with pancreatic tumors. However, most current techniques cannot achieve satisfactory segmentation performance for peripancreatic veins and usually make predictions with poor integrity and connectivity. Besides, unsupervised labeling algorithms cannot deal with complex anatomical variation while fully supervised methods require a large number of voxel-wise annotations for training, which is very labor-intensive and time-consuming. To address these problems, we propose our Automated Peripancreatic vEssel Segmentation and lAbeling (APESA) framework, to not only highly improve the segmentation performance for peripancreatic veins, but also efficiently identify the peripancreatic artery branches. There are two core modules in our proposed APESA framework: iterative trunk growth module (ITGM) for vein segmentation and weakly supervised labeling mechanism (WSLM) for artery branch identification. Our proposed ITGM is composed of a series of trunk growth modules, each of which chooses the most reliable trunk of a basic vessel prediction by the largest connected constraint, and seeks for the possible growth branches by branch proposal network. Our designed iterative process guides the raw trunk to be more complete and fully connected. Our proposed WSLM consists of an unsupervised rule-based preprocessing for generating pseudo branch annotations, and an anatomical labeling network to learn the branch distribution voxel by voxel. We achieve Dice of 94.01% for vein segmentation on our collected dataset, which boosts the accuracy by nearly 10% compared with the state-of-the-art methods. Additionally, we also achieve Dice of 97.01% on segmentation and competitive performance on anatomical labeling for peripancreatic arteries.
abstract_zh: 胰周血管分割和解剖标记对于辅助胰腺肿瘤患者的早期诊断、手术计划和预后起着极其重要的作用。然而，大多数当前技术无法实现令人满意的胰周静脉分割性能，并且通常做出完整性和连接性较差的预测。此外，无监督标记算法无法处理复杂的解剖变化，而完全监督方法需要大量的体素注释进行训练，这是非常劳动密集型和耗时的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了自动胰周血管分割和标记（APESA）框架，不仅可以大大提高胰周静脉的分割性能，而且可以有效识别胰周动脉分支。我们提出的 APESA 框架中有两个核心模块：用于静脉分割的迭代主干生长模块（ITGM）和用于动脉分支识别的弱监督标记机制（WSLM）。我们提出的ITGM由一系列主干增长模块组成，每个模块通过最大的连接约束选择基本血管预测的最可靠的主干，并通过分支提议网络寻找可能的增长分支。我们设计的迭代过程引导原始主干更加完整和充分连接。我们提出的 WSLM 包括用于生成伪分支注释的无监督的基于规则的预处理，以及用于逐个体素学习分支分布体素的解剖标记网络。我们在收集的数据集上实现了 94.01% 的静脉分割 Dice，与最先进的方法相比，准确率提高了近 10%。此外，我们还在胰周动脉解剖标记的分割和竞争性能方面实现了 97.01% 的 Dice。

AI.tldr: 本文提出APESA框架，通过迭代主干生长和弱监督机制实现胰周血管的高精度分割与解剖标注。
AI.motivation: 现有胰周静脉分割精度不足且完整性差，动脉分支标注依赖大量人工标注数据，效率低下且难以处理解剖变异。
AI.method: 设计包含迭代主干生长模块（ITGM）和弱监督标注机制（WSLM）的双模块框架，ITGM通过主干约束与分支提案网络优化静脉分割，WSLM结合伪标注生成与解剖网络实现动脉分支识别。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上静脉分割Dice达94.01%（较SOTA提升10%），动脉分割Dice达97.01%，解剖标注性能优异。
AI.conclusion: APESA框架有效解决了胰周血管分割完整性与标注效率的矛盾，为胰腺肿瘤临床应用提供可靠工具。

search_text: Automated Peripancreatic Vessel Segmentation and Labeling Based on Iterative Trunk Growth and Weakly Supervised Mechanism 基于迭代主干生长和弱监督机制的自动胰周血管分割和标记 Peripancreatic vessel segmentation and anatomical labeling play extremely important roles to assist the early diagnosis, surgery planning and prognosis for patients with pancreatic tumors. However, most current techniques cannot achieve satisfactory segmentation performance for peripancreatic veins and usually make predictions with poor integrity and connectivity. To address these problems, we propose our Automated Peripancreatic vEssel Segmentation and lAbeling (APESA) framework, to not only highly improve the segmentation performance for peripancreatic veins, but also efficiently identify the peripancreatic artery branches. There are two core modules in our proposed APESA framework: iterative trunk growth module (ITGM) for vein segmentation and weakly supervised labeling mechanism (WSLM) for artery branch identification. Our proposed ITGM is composed of a series of trunk growth modules, each of which chooses the most reliable trunk of a basic vessel prediction by the largest connected constraint, and seeks for the possible growth branches by branch proposal network. Our designed iterative process guides the raw trunk to be more complete and fully connected. We achieve Dice of 94.01% for vein segmentation on our collected dataset, which boosts the accuracy by nearly 10% compared with the state-of-the-art methods. Additionally, we also achieve Dice of 97.01% on segmentation and competitive performance on anatomical labeling for peripancreatic arteries. 胰周血管分割和解剖标记对于辅助胰腺肿瘤患者的早期诊断、手术计划和预后起着极其重要的作用。然而，大多数当前技术无法实现令人满意的胰周静脉分割性能，并且通常做出完整性和连接性较差的预测。此外，无监督标记算法无法处理复杂的解剖变化，而完全监督方法需要大量的体素注释进行训练，这是非常劳动密集型和耗时的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了自动胰周血管分割和标记（APESA）框架，不仅可以大大提高胰周静脉的分割性能，而且可以有效识别胰周动脉分支。我们提出的 APESA 框架中有两个核心模块：用于静脉分割的迭代主干生长模块（ITGM）和用于动脉分支识别的弱监督标记机制（WSLM）。我们提出的ITGM由一系列主干增长模块组成，每个模块通过最大的连接约束选择基本血管预测的最可靠的主干，并通过分支提议网络寻找可能的增长分支。我们设计的迭代过程引导原始主干更加完整和充分连接。我们提出的 WSLM 包括用于生成伪分支注释的无监督的基于规则的预处理，以及用于逐个体素学习分支分布体素的解剖标记网络。我们在收集的数据集上实现了 94.01% 的静脉分割 Dice，与最先进的方法相比，准确率提高了近 10%。此外，我们还在胰周动脉解剖标记的分割和竞争性能方面实现了 97.01% 的 Dice。 本文提出APESA框架，通过迭代主干生长和弱监督机制实现胰周血管的高精度分割与解剖标注。 Liwen Zou,Zhenghua Cai,Liang Mao,Ziwei Nie,Yudong Qiu,Xiaoping Yang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Leitian Tao,Xuefeng Du,Xiaojin Zhu,Yixuan Li
title: Non-Parametric Outlier Synthesis
title_zh: 非参数异常值综合
comment: ICLR 2023
comments: ICLR 2023
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is indispensable for safely deploying machine learning models in the wild. One of the key challenges is that models lack supervision signals from unknown data, and as a result, can produce overconfident predictions on OOD data. Recent work on outlier synthesis modeled the feature space as parametric Gaussian distribution, a strong and restrictive assumption that might not hold in reality. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, Non-Parametric Outlier Synthesis (NPOS), which generates artificial OOD training data and facilitates learning a reliable decision boundary between ID and OOD data. Importantly, our proposed synthesis approach does not make any distributional assumption on the ID embeddings, thereby offering strong flexibility and generality. We show that our synthesis approach can be mathematically interpreted as a rejection sampling framework. Extensive experiments show that NPOS can achieve superior OOD detection performance, outperforming the competitive rivals by a significant margin. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/npos.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is indispensable for safely deploying machine learning models in the wild. One of the key challenges is that models lack supervision signals from unknown data, and as a result, can produce overconfident predictions on OOD data. Recent work on outlier synthesis modeled the feature space as parametric Gaussian distribution, a strong and restrictive assumption that might not hold in reality. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, Non-Parametric Outlier Synthesis (NPOS), which generates artificial OOD training data and facilitates learning a reliable decision boundary between ID and OOD data. Importantly, our proposed synthesis approach does not make any distributional assumption on the ID embeddings, thereby offering strong flexibility and generality. We show that our synthesis approach can be mathematically interpreted as a rejection sampling framework. Extensive experiments show that NPOS can achieve superior OOD detection performance, outperforming the competitive rivals by a significant margin. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/npos.
abstract_zh: 分布外 (OOD) 检测对于在野外安全部署机器学习模型是必不可少的。关键挑战之一是模型缺乏来自未知数据的监督信号，因此可能对 OOD 数据产生过度自信的预测。最近关于离群值合成的工作将特征空间建模为参数高斯分布，这是一种强有力的限制性假设，在现实中可能不成立。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即非参数离群值综合（NPOS），它生成人工 OOD 训练数据，并有助于学习 ID 和 OOD 数据之间的可靠决策边界。重要的是，我们提出的合成方法不对 ID 嵌入做出任何分布假设，从而提供了强大的灵活性和通用性。我们表明，我们的综合方法可以在数学上解释为拒绝采样框架。大量实验表明，NPOS 可以实现卓越的 OOD 检测性能，大幅优于竞争对手。代码可在 https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/npos 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非参数化异常值合成框架（NPOS），通过生成人工分布外数据提升机器学习模型的分布外检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法依赖参数化高斯分布假设，限制了模型灵活性和现实场景适应性，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计非参数化合成方法生成OOD数据，无需对ID嵌入做分布假设，数学上等价于拒绝抽样框架。
AI.result: 实验验证NPOS在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: NPOS通过灵活的非参数化合成策略有效提升OOD检测能力，为安全部署机器学习模型提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种非参数化异常值合成框架（NPOS），通过生成人工分布外数据提升机器学习模型的分布外检测性能。
motivation: 现有分布外检测方法依赖参数化高斯分布假设，限制了模型灵活性和现实场景适应性，需更通用的解决方案。
method: 设计非参数化合成方法生成OOD数据，无需对ID嵌入做分布假设，数学上等价于拒绝抽样框架。
result: 实验验证NPOS在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，代码已开源。
conclusion: NPOS通过灵活的非参数化合成策略有效提升OOD检测能力，为安全部署机器学习模型提供新思路。
search_text: Non-Parametric Outlier Synthesis 非参数异常值综合 Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is indispensable for safely deploying machine learning models in the wild. One of the key challenges is that models lack supervision signals from unknown data, and as a result, can produce overconfident predictions on OOD data. Recent work on outlier synthesis modeled the feature space as parametric Gaussian distribution, a strong and restrictive assumption that might not hold in reality. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, Non-Parametric Outlier Synthesis (NPOS), which generates artificial OOD training data and facilitates learning a reliable decision boundary between ID and OOD data. Importantly, our proposed synthesis approach does not make any distributional assumption on the ID embeddings, thereby offering strong flexibility and generality. We show that our synthesis approach can be mathematically interpreted as a rejection sampling framework. Extensive experiments show that NPOS can achieve superior OOD detection performance, outperforming the competitive rivals by a significant margin. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/npos. 分布外 (OOD) 检测对于在野外安全部署机器学习模型是必不可少的。关键挑战之一是模型缺乏来自未知数据的监督信号，因此可能对 OOD 数据产生过度自信的预测。最近关于离群值合成的工作将特征空间建模为参数高斯分布，这是一种强有力的限制性假设，在现实中可能不成立。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即非参数离群值综合（NPOS），它生成人工 OOD 训练数据，并有助于学习 ID 和 OOD 数据之间的可靠决策边界。重要的是，我们提出的合成方法不对 ID 嵌入做出任何分布假设，从而提供了强大的灵活性和通用性。我们表明，我们的综合方法可以在数学上解释为拒绝采样框架。大量实验表明，NPOS 可以实现卓越的 OOD 检测性能，大幅优于竞争对手。代码可在 https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/npos 上公开获取。 本文提出一种非参数化异常值合成框架（NPOS），通过生成人工分布外数据提升机器学习模型的分布外检测性能。 Leitian Tao,Xuefeng Du,Xiaojin Zhu,Yixuan Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Pavel Petracek,Vit Kratky,Tomas Baca,Matej Petrlik,Martin Saska
title: New Era in Cultural Heritage Preservation: Cooperative Aerial Autonomy
title_zh: 文化遗产保护的新时代：合作空中自治
comment: Published as Early Access on February 28, 2023. Supported by multimedia available at http://mrs.felk.cvut.cz/ram2022dronument
comments: Published as Early Access on February 28, 2023. Supported by multimedia available at http://mrs.felk.cvut.cz/ram2022dronument
abstract: Digital documentation of large interiors of historical buildings is an exhausting task since most of the areas of interest are beyond typical human reach. We advocate the use of autonomous teams of multi-rotor Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) to speed up the documentation process by several orders of magnitude while allowing for a repeatable, accurate, and condition-independent solution capable of precise collision-free operation at great heights. The proposed multi-robot approach allows for performing tasks requiring dynamic scene illumination in large-scale real-world scenarios, a process previously applicable only in small-scale laboratory-like conditions. Extensive experimental analyses range from single-UAV imaging to specialized lighting techniques requiring accurate coordination of multiple UAVs. The system's robustness is demonstrated in more than two hundred autonomous flights in fifteen historical monuments requiring superior safety while lacking access to external localization. This unique experimental campaign, cooperated with restorers and conservators, brought numerous lessons transferable to other safety-critical robotic missions in documentation and inspection tasks.
summary: Digital documentation of large interiors of historical buildings is an exhausting task since most of the areas of interest are beyond typical human reach. We advocate the use of autonomous teams of multi-rotor Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) to speed up the documentation process by several orders of magnitude while allowing for a repeatable, accurate, and condition-independent solution capable of precise collision-free operation at great heights. The proposed multi-robot approach allows for performing tasks requiring dynamic scene illumination in large-scale real-world scenarios, a process previously applicable only in small-scale laboratory-like conditions. Extensive experimental analyses range from single-UAV imaging to specialized lighting techniques requiring accurate coordination of multiple UAVs. The system's robustness is demonstrated in more than two hundred autonomous flights in fifteen historical monuments requiring superior safety while lacking access to external localization. This unique experimental campaign, cooperated with restorers and conservators, brought numerous lessons transferable to other safety-critical robotic missions in documentation and inspection tasks.
abstract_zh: 对历史建筑的大型内部进行数字记录是一项艰巨的任务，因为大多数感兴趣的区域都超出了人类的正常范围。我们提倡使用多旋翼无人机 (UAV) 自主团队，将文档处理速度加快几个数量级，同时提供可重复、准确且与条件无关的解决方案，能够在高空进行精确的无碰撞操作。所提出的多机器人方法允许在大规模现实场景中执行需要动态场景照明的任务，该过程以前仅适用于小规模类似实验室的条件。广泛的实验分析范围从单无人机成像到需要多架无人机精确协调的专业照明技术。该系统的稳健性在 15 个历史古迹中的 200 多次自主飞行中得到了证明，这些历史古迹需要卓越的安全性，但无法访问外部定位。这项独特的实验活动与修复者和保护者合作，带来了许多经验教训，可转移到记录和检查任务中的其他安全关键型机器人任务中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用自主多旋翼无人机团队加速历史建筑大型内部的数字化记录过程。
AI.motivation: 传统人工记录历史建筑内部存在难以触及区域、效率低下且依赖环境条件的问题，需更高效、精准且不受条件限制的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用多无人机协同系统，结合动态照明技术与精确避障算法，在无外部定位条件下实现大规模真实场景下的自主飞行与图像采集。
AI.result: 在15处历史遗迹完成200余次自主飞行验证，系统表现出高鲁棒性与安全性，为文化遗产记录提供可复用的技术框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升文化遗产数字化效率，其协同控制与自主避障策略可迁移至其他高安全要求的机器人检测任务中。

authors_text: Hui Liu,Xiaojun Wan
title: Models See Hallucinations: Evaluating the Factuality in Video Captioning
title_zh: 模型看到幻觉：评估视频字幕的真实性
comment: 17 pages
comments: 17 pages
abstract: Video captioning aims to describe events in a video with natural language. In recent years, many works have focused on improving captioning models' performance. However, like other text generation tasks, it risks introducing factual errors not supported by the input video. These factual errors can seriously affect the quality of the generated text, sometimes making it completely unusable. Although factual consistency has received much research attention in text-to-text tasks (e.g., summarization), it is less studied in the context of vision-based text generation. In this work, we conduct a detailed human evaluation of the factuality in video captioning and collect two annotated factuality datasets. We find that 57.0% of the model-generated sentences have factual errors, indicating it is a severe problem in this field. However, existing evaluation metrics are mainly based on n-gram matching and show little correlation with human factuality annotation. We further propose a weakly-supervised, model-based factuality metric FactVC, which outperforms previous metrics on factuality evaluation of video captioning. The datasets and metrics will be released to promote future research for video captioning.
summary: Video captioning aims to describe events in a video with natural language. In recent years, many works have focused on improving captioning models' performance. However, like other text generation tasks, it risks introducing factual errors not supported by the input video. These factual errors can seriously affect the quality of the generated text, sometimes making it completely unusable. Although factual consistency has received much research attention in text-to-text tasks (e.g., summarization), it is less studied in the context of vision-based text generation. In this work, we conduct a detailed human evaluation of the factuality in video captioning and collect two annotated factuality datasets. We find that 57.0% of the model-generated sentences have factual errors, indicating it is a severe problem in this field. However, existing evaluation metrics are mainly based on n-gram matching and show little correlation with human factuality annotation. We further propose a weakly-supervised, model-based factuality metric FactVC, which outperforms previous metrics on factuality evaluation of video captioning. The datasets and metrics will be released to promote future research for video captioning.
abstract_zh: 视频字幕旨在用自然语言描述视频中的事件。近年来，许多工作都集中在提高字幕模型的性能上。然而，与其他文本生成任务一样，它有引入输入视频不支持的事实错误的风险。这些事实错误会严重影响生成文本的质量，有时甚至使其完全无法使用。尽管事实一致性在文本到文本任务（例如摘要）中受到了很多研究关注，但在基于视觉的文本生成背景下的研究较少。在这项工作中，我们对视频字幕的真实性进行了详细的人工评估，并收集了两个带注释的真实性数据集。我们发现 57.0% 的模型生成的句子存在事实错误，表明这是该领域的一个严重问题。然而，现有的评估指标主要基于n-gram匹配，与人类事实性注释的相关性很小。我们进一步提出了一种弱监督的、基于模型的事实性度量 FactVC，它在视频字幕的真实性评估方面优于之前的度量。数据集和指标将被发布，以促进视频字幕的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究视频字幕生成模型中的事实性错误问题，通过人工评估和新指标FactVC进行评测。
AI.motivation: 现有视频字幕生成模型存在大量事实性错误，但缺乏有效的评估方法和数据集，传统n-gram指标与人工标注关联度低。
AI.method: 开展大规模人工事实性评估，构建两个标注数据集，提出基于弱监督的模型驱动事实性指标FactVC。
AI.result: 57.0%的模型生成句子存在事实错误，FactVC在事实性评估中显著优于传统指标。
AI.conclusion: 事实性错误是视频字幕生成领域的严重问题，新指标和数据集将推动该领域研究进展。

authors_text: Feng Wang,Haihang Ruan,Fei Xiong,Jiayu Yang,Litian Li,Ronggang Wang
title: Butterfly: Multiple Reference Frames Feature Propagation Mechanism for Neural Video Compression
title_zh: Butterfly：神经视频压缩的多参考帧特征传播机制
comment: Accepted by DCC 2023
comments: Accepted by DCC 2023
abstract: Using more reference frames can significantly improve the compression efficiency in neural video compression. However, in low-latency scenarios, most existing neural video compression frameworks usually use the previous one frame as reference. Or a few frameworks which use the previous multiple frames as reference only adopt a simple multi-reference frames propagation mechanism. In this paper, we present a more reasonable multi-reference frames propagation mechanism for neural video compression, called butterfly multi-reference frame propagation mechanism (Butterfly), which allows a more effective feature fusion of multi-reference frames. By this, we can generate more accurate temporal context conditional prior for Contextual Coding Module. Besides, when the number of decoded frames does not meet the required number of reference frames, we duplicate the nearest reference frame to achieve the requirement, which is better than duplicating the furthest one. Experiment results show that our method can significantly outperform the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA), and our neural codec can achieve -7.6% bitrate save on HEVC Class D dataset when compares with our base single-reference frame model with the same compression configuration.
summary: Using more reference frames can significantly improve the compression efficiency in neural video compression. However, in low-latency scenarios, most existing neural video compression frameworks usually use the previous one frame as reference. Or a few frameworks which use the previous multiple frames as reference only adopt a simple multi-reference frames propagation mechanism. In this paper, we present a more reasonable multi-reference frames propagation mechanism for neural video compression, called butterfly multi-reference frame propagation mechanism (Butterfly), which allows a more effective feature fusion of multi-reference frames. By this, we can generate more accurate temporal context conditional prior for Contextual Coding Module. Besides, when the number of decoded frames does not meet the required number of reference frames, we duplicate the nearest reference frame to achieve the requirement, which is better than duplicating the furthest one. Experiment results show that our method can significantly outperform the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA), and our neural codec can achieve -7.6% bitrate save on HEVC Class D dataset when compares with our base single-reference frame model with the same compression configuration.
abstract_zh: 使用更多的参考帧可以显着提高神经视频压缩的压缩效率。然而，在低延迟场景下，大多数现有的神经视频压缩框架通常使用前一帧作为参考。或者少数使用先前的多个帧作为参考的框架仅采用简单的多参考帧传播机制。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于神经视频压缩的更合理的多参考帧传播机制，称为蝴蝶多参考帧传播机制（Butterfly），它允许多参考帧更有效的特征融合。通过这种方式，我们可以为上下文编码模块生成更准确的时间上下文条件先验。此外，当解码帧的数量不能满足所需的参考帧数量时，我们复制最近的参考帧来满足要求，这比复制最远的参考帧要好。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着优于之前的最先进技术（SOTA），并且与具有相同压缩配置的基础单参考帧模型相比，我们的神经编解码器可以在 HEVC D 类数据集上实现 -7.6% 的比特率节省。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Butterfly的多参考帧特征传播机制，用于改进神经视频压缩中的多参考帧融合效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经视频压缩框架在低延迟场景中通常仅使用单帧或简单多帧参考机制，导致压缩效率不足，需更合理的多参考帧特征融合方法。
AI.method: 设计Butterfly机制实现多参考帧的有效特征融合，并在解码帧不足时复制最近的参考帧而非最远帧以满足需求。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在HEVC Class D数据集上相比单参考帧基线模型节省7.6%比特率，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Butterfly机制通过优化多参考帧特征传播和帧复制策略，有效提升了神经视频压缩的效率和性能。

search_text: Butterfly: Multiple Reference Frames Feature Propagation Mechanism for Neural Video Compression Butterfly：神经视频压缩的多参考帧特征传播机制 Using more reference frames can significantly improve the compression efficiency in neural video compression. However, in low-latency scenarios, most existing neural video compression frameworks usually use the previous one frame as reference. Or a few frameworks which use the previous multiple frames as reference only adopt a simple multi-reference frames propagation mechanism. In this paper, we present a more reasonable multi-reference frames propagation mechanism for neural video compression, called butterfly multi-reference frame propagation mechanism (Butterfly), which allows a more effective feature fusion of multi-reference frames. By this, we can generate more accurate temporal context conditional prior for Contextual Coding Module. Besides, when the number of decoded frames does not meet the required number of reference frames, we duplicate the nearest reference frame to achieve the requirement, which is better than duplicating the furthest one. Experiment results show that our method can significantly outperform the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA), and our neural codec can achieve -7.6% bitrate save on HEVC Class D dataset when compares with our base single-reference frame model with the same compression configuration. 使用更多的参考帧可以显着提高神经视频压缩的压缩效率。然而，在低延迟场景下，大多数现有的神经视频压缩框架通常使用前一帧作为参考。或者少数使用先前的多个帧作为参考的框架仅采用简单的多参考帧传播机制。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于神经视频压缩的更合理的多参考帧传播机制，称为蝴蝶多参考帧传播机制（Butterfly），它允许多参考帧更有效的特征融合。通过这种方式，我们可以为上下文编码模块生成更准确的时间上下文条件先验。此外，当解码帧的数量不能满足所需的参考帧数量时，我们复制最近的参考帧来满足要求，这比复制最远的参考帧要好。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着优于之前的最先进技术（SOTA），并且与具有相同压缩配置的基础单参考帧模型相比，我们的神经编解码器可以在 HEVC D 类数据集上实现 -7.6% 的比特率节省。 本文提出了一种名为Butterfly的多参考帧特征传播机制，用于改进神经视频压缩中的多参考帧融合效果。 Feng Wang,Haihang Ruan,Fei Xiong,Jiayu Yang,Litian Li,Ronggang Wang cs.CV,cs.MM,eess.IV

authors_text: Daofeng Liu,Fan Lyu,Linyan Li,Zhenping Xia,Fuyuan Hu
title: Centroid Distance Distillation for Effective Rehearsal in Continual Learning
title_zh: 用于持续学习中有效排练的质心距离蒸馏
abstract: Rehearsal, retraining on a stored small data subset of old tasks, has been proven effective in solving catastrophic forgetting in continual learning. However, due to the sampled data may have a large bias towards the original dataset, retraining them is susceptible to driving continual domain drift of old tasks in feature space, resulting in forgetting. In this paper, we focus on tackling the continual domain drift problem with centroid distance distillation. First, we propose a centroid caching mechanism for sampling data points based on constructed centroids to reduce the sample bias in rehearsal. Then, we present a centroid distance distillation that only stores the centroid distance to reduce the continual domain drift. The experiments on four continual learning datasets show the superiority of the proposed method, and the continual domain drift can be reduced.
summary: Rehearsal, retraining on a stored small data subset of old tasks, has been proven effective in solving catastrophic forgetting in continual learning. However, due to the sampled data may have a large bias towards the original dataset, retraining them is susceptible to driving continual domain drift of old tasks in feature space, resulting in forgetting. In this paper, we focus on tackling the continual domain drift problem with centroid distance distillation. First, we propose a centroid caching mechanism for sampling data points based on constructed centroids to reduce the sample bias in rehearsal. Then, we present a centroid distance distillation that only stores the centroid distance to reduce the continual domain drift. The experiments on four continual learning datasets show the superiority of the proposed method, and the continual domain drift can be reduced.
abstract_zh: 排练，即对旧任务的存储小数据子集进行重新训练，已被证明可以有效解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。然而，由于采样数据可能对原始数据集有很大偏差，重新训练它们很容易导致特征空间中旧任务的持续域漂移，从而导致遗忘。在本文中，我们重点关注通过质心距离蒸馏来解决连续域漂移问题。首先，我们提出了一种基于构造质心对数据点进行采样的质心缓存机制，以减少排练中的样本偏差。然后，我们提出了一种质心距离蒸馏，仅存储质心距离以减少连续域漂移。在四个连续学习数据集上的实验表明了该方法的优越性，并且可以减少连续域漂移。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于质心距离蒸馏的方法，用于解决持续学习中的持续领域漂移问题，通过改进重放策略减少旧任务遗忘。
AI.motivation: 传统重放方法因采样数据存在偏差，导致特征空间中旧任务领域漂移，进而引发灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出质心缓存机制优化数据采样，结合质心距离蒸馏仅存储关键质心距离信息以抑制领域漂移。
AI.result: 在四个持续学习数据集上验证，所提方法有效缓解了领域漂移问题，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 质心距离蒸馏能有效减少持续学习中的领域漂移，提升模型对旧任务的保持能力。

authors_text: Liwen Zou,Zhenghua Cai,Yudong Qiu,Luying Gui,Liang Mao,Xiaoping Yang
title: CTG-Net: An Efficient Cascaded Framework Driven by Terminal Guidance Mechanism for Dilated Pancreatic Duct Segmentation
title_zh: CTG-Net：一种由末端引导机制驱动的用于扩张胰管分割的高效级联框架
abstract: Pancreatic duct dilation indicates a high risk of various pancreatic diseases. Segmentation of dilated pancreatic ducts on computed tomography (CT) images shows the potential to assist the early diagnosis, surgical planning and prognosis. Because of the ducts' tiny sizes, slender tubular structures and the surrounding distractions, most current researches on pancreatic duct segmentation achieve low accuracy and always have segmentation errors on the terminal parts of the ducts. To address these problems, we propose a terminal guidance mechanism called cascaded terminal guidance network (CTG-Net). Firstly, a terminal attention mechanism is established on the skeletons extracted from the coarse predictions. Then, to get fine terminal segmentation, a subnetwork is designed for jointly learning the local intensity from the original images, feature cues from coarse predictions and global anatomy information from the pancreas distance transform maps. Finally, a terminal distraction attention module which explicitly learns the distribution of the terminal distraction is proposed to reduce the false positive and false negative predictions. We also propose a new metric called tDice to measure the terminal segmentation accuracy for targets with tubular structures and two segmentation metrics for distractions. We collect our dilated pancreatic duct segmentation dataset with 150 CT scans from patients with 5 types of pancreatic tumors. Experimental results on our dataset show that our proposed approach boosts dilated pancreatic duct segmentation accuracy by nearly 20% compared with the existing results, and achieves more than 9% improvement for the terminal segmentation accuracy compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Pancreatic duct dilation indicates a high risk of various pancreatic diseases. Segmentation of dilated pancreatic ducts on computed tomography (CT) images shows the potential to assist the early diagnosis, surgical planning and prognosis. Because of the ducts' tiny sizes, slender tubular structures and the surrounding distractions, most current researches on pancreatic duct segmentation achieve low accuracy and always have segmentation errors on the terminal parts of the ducts. To address these problems, we propose a terminal guidance mechanism called cascaded terminal guidance network (CTG-Net). Firstly, a terminal attention mechanism is established on the skeletons extracted from the coarse predictions. Then, to get fine terminal segmentation, a subnetwork is designed for jointly learning the local intensity from the original images, feature cues from coarse predictions and global anatomy information from the pancreas distance transform maps. Finally, a terminal distraction attention module which explicitly learns the distribution of the terminal distraction is proposed to reduce the false positive and false negative predictions. We also propose a new metric called tDice to measure the terminal segmentation accuracy for targets with tubular structures and two segmentation metrics for distractions. We collect our dilated pancreatic duct segmentation dataset with 150 CT scans from patients with 5 types of pancreatic tumors. Experimental results on our dataset show that our proposed approach boosts dilated pancreatic duct segmentation accuracy by nearly 20% compared with the existing results, and achieves more than 9% improvement for the terminal segmentation accuracy compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 胰管扩张预示着各种胰腺疾病的高风险。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像上的扩张胰管分割显示出协助早期诊断、手术计划和预后的潜力。由于胰管尺寸微小、管状结构细长以及周围的干扰，目前大多数胰管分割的研究精度较低，并且在胰管末端部分总是存在分割误差。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为级联终端制导网络（CTG-Net）的终端制导机制。首先，在从粗略预测中提取的骨架上建立终端注意机制。然后，为了获得精细的终端分割，设计了一个子网络，用于联合学习原始图像的局部强度、粗略预测的特征线索和胰腺距离变换图的全局解剖信息。最后，提出了一种明确学习终端注意力分布的终端注意力注意力模块，以减少误报和误报预测。我们还提出了一个名为 tDice 的新指标来测量具有管状结构的目标的终端分割精度，以及两个用于干扰的分割指标。我们收集了来自 5 种胰腺肿瘤患者的 150 次 CT 扫描的扩张胰管分割数据集。我们数据集上的实验结果表明，与现有结果相比，我们提出的方法将扩张胰管分割精度提高了近 20%，并且与最先进的方法相比，终端分割精度提高了 9% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CTG-Net的级联框架，通过终端引导机制提升扩张胰管在CT图像中的分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有胰管分割方法因管腔细小、结构复杂及周围干扰导致终端部分分割误差较高，影响临床诊断效果。
AI.method: 构建终端注意力机制提取粗分割骨架，设计融合原始图像局部强度、粗分割特征及胰腺距离变换图全局信息的子网络，并引入终端干扰注意力模块降低误检率。
AI.result: 在包含150例胰腺肿瘤患者的CT数据集上，整体分割准确率提升近20%，终端分割准确率较最先进方法提高超9%。
AI.conclusion: CTG-Net通过多模块协同优化，有效解决了胰管终端分割难题，为胰腺疾病早期诊断提供可靠工具。
