tldr: 本文提出一种名为CTG-Net的级联框架，通过终端引导机制提升扩张胰管在CT图像中的分割精度。
motivation: 现有胰管分割方法因管腔细小、结构复杂及周围干扰导致终端部分分割误差较高，影响临床诊断效果。
method: 构建终端注意力机制提取粗分割骨架，设计融合原始图像局部强度、粗分割特征及胰腺距离变换图全局信息的子网络，并引入终端干扰注意力模块降低误检率。
result: 在包含150例胰腺肿瘤患者的CT数据集上，整体分割准确率提升近20%，终端分割准确率较最先进方法提高超9%。
conclusion: CTG-Net通过多模块协同优化，有效解决了胰管终端分割难题，为胰腺疾病早期诊断提供可靠工具。
search_text: CTG-Net: An Efficient Cascaded Framework Driven by Terminal Guidance Mechanism for Dilated Pancreatic Duct Segmentation CTG-Net：一种由末端引导机制驱动的用于扩张胰管分割的高效级联框架 Pancreatic duct dilation indicates a high risk of various pancreatic diseases. Segmentation of dilated pancreatic ducts on computed tomography (CT) images shows the potential to assist the early diagnosis, surgical planning and prognosis. Because of the ducts' tiny sizes, slender tubular structures and the surrounding distractions, most current researches on pancreatic duct segmentation achieve low accuracy and always have segmentation errors on the terminal parts of the ducts. To address these problems, we propose a terminal guidance mechanism called cascaded terminal guidance network (CTG-Net). Firstly, a terminal attention mechanism is established on the skeletons extracted from the coarse predictions. Then, to get fine terminal segmentation, a subnetwork is designed for jointly learning the local intensity from the original images, feature cues from coarse predictions and global anatomy information from the pancreas distance transform maps. Finally, a terminal distraction attention module which explicitly learns the distribution of the terminal distraction is proposed to reduce the false positive and false negative predictions. We also propose a new metric called tDice to measure the terminal segmentation accuracy for targets with tubular structures and two segmentation metrics for distractions. We collect our dilated pancreatic duct segmentation dataset with 150 CT scans from patients with 5 types of pancreatic tumors. Experimental results on our dataset show that our proposed approach boosts dilated pancreatic duct segmentation accuracy by nearly 20% compared with the existing results, and achieves more than 9% improvement for the terminal segmentation accuracy compared with the state-of-the-art methods. 胰管扩张预示着各种胰腺疾病的高风险。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像上的扩张胰管分割显示出协助早期诊断、手术计划和预后的潜力。由于胰管尺寸微小、管状结构细长以及周围的干扰，目前大多数胰管分割的研究精度较低，并且在胰管末端部分总是存在分割误差。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为级联终端制导网络（CTG-Net）的终端制导机制。首先，在从粗略预测中提取的骨架上建立终端注意机制。然后，为了获得精细的终端分割，设计了一个子网络，用于联合学习原始图像的局部强度、粗略预测的特征线索和胰腺距离变换图的全局解剖信息。最后，提出了一种明确学习终端注意力分布的终端注意力注意力模块，以减少误报和误报预测。我们还提出了一个名为 tDice 的新指标来测量具有管状结构的目标的终端分割精度，以及两个用于干扰的分割指标。我们收集了来自 5 种胰腺肿瘤患者的 150 次 CT 扫描的扩张胰管分割数据集。我们数据集上的实验结果表明，与现有结果相比，我们提出的方法将扩张胰管分割精度提高了近 20%，并且与最先进的方法相比，终端分割精度提高了 9% 以上。 本文提出一种名为CTG-Net的级联框架，通过终端引导机制提升扩张胰管在CT图像中的分割精度。 Liwen Zou,Zhenghua Cai,Yudong Qiu,Luying Gui,Liang Mao,Xiaoping Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Xinhui Li,Mingjia Li,Yaxing Wang,Chuan-Xian Ren,Xiaojie Guo
title: Adaptive Texture Filtering for Single-Domain Generalized Segmentation
title_zh: 用于单域广义分割的自适应纹理过滤
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2023
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2023
abstract: Domain generalization in semantic segmentation aims to alleviate the performance degradation on unseen domains through learning domain-invariant features. Existing methods diversify images in the source domain by adding complex or even abnormal textures to reduce the sensitivity to domain specific features. However, these approaches depend heavily on the richness of the texture bank, and training them can be time-consuming. In contrast to importing textures arbitrarily or augmenting styles randomly, we focus on the single source domain itself to achieve generalization. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive texture filtering mechanism to suppress the influence of texture without using augmentation, thus eliminating the interference of domain-specific features. Further, we design a hierarchical guidance generalization network equipped with structure-guided enhancement modules, which purpose is to learn the domain-invariant generalized knowledge. Extensive experiments together with ablation studies on widely-used datasets are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the proposed model, and reveal its superiority over other state-of-the-art alternatives.
summary: Domain generalization in semantic segmentation aims to alleviate the performance degradation on unseen domains through learning domain-invariant features. Existing methods diversify images in the source domain by adding complex or even abnormal textures to reduce the sensitivity to domain specific features. However, these approaches depend heavily on the richness of the texture bank, and training them can be time-consuming. In contrast to importing textures arbitrarily or augmenting styles randomly, we focus on the single source domain itself to achieve generalization. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive texture filtering mechanism to suppress the influence of texture without using augmentation, thus eliminating the interference of domain-specific features. Further, we design a hierarchical guidance generalization network equipped with structure-guided enhancement modules, which purpose is to learn the domain-invariant generalized knowledge. Extensive experiments together with ablation studies on widely-used datasets are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the proposed model, and reveal its superiority over other state-of-the-art alternatives.
abstract_zh: 语义分割中的领域泛化旨在通过学习领域不变特征来减轻未见领域的性能下降。现有方法通过添加复杂甚至异常纹理来降低对域特定特征的敏感性，从而使源域中的图像多样化。然而，这些方法在很大程度上依赖于纹理库的丰富性，并且训练它们可能非常耗时。与任意导入纹理或随机增强样式相反，我们专注于单个源域本身以实现泛化。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应纹理过滤机制，可以在不使用增强的情况下抑制纹理的影响，从而消除特定领域特征的干扰。此外，我们设计了一个配备结构引导增强模块的分层引导泛化网络，其目的是学习领域不变的泛化知识。对广泛使用的数据集进行了大量的实验和消融研究，以验证所提出的模型的有效性，并揭示其相对于其他最先进的替代方案的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应纹理过滤机制和分层引导泛化网络，解决单域语义分割中的领域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖外部纹理库进行数据增强，训练耗时且效果受限，本文旨在通过挖掘单源域自身特性实现更高效的领域泛化。
AI.method: 设计自适应纹理过滤机制抑制纹理干扰，结合结构引导增强模块的分层网络学习领域不变特征。
AI.result: 在主流数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，消融研究证明各模块贡献，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无需数据增强的单域泛化框架有效提升了模型跨领域适应能力，结构设计与实验结果均验证了方法优势。

Existing methods diversify images in the source domain by adding complex or even abnormal textures to reduce the sensitivity to domain specific features. However, these approaches depend heavily on the richness of the texture bank, and training them can be time-consuming. In contrast to importing textures arbitrarily or augmenting styles randomly, we focus on the single source domain itself to achieve generalization. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive texture filtering mechanism to suppress the influence of texture without using augmentation, thus eliminating the interference of domain-specific features. Further, we design a hierarchical guidance generalization network equipped with structure-guided enhancement modules, which purpose is to learn the domain-invariant generalized knowledge. authors_text: Ruiqing Xue,Yanqing Liu,Lei He,Xu Tan,Linquan Liu,Edward Lin,Sheng Zhao
title: FoundationTTS: Text-to-Speech for ASR Customization with Generative Language Model
title_zh: FoundationTTS：使用生成语言模型进行 ASR 定制的文本转语音
abstract: Neural text-to-speech (TTS) generally consists of cascaded architecture with separately optimized acoustic model and vocoder, or end-to-end architecture with continuous mel-spectrograms or self-extracted speech frames as the intermediate representations to bridge acoustic model and vocoder, which suffers from two limitations: 1) the continuous acoustic frames are hard to predict with phoneme only, and acoustic information like duration or pitch is also needed to solve the one-to-many problem, which is not easy to scale on large scale and noise datasets; 2) to achieve diverse speech output based on continuous speech features, complex VAE or flow-based models are usually required. In this paper, we propose FoundationTTS, a new speech synthesis system with a neural audio codec for discrete speech token extraction and waveform reconstruction and a large language model for discrete token generation from linguistic (phoneme) tokens. Specifically, 1) we propose a hierarchical codec network based on vector-quantized auto-encoders with adversarial training (VQ-GAN), which first extracts continuous frame-level speech representations with fine-grained codec, and extracts a discrete token from each continuous speech frame with coarse-grained codec; 2) we jointly optimize speech token, linguistic tokens, speaker token together with a large language model and predict the discrete speech tokens autoregressively. Experiments show that FoundationTTS achieves a MOS gain of +0.14 compared to the baseline system. In ASR customization tasks, our method achieves 7.09\% and 10.35\% WERR respectively over two strong customized ASR baselines.
summary: Neural text-to-speech (TTS) generally consists of cascaded architecture with separately optimized acoustic model and vocoder, or end-to-end architecture with continuous mel-spectrograms or self-extracted speech frames as the intermediate representations to bridge acoustic model and vocoder, which suffers from two limitations: 1) the continuous acoustic frames are hard to predict with phoneme only, and acoustic information like duration or pitch is also needed to solve the one-to-many problem, which is not easy to scale on large scale and noise datasets; 2) to achieve diverse speech output based on continuous speech features, complex VAE or flow-based models are usually required. In this paper, we propose FoundationTTS, a new speech synthesis system with a neural audio codec for discrete speech token extraction and waveform reconstruction and a large language model for discrete token generation from linguistic (phoneme) tokens. Specifically, 1) we propose a hierarchical codec network based on vector-quantized auto-encoders with adversarial training (VQ-GAN), which first extracts continuous frame-level speech representations with fine-grained codec, and extracts a discrete token from each continuous speech frame with coarse-grained codec; 2) we jointly optimize speech token, linguistic tokens, speaker token together with a large language model and predict the discrete speech tokens autoregressively. Experiments show that FoundationTTS achieves a MOS gain of +0.14 compared to the baseline system. In ASR customization tasks, our method achieves 7.09\% and 10.35\% WERR respectively over two strong customized ASR baselines.
abstract_zh: 神经文本转语音（TTS）通常由分别优化的声学模型和声码器的级联架构组成，或者以连续梅尔谱图或自提取语音帧作为中间表示来桥接声学模型和声码器的端到端架构组成，其存在两个局限性：1）连续声学帧很难仅用音素来预测，并且还需要诸如持续时间或音调之类的声学信息来解决一对多问题，这不容易扩展在大规模和噪声数据集上； 2）为了实现基于连续语音特征的多样化语音输出，通常需要复杂的VAE或基于流的模型。在本文中，我们提出了 FoundationTTS，这是一种新的语音合成系统，具有用于离散语音标记提取和波形重建的神经音频编解码器以及用于从语言（音素）标记生成离散标记的大型语言模型。具体来说，1）我们提出了一种基于具有对抗性训练的矢量量化自动编码器（VQ-GAN）的分层编解码网络，该网络首先使用细粒度编解码器提取连续帧级语音表示，并使用粗粒度编解码器从每个连续语音帧中提取离散标记； 2）我们联合优化语音标记、语言标记、说话人标记以及大型语言模型，并自回归预测离散语音标记。实验表明，与基线系统相比，FoundationTTS 的 MOS 增益达到+0.14。在 ASR 定制任务中，我们的方法在两个强大的定制 ASR 基线上分别实现了 7.09% 和 10.35% WERR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FoundationTTS系统，通过神经音频编解码器和大语言模型实现文本到语音合成，以提升语音识别（ASR）定制化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS系统存在连续声学帧预测困难及需复杂模型生成多样语音的局限性，难以适应大规模噪声数据集和ASR定制化需求。
AI.method: 设计基于VQ-GAN的分层编解码网络，提取离散语音令牌并重构波形；结合大语言模型联合优化语音、语言及说话人令牌，实现自回归离散令牌生成。
AI.result: 相较基线系统，MOS提升0.14；在ASR定制任务中，WERR分别降低7.09%和10.35%。
AI.conclusion: FoundationTTS通过离散令牌生成与大语言模型联合优化，有效解决传统TTS局限性，在ASR定制化任务中表现优异。

search_text: FoundationTTS: Text-to-Speech for ASR Customization with Generative Language Model FoundationTTS：使用生成语言模型进行 ASR 定制的文本转语音 Neural text-to-speech (TTS) generally consists of cascaded architecture with separately optimized acoustic model and vocoder, or end-to-end architecture with continuous mel-spectrograms or self-extracted speech frames as the intermediate representations to bridge acoustic model and vocoder, which suffers from two limitations: 1) the continuous acoustic frames are hard to predict with phoneme only, and acoustic information like duration or pitch is also needed to solve the one-to-many problem, which is not easy to scale on large scale and noise datasets; 2) to achieve diverse speech output based on continuous speech features, complex VAE or flow-based models are usually required. In this paper, we propose FoundationTTS, a new speech synthesis system with a neural audio codec for discrete speech token extraction and waveform reconstruction and a large language model for discrete token generation from linguistic (phoneme) tokens. Specifically, 1) we propose a hierarchical codec network based on vector-quantized auto-encoders with adversarial training (VQ-GAN), which first extracts continuous frame-level speech representations with fine-grained codec, and extracts a discrete token from each continuous speech frame with coarse-grained codec; 2) we jointly optimize speech token, linguistic tokens, speaker token together with a large language model and predict the discrete speech tokens autoregressively. Experiments show that FoundationTTS achieves a MOS gain of +0.14 compared to the baseline system. In ASR customization tasks, our method achieves 7.09\% and 10.35\% WERR respectively over two strong customized ASR baselines. 神经文本转语音（TTS）通常由分别优化的声学模型和声码器的级联架构组成，或者以连续梅尔谱图或自提取语音帧作为中间表示来桥接声学模型和声码器的端到端架构组成，其存在两个局限性：1）连续声学帧很难仅用音素来预测，并且还需要诸如持续时间或音调之类的声学信息来解决一对多问题，这不容易扩展在大规模和噪声数据集上； 2）为了实现基于连续语音特征的多样化语音输出，通常需要复杂的VAE或基于流的模型。在本文中，我们提出了 FoundationTTS，这是一种新的语音合成系统，具有用于离散语音标记提取和波形重建的神经音频编解码器以及用于从语言（音素）标记生成离散标记的大型语言模型。具体来说，1）我们提出了一种基于具有对抗性训练的矢量量化自动编码器（VQ-GAN）的分层编解码网络，该网络首先使用细粒度编解码器提取连续帧级语音表示，并使用粗粒度编解码器从每个连续语音帧中提取离散标记； 2）我们联合优化语音标记、语言标记、说话人标记以及大型语言模型，并自回归预测离散语音标记。实验表明，与基线系统相比，FoundationTTS 的 MOS 增益达到+0.14。在 ASR 定制任务中，我们的方法在两个强大的定制 ASR 基线上分别实现了 7.09% 和 10.35% WERR。 本文提出FoundationTTS系统，通过神经音频编解码器和大语言模型实现文本到语音合成，以提升语音识别（ASR）定制化效果。 Ruiqing Xue,Yanqing Liu,Lei He,Xu Tan,Linquan Liu,Edward Lin,Sheng Zhao eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yuanzheng Ci,Yizhou Wang,Meilin Chen,Shixiang Tang,Lei Bai,Feng Zhu,Rui Zhao,Fengwei Yu,Donglian Qi,Wanli Ouyang
title: UniHCP: A Unified Model for Human-Centric Perceptions
title_zh: UniHCP：以人为本的统一模型
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023 (CVPR 2023)
comments: Accepted for publication at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023 (CVPR 2023)
abstract: Human-centric perceptions (e.g., pose estimation, human parsing, pedestrian detection, person re-identification, etc.) play a key role in industrial applications of visual models. While specific human-centric tasks have their own relevant semantic aspect to focus on, they also share the same underlying semantic structure of the human body. However, few works have attempted to exploit such homogeneity and design a general-propose model for human-centric tasks. In this work, we revisit a broad range of human-centric tasks and unify them in a minimalist manner. We propose UniHCP, a Unified Model for Human-Centric Perceptions, which unifies a wide range of human-centric tasks in a simplified end-to-end manner with the plain vision transformer architecture. With large-scale joint training on 33 human-centric datasets, UniHCP can outperform strong baselines on several in-domain and downstream tasks by direct evaluation. When adapted to a specific task, UniHCP achieves new SOTAs on a wide range of human-centric tasks, e.g., 69.8 mIoU on CIHP for human parsing, 86.18 mA on PA-100K for attribute prediction, 90.3 mAP on Market1501 for ReID, and 85.8 JI on CrowdHuman for pedestrian detection, performing better than specialized models tailored for each task.
summary: Human-centric perceptions (e.g., pose estimation, human parsing, pedestrian detection, person re-identification, etc.) play a key role in industrial applications of visual models. While specific human-centric tasks have their own relevant semantic aspect to focus on, they also share the same underlying semantic structure of the human body. However, few works have attempted to exploit such homogeneity and design a general-propose model for human-centric tasks. In this work, we revisit a broad range of human-centric tasks and unify them in a minimalist manner. We propose UniHCP, a Unified Model for Human-Centric Perceptions, which unifies a wide range of human-centric tasks in a simplified end-to-end manner with the plain vision transformer architecture. With large-scale joint training on 33 human-centric datasets, UniHCP can outperform strong baselines on several in-domain and downstream tasks by direct evaluation. When adapted to a specific task, UniHCP achieves new SOTAs on a wide range of human-centric tasks, e.g., 69.8 mIoU on CIHP for human parsing, 86.18 mA on PA-100K for attribute prediction, 90.3 mAP on Market1501 for ReID, and 85.8 JI on CrowdHuman for pedestrian detection, performing better than specialized models tailored for each task.
abstract_zh: 以人为中心的感知（例如姿势估计、人体解析、行人检测、人员重新识别等）在视觉模型的工业应用中发挥着关键作用。虽然特定的以人为中心的任务有其自己相关的语义方面需要关注，但它们也共享相同的人体底层语义结构。然而，很少有作品尝试利用这种同质性并为以人为中心的任务设计一个通用模型。在这项工作中，我们重新审视了广泛的以人为中心的任务，并以极简的方式将它们统一起来。我们提出了 UniHCP，一种以人为中心的感知统一模型，它以简化的端到端方式与简单的视觉变压器架构统一了各种以人为中心的任务。通过对 33 个以人为中心的数据集进行大规模联合训练，UniHCP 通过直接评估可以在多个域内和下游任务上超越强大的基线。当适应特定任务时，UniHCP 在各种以人为中心的任务上实现了新的 SOTA，例如，CIHP 上用于人体解析的 69.8 mIoU、PA-100K 上用于属性预测的 86.18 mA、Market1501 上用于 ReID 的 90.3 mAP 以及 CrowdHuman 上用于行人检测的 85.8 JI，其性能优于为每个任务定制的专用模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的人类中心感知模型UniHCP，通过简化端到端架构，整合多种人类中心任务（如姿态估计、行人检测等）。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通常针对单一任务设计，忽略了人类身体语义结构的共性，导致效率低下且难以泛化。
AI.method: 基于纯视觉Transformer架构，通过大规模联合训练33个人类中心数据集，以端到端方式统一处理多种任务。
AI.result: 在CIHP、PA-100K、Market1501和CrowdHuman等数据集上分别达到69.8 mIoU、86.18 mA、90.3 mAP和85.8 JI，超越专门模型。
AI.conclusion: UniHCP通过统一架构和联合训练，有效提升了多任务性能，证明了人类中心感知任务共享语义结构的可行性。

authors_text: Gido Kato,Yoshihiro Fukuhara,Mariko Isogawa,Hideki Tsunashima,Hirokatsu Kataoka,Shigeo Morishima
title: Scapegoat Generation for Privacy Protection from Deepfake
title_zh: Deepfake 隐私保护的替罪羊一代
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures
abstract: To protect privacy and prevent malicious use of deepfake, current studies propose methods that interfere with the generation process, such as detection and destruction approaches. However, these methods suffer from sub-optimal generalization performance to unseen models and add undesirable noise to the original image. To address these problems, we propose a new problem formulation for deepfake prevention: generating a ``scapegoat image'' by modifying the style of the original input in a way that is recognizable as an avatar by the user, but impossible to reconstruct the real face. Even in the case of malicious deepfake, the privacy of the users is still protected. To achieve this, we introduce an optimization-based editing method that utilizes GAN inversion to discourage deepfake models from generating similar scapegoats. We validate the effectiveness of our proposed method through quantitative and user studies.
summary: To protect privacy and prevent malicious use of deepfake, current studies propose methods that interfere with the generation process, such as detection and destruction approaches. However, these methods suffer from sub-optimal generalization performance to unseen models and add undesirable noise to the original image. To address these problems, we propose a new problem formulation for deepfake prevention: generating a ``scapegoat image'' by modifying the style of the original input in a way that is recognizable as an avatar by the user, but impossible to reconstruct the real face. Even in the case of malicious deepfake, the privacy of the users is still protected. To achieve this, we introduce an optimization-based editing method that utilizes GAN inversion to discourage deepfake models from generating similar scapegoats. We validate the effectiveness of our proposed method through quantitative and user studies.
abstract_zh: 为了保护隐私并防止深度伪造的恶意使用，当前的研究提出了干扰生成过程的方法，例如检测和销毁方法。然而，这些方法对未见过的模型的泛化性能不佳，并且给原始图像添加了不需要的噪声。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种预防深度造假的新问题表述：通过修改原始输入的样式来生成“替罪羊图像”，这种方式可以被用户识别为化身，但无法重建真实的脸部。即使在恶意深度伪造的情况下，用户的隐私仍然受到保护。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一种基于优化的编辑方法，该方法利用 GAN 反转来阻止 Deepfake 模型生成类似的替罪羊。我们通过定量和用户研究验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种生成替罪羊图像的方法，以防止深度伪造并保护用户隐私。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造防护方法存在泛化性能不足和引入噪声的问题，无法有效保护用户隐私。
AI.method: 基于优化的编辑方法结合GAN逆过程，生成可识别但无法还原真实人脸的替罪羊图像。
AI.result: 通过定量评估和用户研究验证了方法在隐私保护和图像可识别性上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度伪造防护提供了新思路，在保证图像可用性的同时实现隐私保护。

authors_text: Victor Dibia
title: LIDA: A Tool for Automatic Generation of Grammar-Agnostic Visualizations and Infographics using Large Language Models
title_zh: LIDA：使用大型语言模型自动生成与语法无关的可视化和信息图表的工具
comment: Accepted at ACL 2023 (Demonstration track). Fix formatting issues, update information on evaluation metrics, prompts and project website (https://microsoft.github.io/lida/)
comments: Accepted at ACL 2023 (Demonstration track). Fix formatting issues, update information on evaluation metrics, prompts and project website (https://microsoft.github.io/lida/)
abstract: Systems that support users in the automatic creation of visualizations must address several subtasks - understand the semantics of data, enumerate relevant visualization goals and generate visualization specifications. In this work, we pose visualization generation as a multi-stage generation problem and argue that well-orchestrated pipelines based on large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT/GPT-4 and image generation models (IGMs) are suitable to addressing these tasks. We present LIDA, a novel tool for generating grammar-agnostic visualizations and infographics. LIDA comprises of 4 modules - A SUMMARIZER that converts data into a rich but compact natural language summary, a GOAL EXPLORER that enumerates visualization goals given the data, a VISGENERATOR that generates, refines, executes and filters visualization code and an INFOGRAPHER module that yields data-faithful stylized graphics using IGMs. LIDA provides a python api, and a hybrid user interface (direct manipulation and multilingual natural language) for interactive chart, infographics and data story generation. Learn more about the project here - https://microsoft.github.io/lida/
summary: Systems that support users in the automatic creation of visualizations must address several subtasks - understand the semantics of data, enumerate relevant visualization goals and generate visualization specifications. In this work, we pose visualization generation as a multi-stage generation problem and argue that well-orchestrated pipelines based on large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT/GPT-4 and image generation models (IGMs) are suitable to addressing these tasks. We present LIDA, a novel tool for generating grammar-agnostic visualizations and infographics. LIDA comprises of 4 modules - A SUMMARIZER that converts data into a rich but compact natural language summary, a GOAL EXPLORER that enumerates visualization goals given the data, a VISGENERATOR that generates, refines, executes and filters visualization code and an INFOGRAPHER module that yields data-faithful stylized graphics using IGMs. LIDA provides a python api, and a hybrid user interface (direct manipulation and multilingual natural language) for interactive chart, infographics and data story generation. Learn more about the project here - https://microsoft.github.io/lida/
abstract_zh: 支持用户自动创建可视化的系统必须解决几个子任务——理解数据的语义、枚举相关的可视化目标并生成可视化规范。在这项工作中，我们将可视化生成视为多阶段生成问题，并认为基于 ChatGPT/GPT-4 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 和图像生成模型 (IGM) 的精心编排的管道适合解决这些任务。我们推出 LIDA，一种用于生成与语法无关的可视化和信息图表的新颖工具。 LIDA 由 4 个模块组成：一个 SUMMARIZER，用于将数据转换为丰富但紧凑的自然语言摘要；一个 GOAL EXPLORER，用于枚举给定数据的可视化目标；一个 VISGENERATOR，用于生成、细化、执行和过滤可视化代码；以及一个 INFOGRAPHER 模块，用于使用 IGM 生成忠实于数据的风格化图形。 LIDA 提供 Python API 和混合用户界面（直接操作和多语言自然语言），用于交互式图表、信息图表和数据故事生成。在此处了解有关该项目的更多信息 - https://microsoft.github.io/lida/

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIDA工具，利用大语言模型（LLMs）和图像生成模型（IGMs）自动创建无需语法依赖的可视化和信息图表。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在自动可视化生成中需处理数据语义理解、目标枚举和规格生成等复杂任务，传统方法存在效率和灵活性不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计包含四个模块的多阶段生成流水线：SUMMARIZER生成数据摘要，GOAL EXPLORER枚举可视化目标，VISGENERATOR生成并优化代码，INFOGRAPHER通过IGMs生成图形，提供Python API和混合交互界面。
AI.result: 实现LIDA工具，支持交互式图表、信息图和数据故事生成，验证了LLMs与IGMs结合在自动化可视化中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LIDA通过模块化流水线和多模态模型协作，为语法无关的可视化生成提供了高效且用户友好的解决方案。

search_text: LIDA: A Tool for Automatic Generation of Grammar-Agnostic Visualizations and Infographics using Large Language Models LIDA：使用大型语言模型自动生成与语法无关的可视化和信息图表的工具 Systems that support users in the automatic creation of visualizations must address several subtasks - understand the semantics of data, enumerate relevant visualization goals and generate visualization specifications. In this work, we pose visualization generation as a multi-stage generation problem and argue that well-orchestrated pipelines based on large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT/GPT-4 and image generation models (IGMs) are suitable to addressing these tasks. We present LIDA, a novel tool for generating grammar-agnostic visualizations and infographics. LIDA comprises of 4 modules - A SUMMARIZER that converts data into a rich but compact natural language summary, a GOAL EXPLORER that enumerates visualization goals given the data, a VISGENERATOR that generates, refines, executes and filters visualization code and an INFOGRAPHER module that yields data-faithful stylized graphics using IGMs. LIDA provides a python api, and a hybrid user interface (direct manipulation and multilingual natural language) for interactive chart, infographics and data story generation. Learn more about the project here - https://microsoft.github.io/lida/ 支持用户自动创建可视化的系统必须解决几个子任务——理解数据的语义、枚举相关的可视化目标并生成可视化规范。在这项工作中，我们将可视化生成视为多阶段生成问题，并认为基于 ChatGPT/GPT-4 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 和图像生成模型 (IGM) 的精心编排的管道适合解决这些任务。我们推出 LIDA，一种用于生成与语法无关的可视化和信息图表的新颖工具。 LIDA 由 4 个模块组成：一个 SUMMARIZER，用于将数据转换为丰富但紧凑的自然语言摘要；一个 GOAL EXPLORER，用于枚举给定数据的可视化目标；一个 VISGENERATOR，用于生成、细化、执行和过滤可视化代码；以及一个 INFOGRAPHER 模块，用于使用 IGM 生成忠实于数据的风格化图形。 LIDA 提供 Python API 和混合用户界面（直接操作和多语言自然语言），用于交互式图表、信息图表和数据故事生成。在此处了解有关该项目的更多信息 - https://microsoft.github.io/lida/ 本文提出LIDA工具，利用大语言模型（LLMs）和图像生成模型（IGMs）自动创建无需语法依赖的可视化和信息图表。 Victor Dibia cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.PL

authors_text: Hao Zheng,Hongming Li,Yong Fan
title: SurfNN: Joint Reconstruction of Multiple Cortical Surfaces from Magnetic Resonance Images
title_zh: SurfNN：从磁共振图像中联合重建多个皮质表面
comment: ISBI 2023
comments: ISBI 2023
abstract: To achieve fast, robust, and accurate reconstruction of the human cortical surfaces from 3D magnetic resonance images (MRIs), we develop a novel deep learning-based framework, referred to as SurfNN, to reconstruct simultaneously both inner (between white matter and gray matter) and outer (pial) surfaces from MRIs. Different from existing deep learning-based cortical surface reconstruction methods that either reconstruct the cortical surfaces separately or neglect the interdependence between the inner and outer surfaces, SurfNN reconstructs both the inner and outer cortical surfaces jointly by training a single network to predict a midthickness surface that lies at the center of the inner and outer cortical surfaces. The input of SurfNN consists of a 3D MRI and an initialization of the midthickness surface that is represented both implicitly as a 3D distance map and explicitly as a triangular mesh with spherical topology, and its output includes both the inner and outer cortical surfaces, as well as the midthickness surface. The method has been evaluated on a large-scale MRI dataset and demonstrated competitive cortical surface reconstruction performance.
summary: To achieve fast, robust, and accurate reconstruction of the human cortical surfaces from 3D magnetic resonance images (MRIs), we develop a novel deep learning-based framework, referred to as SurfNN, to reconstruct simultaneously both inner (between white matter and gray matter) and outer (pial) surfaces from MRIs. Different from existing deep learning-based cortical surface reconstruction methods that either reconstruct the cortical surfaces separately or neglect the interdependence between the inner and outer surfaces, SurfNN reconstructs both the inner and outer cortical surfaces jointly by training a single network to predict a midthickness surface that lies at the center of the inner and outer cortical surfaces. The input of SurfNN consists of a 3D MRI and an initialization of the midthickness surface that is represented both implicitly as a 3D distance map and explicitly as a triangular mesh with spherical topology, and its output includes both the inner and outer cortical surfaces, as well as the midthickness surface. The method has been evaluated on a large-scale MRI dataset and demonstrated competitive cortical surface reconstruction performance.
abstract_zh: 为了实现从 3D 磁共振图像 (MRI) 快速、稳健且准确地重建人类皮质表面，我们开发了一种新型的基于深度学习的框架，称为 SurfNN，以从 MRI 中同时重建内表面（白质和灰质之间）和外表面（软脑膜）。与现有的基于深度学习的皮质表面重建方法要么单独重建皮质表面，要么忽略内外表面之间的相互依赖关系不同，SurfNN 通过训练单个网络来预测位于内外皮质表面中心的中层表面，从而联合重建内外皮质表面。 SurfNN 的输入由 3D MRI 和中厚度表面的初始化组成，该初始化既隐式表示为 3D 距离图，又显式表示为具有球形拓扑的三角形网格，其输出包括内皮质表面和外皮质表面以及中厚度表面。该方法已在大规模 MRI 数据集上进行了评估，并展示了具有竞争力的皮质表面重建性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的框架SurfNN，用于从磁共振图像（MRI）中同时重建人脑的内层（白质-灰质界面）和外层（皮质表面）皮质表面。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或分别重建内外层表面，或忽略两者间的相互依赖关系，导致重建精度和效率不足。本文旨在通过联合建模提升重建效果。
AI.method: SurfNN通过单个网络预测位于内外层中间的中层表面，输入包括3D MRI和初始中层表面（隐式距离图与显式球面拓扑网格表示），输出内外层及中层表面。
AI.result: 在大规模MRI数据集上评估表明，SurfNN在皮质表面重建性能上具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: SurfNN通过联合建模内外层表面的依赖关系，实现了快速、鲁棒且精确的皮质表面重建，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Khlood Ahmad,Mohamed Abdelrazek,Chetan Arora,Arbind Agrahari Baniya,Muneera Bano,John Grundy
title: Requirements Engineering Framework for Human-centered Artificial Intelligence Software Systems
title_zh: 以人为中心的人工智能软件系统的需求工程框架
abstract: [Context] Artificial intelligence (AI) components used in building software solutions have substantially increased in recent years. However, many of these solutions focus on technical aspects and ignore critical human-centered aspects. [Objective] Including human-centered aspects during requirements engineering (RE) when building AI-based software can help achieve more responsible, unbiased, and inclusive AI-based software solutions. [Method] In this paper, we present a new framework developed based on human-centered AI guidelines and a user survey to aid in collecting requirements for human-centered AI-based software. We provide a catalog to elicit these requirements and a conceptual model to present them visually. [Results] The framework is applied to a case study to elicit and model requirements for enhancing the quality of 360 degree~videos intended for virtual reality (VR) users. [Conclusion] We found that our proposed approach helped the project team fully understand the human-centered needs of the project to deliver. Furthermore, the framework helped to understand what requirements need to be captured at the initial stages against later stages in the engineering process of AI-based software.
summary: [Context] Artificial intelligence (AI) components used in building software solutions have substantially increased in recent years. However, many of these solutions focus on technical aspects and ignore critical human-centered aspects. [Objective] Including human-centered aspects during requirements engineering (RE) when building AI-based software can help achieve more responsible, unbiased, and inclusive AI-based software solutions. [Method] In this paper, we present a new framework developed based on human-centered AI guidelines and a user survey to aid in collecting requirements for human-centered AI-based software. We provide a catalog to elicit these requirements and a conceptual model to present them visually. [Results] The framework is applied to a case study to elicit and model requirements for enhancing the quality of 360 degree~videos intended for virtual reality (VR) users. [Conclusion] We found that our proposed approach helped the project team fully understand the human-centered needs of the project to deliver. Furthermore, the framework helped to understand what requirements need to be captured at the initial stages against later stages in the engineering process of AI-based software.
abstract_zh: [背景] 近年来，用于构建软件解决方案的人工智能 (AI) 组件大幅增加。然而，这些解决方案中有许多都侧重于技术方面，而忽略了以人为本的关键方面。 [目标] 在构建基于人工智能的软件时，在需求工程（RE）过程中纳入以人为本的方面，有助于实现更负责任、公正和包容的基于人工智能的软件解决方案。 [方法] 在本文中，我们提出了一个基于以人为中心的人工智能指南和用户调查开发的新框架，以帮助收集以人为中心的人工智能软件的需求。我们提供了一个目录来引出这些要求，并提供了一个概念模型来直观地呈现它们。 [结果] 该框架应用于案例研究，以引出和建模提高虚拟现实 (VR) 用户的 360 度视频质量的要求。 【结论】我们发现我们提出的方法帮助项目团队充分理解项目交付的以人为本的需求。此外，该框架有助于了解在基于人工智能的软件工程过程的初始阶段和后期阶段需要捕获哪些需求。

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于以人为中心AI指南和用户调查的需求工程框架，用于收集和建模AI软件系统的人为因素需求。
AI.motivation: 现有AI软件开发过度关注技术实现，忽视人文因素导致偏见和包容性问题，需通过系统化需求工程方法弥补这一缺陷。
AI.method: 整合以人为中心AI设计指南与用户调研数据，构建需求采集目录及可视化概念模型，形成分阶段需求捕获框架。
AI.result: 框架成功应用于VR领域360度视频质量提升的案例，有效识别出贯穿开发流程各阶段的人本需求特征。
AI.conclusion: 该框架使开发团队能系统化识别人本需求，明确不同工程阶段的需求优先级，提升AI软件的社会责任性与用户体验。

search_text: Requirements Engineering Framework for Human-centered Artificial Intelligence Software Systems 以人为中心的人工智能软件系统的需求工程框架 [Context] Artificial intelligence (AI) components used in building software solutions have substantially increased in recent years. However, many of these solutions focus on technical aspects and ignore critical human-centered aspects. [Objective] Including human-centered aspects during requirements engineering (RE) when building AI-based software can help achieve more responsible, unbiased, and inclusive AI-based software solutions. [Method] In this paper, we present a new framework developed based on human-centered AI guidelines and a user survey to aid in collecting requirements for human-centered AI-based software. We provide a catalog to elicit these requirements and a conceptual model to present them visually. [Results] The framework is applied to a case study to elicit and model requirements for enhancing the quality of 360 degree~videos intended for virtual reality (VR) users. [Conclusion] We found that our proposed approach helped the project team fully understand the human-centered needs of the project to deliver. Furthermore, the framework helped to understand what requirements need to be captured at the initial stages against later stages in the engineering process of AI-based software. [背景] 近年来，用于构建软件解决方案的人工智能 (AI) 组件大幅增加。然而，这些解决方案中有许多都侧重于技术方面，而忽略了以人为本的关键方面。 [目标] 在构建基于人工智能的软件时，在需求工程（RE）过程中纳入以人为本的方面，有助于实现更负责任、公正和包容的基于人工智能的软件解决方案。 [方法] 在本文中，我们提出了一个基于以人为中心的人工智能指南和用户调查开发的新框架，以帮助收集以人为中心的人工智能软件的需求。我们提供了一个目录来引出这些要求，并提供了一个概念模型来直观地呈现它们。 [结果] 该框架应用于案例研究，以引出和建模提高虚拟现实 (VR) 用户的 360 度视频质量的要求。 【结论】我们发现我们提出的方法帮助项目团队充分理解项目交付的以人为本的需求。此外，该框架有助于了解在基于人工智能的软件工程过程的初始阶段和后期阶段需要捕获哪些需求。 提出一个基于以人为中心AI指南和用户调查的需求工程框架，用于收集和建模AI软件系统的人为因素需求。 Khlood Ahmad,Mohamed Abdelrazek,Chetan Arora,Arbind Agrahari Baniya,Muneera Bano,John Grundy cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Chiao-Wei Hsu,Keh-Yih Su
title: GlobalNER: Incorporating Non-local Information into Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: GlobalNER：将非局部信息纳入命名实体识别
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures
comments: 13 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Nowadays, many Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks see the demand for incorporating knowledge external to the local information to further improve the performance. However, there is little related work on Named Entity Recognition (NER), which is one of the foundations of NLP. Specifically, no studies were conducted on the query generation and re-ranking for retrieving the related information for the purpose of improving NER. This work demonstrates the effectiveness of a DNN-based query generation method and a mention-aware re-ranking architecture based on BERTScore particularly for NER. In the end, a state-of-the-art performance of 61.56 micro-f1 score on WNUT17 dataset is achieved.
summary: Nowadays, many Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks see the demand for incorporating knowledge external to the local information to further improve the performance. However, there is little related work on Named Entity Recognition (NER), which is one of the foundations of NLP. Specifically, no studies were conducted on the query generation and re-ranking for retrieving the related information for the purpose of improving NER. This work demonstrates the effectiveness of a DNN-based query generation method and a mention-aware re-ranking architecture based on BERTScore particularly for NER. In the end, a state-of-the-art performance of 61.56 micro-f1 score on WNUT17 dataset is achieved.
abstract_zh: 如今，许多自然语言处理（NLP）任务都需要将外部知识融入本地信息以进一步提高性能。然而，作为 NLP 基础之一的命名实体识别 (NER) 的相关工作却很少。具体来说，没有对查询生成和重新排序以检索相关信息以改进 NER 进行研究。这项工作展示了基于 DNN 的查询生成方法和基于 BERTScore 的提及感知重排序架构（特别是 NER）的有效性。最终，在 WNUT17 数据集上实现了 61.56 micro-f1 分数的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将非局部信息整合到命名实体识别（NER）中的方法，通过查询生成和重排序技术提升NER性能。
AI.motivation: 现有NER研究较少利用外部知识，缺乏针对查询生成和重排序的系统性研究，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 采用基于深度神经网络的查询生成方法，结合BERTScore构建提及感知的重排序架构以整合非局部信息。
AI.result: 在WNUT17数据集上达到61.56的微F1分数，取得当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 证明了引入非局部信息对NER的有效性，未来可进一步优化查询生成策略或探索其他重排序方法。

authors_text: Xianjun Yang,Wei Cheng,Xujiang Zhao,Wenchao Yu,Linda Petzold,Haifeng Chen
title: Dynamic Prompting: A Unified Framework for Prompt Tuning
title_zh: 动态提示：提示调整的统一框架
comment: update
comments: update
abstract: It has been demonstrated that the art of prompt tuning is highly effective in efficiently extracting knowledge from pretrained foundation models, encompassing pretrained language models (PLMs), vision pretrained models, and vision-language (V-L) models. However, the efficacy of employing fixed soft prompts with a predetermined position for concatenation with inputs for all instances, irrespective of their inherent disparities, remains uncertain. Variables such as the position, length, and representations of prompts across diverse instances and tasks can substantially influence the performance of prompt tuning. In this context, we provide a theoretical analysis, which reveals that optimizing the position of the prompt to encompass the input can capture additional semantic information that traditional prefix or postfix prompt tuning methods fail to capture. Building upon our analysis, we present a unified dynamic prompt (DP) tuning strategy that dynamically determines different factors of prompts based on specific tasks and instances. To accomplish this, we employ a lightweight learning network with Gumble-Softmax, allowing us to learn instance-dependent guidance. Experimental results underscore the significant performance improvement achieved by dynamic prompt tuning across a wide range of tasks, including NLP tasks, vision recognition tasks, and vision-language tasks. Furthermore, we establish the universal applicability of our approach under full-data, few-shot, and multitask scenarios. Codes are available at https://github.com/Xianjun-Yang/DPT.
summary: It has been demonstrated that the art of prompt tuning is highly effective in efficiently extracting knowledge from pretrained foundation models, encompassing pretrained language models (PLMs), vision pretrained models, and vision-language (V-L) models. However, the efficacy of employing fixed soft prompts with a predetermined position for concatenation with inputs for all instances, irrespective of their inherent disparities, remains uncertain. Variables such as the position, length, and representations of prompts across diverse instances and tasks can substantially influence the performance of prompt tuning. In this context, we provide a theoretical analysis, which reveals that optimizing the position of the prompt to encompass the input can capture additional semantic information that traditional prefix or postfix prompt tuning methods fail to capture. Building upon our analysis, we present a unified dynamic prompt (DP) tuning strategy that dynamically determines different factors of prompts based on specific tasks and instances. To accomplish this, we employ a lightweight learning network with Gumble-Softmax, allowing us to learn instance-dependent guidance. Experimental results underscore the significant performance improvement achieved by dynamic prompt tuning across a wide range of tasks, including NLP tasks, vision recognition tasks, and vision-language tasks. Furthermore, we establish the universal applicability of our approach under full-data, few-shot, and multitask scenarios. Codes are available at https://github.com/Xianjun-Yang/DPT.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，即时调优技术对于从预训练基础模型（包括预训练语言模型 (PLM)、视觉预训练模型和视觉语言 (V-L) 模型）中高效提取知识非常有效。然而，采用具有预定位置的固定软提示与所有实例的输入连接的效果，无论其固有的差异如何，仍然不确定。不同实例和任务中提示的位置、长度和表示等变量可以极大地影响提示调整的性能。在这种情况下，我们提供了理论分析，表明优化提示的位置以包含输入可以捕获传统前缀或后缀提示调整方法无法捕获的附加语义信息。基于我们的分析，我们提出了一种统一的动态提示（DP）调整策略，可以根据特定任务和实例动态确定提示的不同因素。为了实现这一目标，我们采用了带有 Gumble-Softmax 的轻量级学习网络，使我们能够学习依赖于实例的指导。实验结果强调了通过跨多种任务（包括 NLP 任务、视觉识别任务和视觉语言任务）进行动态提示调整所实现的显着性能提升。此外，我们建立了我们的方法在全数据、少样本和多任务场景下的普遍适用性。代码可在 https://github.com/Xianjun-Yang/DPT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态提示（DP）调整策略，通过动态确定提示的位置、长度和表示，以提升预训练模型在不同任务和实例中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统固定提示方法在不同任务和实例中表现不佳，因其无法适应输入差异，而提示的位置、长度和表示对性能影响显著。
AI.method: 设计轻量级学习网络结合Gumble-Softmax，动态学习实例依赖的提示参数，实现提示因素的自适应调整。
AI.result: 在自然语言处理、视觉识别及视觉-语言任务中均取得显著性能提升，且适用于全数据、少样本和多任务场景。
AI.conclusion: 动态提示框架通过理论分析与实验验证，证明其在多种任务和数据条件下的普适性与有效性，优于传统固定提示方法。

authors_text: Jingyuan Zhu,Huimin Ma,Jiansheng Chen,Jian Yuan
title: MotionVideoGAN: A Novel Video Generator Based on the Motion Space Learned from Image Pairs
title_zh: MotionVideoGAN：一种基于从图像对学习的运动空间的新型视频生成器
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia as a regular paper
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia as a regular paper
abstract: Video generation has achieved rapid progress benefiting from high-quality renderings provided by powerful image generators. We regard the video synthesis task as generating a sequence of images sharing the same contents but varying in motions. However, most previous video synthesis frameworks based on pre-trained image generators treat content and motion generation separately, leading to unrealistic generated videos. Therefore, we design a novel framework to build the motion space, aiming to achieve content consistency and fast convergence for video generation. We present MotionVideoGAN, a novel video generator synthesizing videos based on the motion space learned by pre-trained image pair generators. Firstly, we propose an image pair generator named MotionStyleGAN to generate image pairs sharing the same contents and producing various motions. Then we manage to acquire motion codes to edit one image in the generated image pairs and keep the other unchanged. The motion codes help us edit images within the motion space since the edited image shares the same contents with the other unchanged one in image pairs. Finally, we introduce a latent code generator to produce latent code sequences using motion codes for video generation. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the most complex video dataset ever used for unconditional video generation evaluation, UCF101.
summary: Video generation has achieved rapid progress benefiting from high-quality renderings provided by powerful image generators. We regard the video synthesis task as generating a sequence of images sharing the same contents but varying in motions. However, most previous video synthesis frameworks based on pre-trained image generators treat content and motion generation separately, leading to unrealistic generated videos. Therefore, we design a novel framework to build the motion space, aiming to achieve content consistency and fast convergence for video generation. We present MotionVideoGAN, a novel video generator synthesizing videos based on the motion space learned by pre-trained image pair generators. Firstly, we propose an image pair generator named MotionStyleGAN to generate image pairs sharing the same contents and producing various motions. Then we manage to acquire motion codes to edit one image in the generated image pairs and keep the other unchanged. The motion codes help us edit images within the motion space since the edited image shares the same contents with the other unchanged one in image pairs. Finally, we introduce a latent code generator to produce latent code sequences using motion codes for video generation. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the most complex video dataset ever used for unconditional video generation evaluation, UCF101.
abstract_zh: 得益于强大的图像生成器提供的高质量渲染，视频生成取得了快速进展。我们将视频合成任务视为生成一系列共享相同内容但运动不同的图像。然而，之前大多数基于预训练图像生成器的视频合成框架将内容和运动生成分开处理，导致生成的视频不切实际。因此，我们设计了一种新颖的框架来构建运动空间，旨在实现视频生成的内容一致性和快速收敛。我们提出了 MotionVideoGAN，这是一种新颖的视频生成器，它基于预先训练的图像对生成器学习到的运动空间来合成视频。首先，我们提出了一种名为 MotionStyleGAN 的图像对生成器，用于生成共享相同内容并产生各种运动的图像对。然后，我们设法获取运动代码来编辑生成的图像对中的一个图像，并保持另一图像不变。运动代码帮助我们在运动空间内编辑图像，因为编辑后的图像与图像对中另一未更改的图像共享相同的内容。最后，我们引入了一个潜在代码生成器，使用运动代码生成潜在代码序列以进行视频生成。我们的方法在用于无条件视频生成评估的最复杂的视频数据集 UCF101 上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MotionVideoGAN，一种基于图像对生成的运动空间的视频生成框架，旨在解决传统方法中内容与运动分离导致的视频不真实问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成框架将内容和运动生成分离，导致生成视频缺乏真实感，且难以保持内容一致性。
AI.method: 设计MotionStyleGAN生成共享内容的图像对，提取运动编码以编辑单张图像并保持另一张不变，再通过潜在编码生成器序列生成视频。
AI.result: 在UCF101数据集上达到无条件视频生成的最先进性能，验证了方法在复杂场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过运动空间建模实现内容一致性与快速收敛，为高质量视频生成提供了新思路。

search_text: MotionVideoGAN: A Novel Video Generator Based on the Motion Space Learned from Image Pairs MotionVideoGAN：一种基于从图像对学习的运动空间的新型视频生成器 Video generation has achieved rapid progress benefiting from high-quality renderings provided by powerful image generators. We regard the video synthesis task as generating a sequence of images sharing the same contents but varying in motions. However, most previous video synthesis frameworks based on pre-trained image generators treat content and motion generation separately, leading to unrealistic generated videos. Therefore, we design a novel framework to build the motion space, aiming to achieve content consistency and fast convergence for video generation. We present MotionVideoGAN, a novel video generator synthesizing videos based on the motion space learned by pre-trained image pair generators. Firstly, we propose an image pair generator named MotionStyleGAN to generate image pairs sharing the same contents and producing various motions. Then we manage to acquire motion codes to edit one image in the generated image pairs and keep the other unchanged. The motion codes help us edit images within the motion space since the edited image shares the same contents with the other unchanged one in image pairs. Finally, we introduce a latent code generator to produce latent code sequences using motion codes for video generation. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the most complex video dataset ever used for unconditional video generation evaluation, UCF101. 得益于强大的图像生成器提供的高质量渲染，视频生成取得了快速进展。我们将视频合成任务视为生成一系列共享相同内容但运动不同的图像。然而，之前大多数基于预训练图像生成器的视频合成框架将内容和运动生成分开处理，导致生成的视频不切实际。因此，我们设计了一种新颖的框架来构建运动空间，旨在实现视频生成的内容一致性和快速收敛。我们提出了 MotionVideoGAN，这是一种新颖的视频生成器，它基于预先训练的图像对生成器学习到的运动空间来合成视频。首先，我们提出了一种名为 MotionStyleGAN 的图像对生成器，用于生成共享相同内容并产生各种运动的图像对。然后，我们设法获取运动代码来编辑生成的图像对中的一个图像，并保持另一图像不变。运动代码帮助我们在运动空间内编辑图像，因为编辑后的图像与图像对中另一未更改的图像共享相同的内容。最后，我们引入了一个潜在代码生成器，使用运动代码生成潜在代码序列以进行视频生成。我们的方法在用于无条件视频生成评估的最复杂的视频数据集 UCF101 上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出MotionVideoGAN，一种基于图像对生成的运动空间的视频生成框架，旨在解决传统方法中内容与运动分离导致的视频不真实问题。 Jingyuan Zhu,Huimin Ma,Jiansheng Chen,Jian Yuan cs.CV

authors_text: Xiao Hu,HangJie Mo,XiangSheng Chen,JinLiang Chen,Xiangyu Chen
title: ONE PIECE: One Patchwork In Effectively Combined Extraction for grasp
title_zh: 海贼王：有效组合提取中的一个拼凑物以供掌握
comment: Submitted to IROS2023
comments: Submitted to IROS2023
abstract: For grasp network algorithms, generating grasp datasets for a large number of 3D objects is a crucial task. However, generating grasp datasets for hundreds of objects can be very slow and consume a lot of storage resources, which hinders algorithm iteration and promotion. For point cloud grasp network algorithms, the network input is essentially the internal point cloud of the grasp area that intersects with the object in the gripper coordinate system. Due to the existence of a large number of completely consistent gripper area point clouds based on the gripper coordinate system in the grasp dataset generated for hundreds of objects, it is possible to remove the consistent gripper area point clouds from many objects and assemble them into a single object to generate the grasp dataset, thus replacing the enormous workload of generating grasp datasets for hundreds of objects. We propose a new approach to map the repetitive features of a large number of objects onto a finite set.To this end, we propose a method for extracting the gripper area point cloud that intersects with the object from the simulator and design a gripper feature filter to remove the shape-repeated gripper space area point clouds, and then assemble them into a single object. The experimental results show that the time required to generate the new object grasp dataset is greatly reduced compared to generating the grasp dataset for hundreds of objects, and it performs well in real machine grasping experiments. We will release the data and tools after the paper is accepted.
summary: For grasp network algorithms, generating grasp datasets for a large number of 3D objects is a crucial task. However, generating grasp datasets for hundreds of objects can be very slow and consume a lot of storage resources, which hinders algorithm iteration and promotion. For point cloud grasp network algorithms, the network input is essentially the internal point cloud of the grasp area that intersects with the object in the gripper coordinate system. Due to the existence of a large number of completely consistent gripper area point clouds based on the gripper coordinate system in the grasp dataset generated for hundreds of objects, it is possible to remove the consistent gripper area point clouds from many objects and assemble them into a single object to generate the grasp dataset, thus replacing the enormous workload of generating grasp datasets for hundreds of objects. We propose a new approach to map the repetitive features of a large number of objects onto a finite set.To this end, we propose a method for extracting the gripper area point cloud that intersects with the object from the simulator and design a gripper feature filter to remove the shape-repeated gripper space area point clouds, and then assemble them into a single object. The experimental results show that the time required to generate the new object grasp dataset is greatly reduced compared to generating the grasp dataset for hundreds of objects, and it performs well in real machine grasping experiments. We will release the data and tools after the paper is accepted.
abstract_zh: 对于抓取网络算法来说，为大量 3D 对象生成抓取数据集是一项至关重要的任务。然而，生成数百个对象的抓取数据集可能非常慢并且消耗大量存储资源，这阻碍了算法的迭代和推广。对于点云抓取网络算法，网络输入本质上是与抓手坐标系中的物体相交的抓取区域的内部点云。由于在为数百个物体生成的抓取数据集中存在大量基于夹具坐标系的完全一致的夹具区域点云，因此可以从许多物体中去除一致的夹具区域点云并将它们组装成单个物体来生成抓取数据集，从而替代为数百个物体生成抓取数据集的巨大工作量。我们提出了一种将大量物体的重复特征映射到有限集合上的新方法。为此，我们提出了一种从模拟器中提取与物体相交的抓手区域点云的方法，并设计抓手特征过滤器来去除形状重复的抓手空间区域点云，然后将它们组装成单个物体。实验结果表明，与生成数百个物体的抓取数据集相比，生成新的物体抓取数据集所需的时间大大减少，并且在真机抓取实验中表现良好。我们将在论文被接受后发布数据和工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过复用抓取区域点云生成高效抓取数据集的方法，减少对大量物体生成数据集的时间和存储消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统方法为数百个物体生成抓取数据集耗时且占用大量存储资源，而抓取网络输入的抓取区域点云在机械臂坐标系下存在大量重复特征。
AI.method: 从模拟器中提取物体交集的抓取区域点云，设计抓取特征过滤器去除重复的抓取空间点云，并将其组装为单一物体数据集。
AI.result: 新方法生成单物体数据集的时间显著低于传统方法，且在实际机械臂抓取实验中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 通过复用重复特征点云可高效生成高质量抓取数据集，为算法迭代提供可行方案。

authors_text: Haoyang Jiang,Elizabeth A. Croft,Michael G. Burke
title: Social Cue Detection and Analysis Using Transfer Entropy
title_zh: 使用传递熵进行社交线索检测和分析
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Preprint. To be published in Proceedings of the 2024 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI '24), March 11--14, 2024, Boulder, CO, USA
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures. Preprint. To be published in Proceedings of the 2024 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI '24), March 11--14, 2024, Boulder, CO, USA
abstract: Robots that work close to humans need to understand and use social cues to act in a socially acceptable manner. Social cues are a form of communication (i.e., information flow) between people. In this paper, a framework is introduced to detect and analyse a class of perceptible social cues that are nonverbal and episodic, and the related information transfer using an information-theoretic measure, namely, transfer entropy. We use a group-joining setting to demonstrate the practicality of transfer entropy for analysing communications between humans. Then we demonstrate the framework in two settings involving social interactions between humans: object-handover and person-following. Our results show that transfer entropy can identify information flows between agents and when and where they occur. Potential applications of the framework include information flow or social cue analysis for interactive robot design and socially-aware robot planning.
summary: Robots that work close to humans need to understand and use social cues to act in a socially acceptable manner. Social cues are a form of communication (i.e., information flow) between people. In this paper, a framework is introduced to detect and analyse a class of perceptible social cues that are nonverbal and episodic, and the related information transfer using an information-theoretic measure, namely, transfer entropy. We use a group-joining setting to demonstrate the practicality of transfer entropy for analysing communications between humans. Then we demonstrate the framework in two settings involving social interactions between humans: object-handover and person-following. Our results show that transfer entropy can identify information flows between agents and when and where they occur. Potential applications of the framework include information flow or social cue analysis for interactive robot design and socially-aware robot planning.
abstract_zh: 与人类密切合作的机器人需要理解并利用社交线索以社会可接受的方式行事。社交线索是人与人之间沟通（即信息流）的一种形式。在本文中，引入了一个框架来检测和分析一类可感知的非语言和情景社交线索，以及使用信息论度量（即转移熵）的相关信息转移。我们使用群组加入设置来演示转移熵在分析人与人之间的通信方面的实用性。然后，我们在涉及人类之间社交互动的两种环境中演示该框架：对象移交和人员跟随。我们的结果表明，转移熵可以识别主体之间的信息流以及信息流发生的时间和地点。该框架的潜在应用包括用于交互式机器人设计和社交感知机器人规划的信息流或社交线索分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于转移熵的信息论框架，用于检测和分析人类非语言性社交线索，以提升机器人在社交场景中的交互能力。
AI.motivation: 机器人需理解人类非语言社交线索（如物体交接、跟随行为）以实现自然交互，但传统方法难以量化此类非语言信息流的动态特征。
AI.method: 构建基于转移熵的分析框架，通过群体协作场景（物体交接、跟随任务）验证其对人际信息流的检测能力，量化社交线索的传递时序与方向。
AI.result: 实验表明转移熵能有效识别多智能体间的信息流动及其发生时序，为社交机器人设计提供数据支撑。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为社交机器人感知与规划提供了新的信息流分析工具，可推动更具社会适应性的机器人系统开发。

ai_content_json.method: 构建基于转移熵的分析框架，通过群体协作场景（物体交接、跟随任务）验证其对人际信息流的检测能力，量化社交线索的传递时序与方向。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明转移熵能有效识别多智能体间的信息流动及其发生时序，为社交机器人设计提供数据支撑。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该框架为社交机器人感知与规划提供了新的信息流分析工具，可推动更具社会适应性的机器人系统开发。

search_text: Social Cue Detection and Analysis Using Transfer Entropy 使用传递熵进行社交线索检测和分析 Robots that work close to humans need to understand and use social cues to act in a socially acceptable manner. Social cues are a form of communication (i.e., information flow) between people. In this paper, a framework is introduced to detect and analyse a class of perceptible social cues that are nonverbal and episodic, and the related information transfer using an information-theoretic measure, namely, transfer entropy. We use a group-joining setting to demonstrate the practicality of transfer entropy for analysing communications between humans. Then we demonstrate the framework in two settings involving social interactions between humans: object-handover and person-following. Our results show that transfer entropy can identify information flows between agents and when and where they occur. Potential applications of the framework include information flow or social cue analysis for interactive robot design and socially-aware robot planning. 与人类密切合作的机器人需要理解并利用社交线索以社会可接受的方式行事。社交线索是人与人之间沟通（即信息流）的一种形式。在本文中，引入了一个框架来检测和分析一类可感知的非语言和情景社交线索，以及使用信息论度量（即转移熵）的相关信息转移。我们使用群组加入设置来演示转移熵在分析人与人之间的通信方面的实用性。然后，我们在涉及人类之间社交互动的两种环境中演示该框架：对象移交和人员跟随。我们的结果表明，转移熵可以识别主体之间的信息流以及信息流发生的时间和地点。该框架的潜在应用包括用于交互式机器人设计和社交感知机器人规划的信息流或社交线索分析。 本文提出一种基于转移熵的信息论框架，用于检测和分析人类非语言性社交线索，以提升机器人在社交场景中的交互能力。 Haoyang Jiang,Elizabeth A. Croft,Michael G. Burke cs.RO
